  leg_sequence varchar [note: 'Ordinal position of the leg within the multi‑modal shipment.']
  leg_status varchar [note: 'Current operational status of the leg.']
  load_type varchar [note: 'Classification of cargo load for the leg.']
  odometer_end varchar [note: 'Vehicle odometer reading at the end of the leg (kilometers).']
  odometer_start varchar [note: 'Vehicle odometer reading at the start of the leg (kilometers).']
  planned_arrival_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Scheduled arrival date‑time for the leg.']
  planned_departure_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Scheduled departure date‑time for the leg.']
  quantity varchar [note: 'Number of individual vehicles or units moved in this leg.']
  returnable_packaging_manifest varchar [note: 'Reference to returnable packaging manifest for this leg']
  seal_number varchar [note: 'Security seal identifier applied to containers or trailers.']
  temperature_control_required boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the cargo requires temperature‑controlled transport.']
  temperature_max_c decimal(5,2) [note: 'Maximum temperature setting for the leg when temperature control is required.']
  temperature_min_c decimal(5,2) [note: 'Minimum temperature setting for the leg when temperature control is required.']
  tracking_number varchar [note: 'Carrier‑provided tracking identifier for the leg.']
  transport_mode varchar [note: 'Mode of transport used for this leg (e.g., truck, rail, ship, air, pipeline).']
  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp of the most recent update to the shipment leg record.']
  volume_cubic_meters decimal(10,3) [note: 'Total cargo volume for the leg, measured in cubic meters.']
  weight_tons decimal(10,3) [note: 'Total weight of cargo transported on this leg, expressed in metric tons.']

  Note: 'Individual transport leg within a multi-modal shipment, representing a discrete movement segment (e.g., plant to rail yard, rail yard to port, port to dealer compound). Tracks leg sequence, transport mode, carrier assignment, origin/destination facility, planned and actual departure/arrival timestamps, distance, leg-level status, and mode-specific details (rail car number/type for rail legs, vessel name/IMO/voyage for ocean legs). After merges, this product also carries rail car assignment details and vessel voyage references for their respective transport modes. Enables end-to-end multi-modal visibility for each VIN or batch.'
}

Table logistics.vehicle_transport_order {
  finished_vehicle_stock_id varchar [pk, note: 'System-generated unique identifier for the transport order.']
  vehicle_transport_order_id varchar [pk, note: 'Primary key for vehicle_transport_order']
  carrier_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the logistics carrier responsible for the shipment.']
  cost_center_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to finance.cost_center. Business justification: Transport order costs are charged to a cost center for budgeting and variance analysis.']
  dealership_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to dealer.dealership. Business justification: Needed for Transport Order Execution Dashboard to associate each order with the receiving dealership; supports dealer‑level on‑time delivery metrics.']
  dispatcher_employee_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to workforce.employee. Business justification: Dispatch planning process assigns a dispatcher employee to each transport order for tracking and accountability.']
  load_plan_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the load planning record associated with this transport order.']
  plant_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the manufacturing plant where the vehicles are shipped from.']
  shipment_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to logistics.shipment. Business justification: A transport order represents the execution of a shipment; linking it to the parent shipment enables traceability of cost and status.']
  vehicle_order_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to sales.vehicle_order. Business justification: Transport planning aligns with the specific sales vehicle order to ensure correct routing, timing, and cost allocation.']
  vehicle_program_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to engineering.vehicle_program. Business justification: Needed for Transport Order Management to group orders by vehicle program, enabling capacity planning and compliance with program launch schedules.']
  actual_arrival_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the shipment was actually received at the destination.']
  carrier_contact varchar [note: 'Primary phone number for the carrier\'s dispatch desk.']
  compliance_regulation_code varchar [note: 'Code of the regulatory requirement applicable to the shipment (e.g., IATF, EPA).']
  confirmed_pickup_date date [note: 'Date the carrier confirmed for vehicle pickup.']
  container_type varchar [note: 'Type of container or trailer used for the shipment (e.g., flatbed, container, roll‑on/roll‑off).']
  currency_code varchar [note: 'Three‑letter ISO 4217 code of the currency used for the transport cost.']
  customs_declaration_number varchar [note: 'Identifier of the customs declaration for cross‑border shipments.']
  delivery_date date [note: 'Planned date for delivery to the destination dealer.']
  distance_km decimal(8,2) [note: 'Total distance in kilometers for the shipment route.']
  emission_co2_kg decimal(10,2) [note: 'Estimated CO₂ emissions for the shipment based on distance and vehicle type.']
  estimated_arrival_timestamp timestamp [note: 'System‑estimated timestamp when the shipment is expected to arrive at the destination.']
  export_import_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the shipment is an export or import movement.']
  fuel_type varchar [note: 'Dominant fuel type of the vehicles being shipped.']
  is_expedited boolean [note: 'True if the shipment is marked for expedited handling.']
  is_hazardous boolean [note: 'True if the shipment contains hazardous materials requiring special compliance.']
  notes varchar [note: 'Free‑form notes entered by logistics planners.']
  on_time_delivery_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the shipment was delivered within the agreed on‑time window.']
  order_created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the transport order was initially created in the system.']
  order_number varchar [note: 'External business identifier assigned to the transport order by the logistics system.']
  order_status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle state of the transport order.']
  origin_compound varchar [note: 'Name of the storage yard or compound where vehicles are staged before pickup.']
  priority varchar [note: 'Business priority assigned to the transport order.']
  record_audit_created timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when this record was first captured for audit purposes.']
  record_audit_updated timestamp [note: 'Timestamp of the most recent update to this record.']
  requested_pickup_date date [note: 'Date the shipper requested the carrier to pick up the vehicles.']
  shipping_instructions varchar [note: 'Special handling or routing instructions for the carrier.']
  tracking_number varchar [note: 'Tracking number provided by the carrier for real‑time shipment visibility.']
  transport_cost_gross decimal(12,2) [note: 'Total gross cost charged by the carrier before taxes and discounts.']
  transport_cost_net decimal(12,2) [note: 'Net amount payable to the carrier after taxes and discounts.']
  transport_cost_tax decimal(12,2) [note: 'Tax component of the transport cost.']
  transport_mode varchar [note: 'Mode of transportation used for the shipment.']
  vehicle_count varchar [note: 'Number of vehicles included in this transport order.']
  vin_list varchar [note: 'Comma‑separated list of VINs for the vehicles being shipped.']
  weight_tons decimal(8,2) [note: 'Total weight of all vehicles in the shipment.']

  Note: 'Transport order issued to a carrier for the movement of finished vehicles. Captures order number, issuing plant, carrier reference, transport mode, vehicle count, VIN list, origin compound, destination, requested pickup date, confirmed pickup date, and order status. Represents the contractual instruction to move vehicles and is the primary document linking shipments to carrier execution. Sourced from SAP TM or SAP SD.'
}

Table logistics.logistics_delivery_schedule {
  finished_vehicle_stock_id varchar [pk, note: 'System-generated unique identifier for the delivery schedule record.']
  logistics_delivery_schedule_id varchar [pk, note: 'Unique identifier for the delivery_schedule data product (auto-inserted pre-linking).']
  carrier_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the logistics carrier responsible for transportation.']
  cost_center_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to finance.cost_center. Business justification: Scheduled delivery cost estimates are allocated to a cost center for financial planning.']
  logistics_dealer_dealership_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the dealer receiving the vehicles.']
  logistics_dealership_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the dealer receiving the vehicles.']
  plant_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the manufacturing plant or distribution compound where the vehicles are dispatched.']
  route_id varchar [note: 'Identifier for the transportation route used for the delivery.']
  scheduler_employee_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to workforce.employee. Business justification: Delivery Scheduling system records which employee created/maintains each schedule for audit and performance metrics.']
  shipment_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to logistics.shipment. Business justification: Delivery schedule planning references the shipment that will deliver vehicles to the dealership.']
  vehicle_order_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to sales.vehicle_order. Business justification: Delivery schedule generation uses sales order details to plan dealer deliveries and measure on‑time delivery performance.']
  vehicle_program_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to engineering.vehicle_program. Business justification: Delivery Schedule Dashboard aggregates deliveries per program; linking ensures on‑time delivery metrics are tied to the correct vehicle program.']
  actual_arrival_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Real timestamp when the shipment arrived at the dealer.']
  actual_departure_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Real timestamp when the shipment actually left the plant.']
  arrival_date date [note: 'Scheduled date for the vehicles to arrive at the dealer location.']
  compliance_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates the compliance status of the shipment with relevant regulations.']
  cost_actual decimal(12,2) [note: 'Final cost incurred for the delivery after execution.']
  cost_estimate decimal(12,2) [note: 'Projected cost for the scheduled delivery, before execution.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the record was first captured for audit purposes.']
  currency_code varchar [note: 'Three‑letter ISO currency code for cost fields.']
  customs_document_required boolean [note: 'True if customs paperwork is required for the shipment.']
  d2c_delivery_flag boolean [note: 'Whether this is a direct-to-consumer home delivery']
  dangerous_goods_flag boolean [note: 'Whether shipment contains dangerous goods requiring special handling']
  delivery_window_end timestamp [note: 'End of the agreed delivery time window at the dealer.']
  delivery_window_start timestamp [note: 'Start of the agreed delivery time window at the dealer.']
  departure_date date [note: 'Scheduled date for the vehicles to leave the plant or compound.']
  estimated_delivery_date date [note: 'Projected delivery date based on current schedule and carrier commitments.']
  export_import_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the shipment is export, import, or domestic.']
  freight_class varchar [note: 'Classification of freight for tariff and handling purposes.']
  incoterms varchar [note: 'International commercial terms governing the delivery responsibilities.']
  is_expedited boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the delivery is expedited (true) or standard (false).']
  is_hazardous boolean [note: 'True if the shipment contains hazardous materials requiring special handling.']
  last_mile_delivery_method varchar [note: 'Method used for the final leg of delivery to the dealer or customer.']
  lead_time_days varchar [note: 'Number of days between departure and arrival, calculated for performance analysis.']
  logistics_delivery_schedule_status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle state of the delivery schedule.']
  notes varchar [note: 'Free‑form field for any additional remarks.']
  otd_actual_date date [note: 'Actual date when the delivery was completed for OTD measurement.']
  otd_target_date date [note: 'Target date for achieving on‑time delivery performance.']
  planned_quantity varchar [note: 'Number of vehicles (or units) scheduled for delivery.']
  priority_level varchar [note: 'Business priority assigned to the delivery schedule.']
  returnable_packaging_required_flag boolean [note: 'Whether returnable packaging is required for this delivery']
  schedule_horizon varchar [note: 'Planning horizon for the schedule (e.g., weekly, monthly).']
  schedule_number varchar [note: 'Business identifier assigned to the delivery schedule, used for tracking and communication with dealers and carriers.']
  schedule_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the delivery schedule was initially created in the system.']
  scheduled_arrival_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Planned exact timestamp for arrival, including time of day.']
  scheduled_departure_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Planned exact timestamp for departure, including time of day.']
  special_instructions varchar [note: 'Any additional handling or routing instructions for the shipment.']
  temperature_control_required boolean [note: 'True if temperature‑controlled transport is required.']
  tracking_number varchar [note: 'External tracking number provided by the carrier.']
  transport_mode varchar [note: 'Mode of transportation used for the delivery.']
  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp of the most recent modification to the delivery schedule record.']
  vehicle_type varchar [note: 'Type of transport vehicle allocated for the shipment.']
  volume_cbm decimal(10,3) [note: 'Aggregate cargo volume in cubic meters.']
  weight_kg decimal(10,2) [note: 'Aggregate weight of the shipment in kilograms.']

  Note: 'Planned delivery schedule for finished vehicles from plant or distribution compound to dealer network. Captures scheduled delivery windows, dealer allocation, vehicle model/trim/color mix, planned quantities, transport mode, and scheduling horizon (weekly/monthly). Supports OTD planning, dealer inventory replenishment, and logistics capacity allocation. Linked to dealer orders and production scheduling.'
}

Table logistics.carrier {
  carrier_id varchar [pk, note: 'System-generated unique identifier for the carrier record.']
  jurisdiction_id varchar
  address_line1 varchar [note: 'First line of the carrier\'s primary business address.']
  address_line2 varchar [note: 'Second line of the carrier\'s primary business address (optional).']
  average_cost_per_mile decimal(18,2) [note: 'Average transportation cost incurred per mile for this carrier.']
  average_on_time_delivery_pct decimal(5,2) [note: 'Average percentage of shipments delivered on or before the promised delivery date.']
  carrier_name varchar [note: 'Legal name of the transport carrier as registered with authorities.']
  carrier_status varchar [note: 'Current operational status of the carrier within the logistics network.']
  carrier_type varchar [note: 'Business classification of the carrier entity.']
  city varchar [note: 'City of the carrier\'s primary business address.']
  contact_email varchar [note: 'Email address for the carrier\'s primary contact.']
  contact_name varchar [note: 'Name of the primary contact person for the carrier.']
  contact_phone varchar [note: 'Telephone number for the carrier\'s primary contact.']
  contract_end_date date [note: 'Expiration date of the carrier\'s master service agreement (null if open‑ended).']
  contract_reference varchar [note: 'External reference identifier for the carrier\'s master service agreement.']
  contract_start_date date [note: 'Effective start date of the carrier\'s master service agreement.']
  country varchar [note: 'Three‑letter ISO country code of the carrier\'s primary business address.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Date and time when the carrier record was first created in the system.']
  effective_from date [note: 'Date from which the carrier record is considered active for reporting.']
  effective_until date [note: 'Date after which the carrier record is no longer active (null if indefinite).']
  environmental_certification varchar [note: 'Environmental compliance certifications held by the carrier.']
  equipment_type varchar [note: 'Main type of equipment the carrier uses for shipments.']
  field_service_info varchar [note: 'Generic field service info placeholder']
  fleet_size varchar [note: 'Number of transport units (e.g., trucks, railcars) owned or operated by the carrier.']
  iatf_compliance_status varchar [note: 'Current IATF 16949 quality‑management compliance status of the carrier.']
  insurance_policy_number varchar [note: 'Policy number of the carrier\'s liability insurance.']
  insurance_provider varchar [note: 'Name of the insurance company covering the carrier\'s operations.']
  last_audit_date date [note: 'Date of the most recent compliance or safety audit performed on the carrier.']
  notes varchar [note: 'Free‑form field for any supplemental information about the carrier.']
  operating_regions varchar [note: 'Geographic regions (e.g., continents, countries) where the carrier provides service.']
  performance_rating decimal(3,2) [note: 'Overall performance score (0‑5) derived from on‑time delivery, safety, and cost metrics.']
  postal_code varchar [note: 'Postal/ZIP code of the carrier\'s primary business address.']
  safety_rating varchar [note: 'Safety performance rating based on regulatory audits and incident history.']
  scac_code varchar [note: 'Four‑letter code uniquely identifying the carrier in North American logistics.']
  state varchar [note: 'State or province of the carrier\'s primary business address.']
  tax_identifier varchar [note: 'Government‑issued tax identifier for the carrier.']
  tier varchar [note: 'Strategic tier assigned to the carrier based on volume, reliability, and strategic importance.']
  transport_modes varchar [note: 'Transport modes the carrier is authorized to operate.']
  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Date and time of the most recent update to the carrier record.']
  website varchar [note: 'Public website URL of the carrier.']

  Note: 'Master record for transport carriers (road haulers, rail operators, ocean shipping lines, port logistics providers) engaged for finished vehicle and CKD/SKD kit logistics. Captures carrier legal name, SCAC code, DOT number, transport modes supported, operating regions, contract reference, insurance certificate details, IATF 16949 compliance status, carrier tier classification, and performance rating. SSOT for carrier identity within the logistics domain. Referenced by transport orders, shipment legs, freight invoices, damage claims, and rate contracts.'
}

Table logistics.carrier_performance {
  carrier_performance_id varchar [pk, note: 'System‑generated unique identifier for each carrier performance scorecard row.']
  carrier_id varchar [note: 'Unique identifier of the logistics carrier whose performance is being measured.']
  reviewed_by_employee_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to workforce.employee. Business justification: Carrier performance reviews are performed by a specific employee; link enables reviewer accountability.']
  average_transit_days decimal(5,2) [note: 'Mean number of calendar days shipments spent in transit for the period.']
  carrier_performance_status varchar [note: 'Indicates whether the performance record is active, inactive, or archived.']
  claim_frequency varchar [note: 'Count of loss or damage claims submitted for the carrier on this lane during the period.']
  cost_per_shipment_usd decimal(18,2) [note: 'Average transportation cost incurred per shipment for the carrier on this lane.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Date‑time when the carrier performance row was initially loaded into the lakehouse.']
  damage_rate_ppm decimal(18,2) [note: 'Number of damaged units per one million units shipped during the period.']
  field_service_info varchar [note: 'Generic field service info placeholder']
  fuel_consumption_l_per_100km decimal(6,2) [note: 'Average liters of fuel used per 100 kilometers by the carrier on this lane.']
  lane_code varchar [note: 'Alphanumeric identifier for the transportation lane (e.g., "DET‑LAX").']
  lane_type varchar [note: 'Indicates whether the lane is domestic, export, or import.']
  notes varchar [note: 'Optional textual comments regarding carrier performance, exceptions, or observations for the period.']
  on_time_delivery_rate_pct decimal(18,2) [note: 'Percentage of shipments delivered within the agreed delivery window, calculated independently of OTD for cross‑validation.']
  otd_rate_pct decimal(18,2) [note: 'Percentage of shipments delivered on or before the committed delivery date for the period.']
  overall_rating varchar [note: 'Composite score (1‑5) summarizing carrier performance across all metrics.']
  performance_month date [note: 'Calendar month (first day) representing the reporting period for the carrier performance metrics.']
  total_claims varchar [note: 'Aggregate count of all claims (damage, loss, etc.) for the period.']
  total_damage_units varchar [note: 'Sum of individual units reported as damaged during the period.']
  total_distance_km decimal(12,2) [note: 'Total kilometers driven or sailed by the carrier for shipments on this lane in the period.']
  total_shipments varchar [note: 'Count of individual shipments moved by the carrier on the lane during the period.']
  transit_time_compliance_pct decimal(5,2) [note: 'Percentage of shipments that met the agreed‑upon transit‑time windows.']
  transport_mode varchar [note: 'Primary mode of transportation for the lane (e.g., truck, rail, vessel, intermodal, air).']
  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Date‑time of the latest modification to the carrier performance data.']

  Note: 'Periodic carrier performance scorecard capturing OTD rate, damage rate (PPM), transit time compliance, claim frequency, and overall carrier rating per lane and transport mode. Tracks performance against contracted SLAs, flags underperforming carriers, and supports carrier qualification reviews. Aggregated at carrier-lane-period level for logistics procurement decisions.'
}

Table logistics.vehicle_compound {
  vehicle_compound_id varchar [pk, note: 'Unique identifier for the vehicle compound (yard, port, or regional staging area).']
  plant_id varchar
  address_line1 varchar [note: 'Primary street address of the compound.']
  address_line2 varchar [note: 'Secondary address information (e.g., suite, building).']
  average_dwell_time_hours decimal(10,2) [note: 'Average vehicle dwell time in hours']
  capacity_units varchar [note: 'Maximum number of vehicles the compound can store.']
  city varchar [note: 'City where the compound is located.']
  compliance_certifications varchar [note: 'Comma‑separated list of certifications (e.g., ISO‑9001, IATF‑16949) held by the compound.']
  compound_code varchar [note: 'Unique business code used to reference the compound in operational systems.']
  compound_type varchar [note: 'Classification of the compound (e.g., plant yard, port yard, regional distribution center, dealer preparation site).']
  country_code varchar [note: 'Three‑letter ISO country code where the compound resides.']
  covered_slot_count varchar [note: 'Number of covered/indoor slots']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the compound record was first created in the system.']
  current_occupancy varchar [note: 'Current number of vehicles stored in the compound.']
  dangerous_goods_storage_flag boolean [note: 'Whether compound has dangerous goods storage capability']
  effective_from date [note: 'Date when the compound became operational.']
  effective_until date [note: 'Date when the compound is scheduled to cease operations (null if open‑ended).']
  ev_charging_slot_count varchar [note: 'Number of slots with EV charging capability']
  is_pdi_capable boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the compound can perform Pre‑Delivery Inspection (PDI) on vehicles.']
  last_inspection_date date [note: 'Date of the most recent safety or compliance inspection.']
  latitude decimal(9,6) [note: 'Geographic latitude of the compound (decimal degrees).']
  longitude decimal(9,6) [note: 'Geographic longitude of the compound (decimal degrees).']
  manager_email varchar [note: 'Contact email address for the compound operator/manager.']
  manager_phone varchar [note: 'Contact phone number for the compound operator/manager.']
  notes varchar [note: 'Free‑form notes or remarks about the compound.']
  occupied_slot_count varchar [note: 'Current number of occupied slots']
  operator_name varchar [note: 'Name of the person or organization responsible for day‑to‑day operations of the compound.']
  otd_target_percentage decimal(5,2) [note: 'Target percentage for on‑time delivery performance for shipments originating from this compound.']
  postal_code varchar [note: 'Postal/ZIP code of the compound.']
  region_code varchar [note: 'Internal code representing the broader geographic region (e.g., NA, EU, APAC).']
  returnable_packaging_staging_area_flag boolean [note: 'Whether compound has a returnable packaging staging area']
  security_level varchar [note: 'Security classification of the compound (low, medium, high).']
  state_province varchar [note: 'State or province of the compound location.']
  storage_area_sqft decimal(12,2) [note: 'Total floor area of the compound in square feet.']
  temperature_controlled boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the compound maintains temperature‑controlled storage.']
  total_slot_count varchar [note: 'Total number of parking slots in the compound']
  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp of the most recent update to the compound record.']
  vehicle_compound_name varchar [note: 'Human‑readable name of the storage compound.']
  vehicle_compound_status varchar [note: 'Current operational status of the compound.']
  waste_handling_capability boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the compound is equipped to handle hazardous waste.']
  yard_management_system varchar [note: 'Name of the yard management system in use']

  Note: 'Master record for vehicle storage compounds, yards, and staging areas used in the outbound logistics network (plant yards, rail yards, port compounds, regional distribution centers). Captures compound name, location, type (plant/port/regional/dealer prep), storage capacity (units), current occupancy, operator, PDI capability flag, and compound status. Enables compound capacity planning and in-transit inventory tracking.'
}

Table logistics.compound_movement {
  compound_movement_id varchar [pk, note: 'Surrogate primary key for the compound movement record.']
  carrier_id varchar [note: 'Unique identifier for the carrier.']
  compound_employee_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the employee who performed the movement.']
  compound_operator_employee_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the employee who performed the movement.']
  vehicle_compound_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to logistics.vehicle_compound. Business justification: Compound movements occur within a vehicle compound; adding vehicle_compound_id links movements to their compound.']
  actual_arrival_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Recorded arrival time at the destination zone.']
  compound_movement_status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle status of the movement.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the record was first created in the system.']
  delay_minutes varchar [note: 'Minutes of delay between ETA and actual arrival.']
  destination_zone varchar [note: 'Yard or bay where the vehicle is moved to.']
  estimated_arrival_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Expected arrival time at the destination zone.']
  field_service_info varchar [note: 'Generic field service info placeholder']
  from_slot_code varchar [note: 'Slot code the vehicle is moving from']
  is_ota_capable boolean [note: 'Indicates if the vehicle supports over‑the‑air updates.']
  load_quantity varchar [note: 'Number of units moved in this transaction (typically 1).']
  movement_reason varchar [note: 'Reason for the compound movement (optimization, dispatch, PDI, damage_repair)']
  movement_reference varchar [note: 'External reference number used by logistics to identify the movement transaction.']
  movement_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Date and time when the movement event occurred.']
  movement_type varchar [note: 'Indicates whether the vehicle is entering, leaving, or being transferred within the compound.']
  notes varchar [note: 'Free‑text field for additional remarks about the movement.']
  odometer_reading_km varchar [note: 'Vehicle odometer reading at movement time.']
  origin_zone varchar [note: 'Yard or bay where the vehicle originated.']
  priority_level varchar [note: 'Priority assigned to the movement for scheduling purposes.']
  temperature_c decimal(5,2) [note: 'Temperature in the yard at the time of movement.']
  to_slot_code varchar [note: 'Slot code the vehicle is moving to']
  transport_order_number varchar [note: 'Reference to the transport order governing the movement.']
  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp of the most recent update to the record.']
  vehicle_type varchar [note: 'Classification of the vehicle model.']
  vin varchar [note: 'Unique identifier of the vehicle being moved.']
  weight_kg decimal(10,2) [note: 'Weight of the vehicle at the time of movement.']

  Note: 'Transactional record of a vehicle\'s physical movement into, within, or out of a compound or yard. Captures VIN, movement type (inbound/outbound/internal transfer), origin bay/zone, destination bay/zone, movement timestamp, operator ID, and associated transport order. Provides granular yard management traceability and supports compound throughput analysis.'
}

Table logistics.in_transit_inventory {
  in_transit_inventory_id varchar [pk, note: 'Surrogate primary key for the in-transit inventory record.']
  carrier_id varchar [note: 'FK to logistics.carrier']
  connected_vehicle_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to mobility.connected_vehicle. Business justification: In‑transit inventory dashboard tracks connectivity; linking VIN to connected_vehicle enables real‑time OTA updates and status monitoring.']
  container_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the container or trailer used for transport.']
  cost_center_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to finance.cost_center. Business justification: In‑transit inventory holding costs are allocated to a cost center for cost of goods sold calculation.']
  customer_party_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to customer.party. Business justification: When vehicles are shipped directly to end‑customers, tracking the recipient party is required for delivery confirmation, warranty activation, and service scheduling.']
  in_dealer_dealership_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the dealer receiving the vehicle.']
  in_dealership_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the dealer receiving the vehicle.']
  production_order_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to manufacturing.production_order. Business justification: In‑transit inventory reports tie each in‑transit record to its originating production order for cost allocation and visibility.']
  shipment_id varchar [note: 'Unique business identifier for the vehicle shipment.']
  sku_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to product.sku. Business justification: In‑Transit Inventory Visibility report needs SKU to show vehicle configuration while in transit.']
  vehicle_order_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to sales.vehicle_order. Business justification: In‑transit inventory status is reported per sales order to provide customers with accurate ETA and inventory visibility.']
  vin_registry_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to vehicle.vin_registry. Business justification: Needed for Real‑Time In‑Transit Inventory report to associate each inventory record with the master VIN record for compliance and warranty tracking.']
  actual_arrival_date date [note: 'Date the vehicle actually arrived at the destination (if arrived).']
  carrier_scac varchar [note: 'Standard carrier code used for tracking and billing.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the in‑transit record was first created.']
  current_location varchar [note: 'Last known location of the vehicle while in transit.']
  customs_document_number varchar [note: 'Reference number for customs clearance documentation.']
  customs_status varchar [note: 'Current status of customs processing.']
  days_in_transit varchar [note: 'Number of calendar days the vehicle has been in transit.']
  delay_reason varchar [note: 'Free‑text explanation for any delay affecting the shipment.']
  destination_facility_code varchar [note: 'Code of the dealer or final destination facility.']
  emissions_kg_co2 decimal(10,2) [note: 'Estimated CO₂ emissions generated during transit.']
  estimated_arrival_date date [note: 'Planned date the vehicle is expected to arrive at the destination.']
  fuel_consumption_liters decimal(10,2) [note: 'Total fuel used during the transit leg.']
  hazardous_material_flag boolean [note: 'True if the shipment contains hazardous material.']
  hazardous_material_type varchar [note: 'Classification of hazardous material, if applicable.']
  last_update_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp of the most recent update to the record.']
  load_type varchar [note: 'Classification of how the vehicle is loaded.']
  notes varchar [note: 'Optional free‑form notes related to the in‑transit record.']
  odometer_end_km varchar [note: 'Vehicle odometer reading at the end of the shipment.']
  odometer_start_km varchar [note: 'Vehicle odometer reading at the start of the shipment.']
  origin_facility_code varchar [note: 'Code of the plant or facility where the vehicle originated.']
  seal_number varchar [note: 'Security seal identifier applied to the container or trailer.']
  shipment_leg_count varchar [note: 'Count of individual transport legs in the shipment itinerary.']
  temperature_control_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the shipment requires temperature control.']
  temperature_max_c decimal(5,2) [note: 'Maximum temperature setting for temperature‑controlled shipments.']
  temperature_min_c decimal(5,2) [note: 'Minimum temperature setting for temperature‑controlled shipments.']
  tracking_number varchar [note: 'Carrier‑provided tracking identifier for the shipment.']
  transit_status varchar [note: 'Current operational status of the shipment.']
  transport_cost_amount decimal(12,2) [note: 'Monetary cost incurred for transporting the vehicle.']
  transport_cost_currency varchar [note: 'Three‑letter ISO currency code for the transport cost.']
  transport_mode varchar [note: 'Mode of transportation used for the shipment.']
  volume_cubic_meters decimal(8,3) [note: 'Physical volume occupied by the vehicle or load.']
  weight_tons decimal(8,3) [note: 'Weight of the vehicle or load in metric tons.']

  Note: 'Real-time and point-in-time snapshot of finished vehicles currently in transit between plant and dealer, including vehicles on rail, truck, vessel, or staged at intermediate compounds. Captures VIN, current location (last known compound or leg), transport mode, origin, destination, estimated arrival date, days in transit, and transit status. Critical for dealer allocation visibility and OTD monitoring.'
}

Table logistics.port_processing {
  port_processing_id varchar [pk, note: 'Unique system-generated identifier for each port processing record.']
  carrier_id varchar [note: 'FK to logistics.carrier']
  compliance_document_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to compliance.compliance_document. Business justification: Connects port processing record to the inspection compliance document required for release authorization.']
  connected_vehicle_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to mobility.connected_vehicle. Business justification: Port processing report must link each processed VIN to its connected vehicle record for OTA activation and compliance tracking.']
  equipment_registry_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to asset.equipment_registry. Business justification: Port Processing compliance report ties each vehicle VIN to its equipment record for import/export regulatory tracking.']
  inspector_employee_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to workforce.employee. Business justification: Port processing logs require the employee who performed the inspection for compliance and traceability.']
  shipment_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to logistics.shipment. Business justification: Port processing activities are tied to a specific shipment; adding shipment_id creates the required parent‑child relationship.']
  vin_registry_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to vehicle.vin_registry. Business justification: Supports Port Processing Inspection report linking each processed vehicle to its VIN master record for homologation and customs verification.']
  actual_arrival_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Recorded timestamp when the vessel actually arrived.']
  actual_departure_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Recorded timestamp when the vessel actually departed.']
  arrival_date date [note: 'Scheduled or actual date the vessel arrived at the port.']
  carrier_scac_code varchar [note: 'Standard Carrier Alpha Code identifying the carrier.']
  compliance_regulation_code varchar [note: 'Code of the specific UNECE or other regulation applicable to the shipment.']
  compliance_status varchar [note: 'Overall compliance status of the shipment with applicable regulations.']
  container_code varchar [note: 'Identifier of the shipping container if the vehicle is containerized.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the port processing record was first created in the system.']
  customs_clearance_status varchar [note: 'Current status of customs clearance for the shipment.']
  customs_document_number varchar [note: 'Reference number of the customs filing associated with the shipment.']
  customs_document_type varchar [note: 'Type of customs document submitted for the shipment.']
  departure_date date [note: 'Scheduled or actual date the vessel departed from the port.']
  estimated_arrival_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Planned timestamp for vessel arrival at the port.']
  estimated_departure_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Planned timestamp for vessel departure from the port.']
  export_import_indicator varchar [note: 'Specifies whether the processing event relates to an export or import shipment.']
  freight_cost_amount decimal(12,2) [note: 'Monetary cost of freight associated with the shipment.']
  freight_cost_currency varchar [note: 'Three‑letter ISO 4217 currency code for freight cost.']
  homologation_inspection_status varchar [note: 'Result of regulatory homologation inspection at the port.']
  inspection_date date [note: 'Date when the port inspection was performed.']
  inspection_report_number varchar [note: 'Identifier of the inspection report generated at the port.']
  model_year varchar [note: 'Model year of the vehicle.']
  notes varchar [note: 'Free‑form text field for additional remarks or observations.']
  pdi_completion_status varchar [note: 'Status of the pre‑delivery inspection performed at the port.']
  port_charges_amount decimal(12,2) [note: 'Total monetary amount of port fees and charges assessed.']
  port_charges_currency varchar [note: 'Three‑letter ISO 4217 currency code for port charges.']
  port_facility_code varchar [note: 'Standard code identifying the port facility where processing occurs.']
  port_facility_name varchar [note: 'Human‑readable name of the port facility.']
  port_processing_status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle status of the port processing activity.']
  processing_reference varchar [note: 'Business reference code assigned to the port processing event for tracking and communication.']
  processing_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp of the primary business event when the processing activity was recorded.']
  release_authorization_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the vehicle has been authorized for release from the port.']
  release_authorization_number varchar [note: 'Reference number for the release authorization document.']
  seal_number varchar [note: 'Security seal number applied to the container or trailer.']
  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp of the most recent update to the port processing record.']
  vehicle_type varchar [note: 'Category of the vehicle based on body style and powertrain. [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: car|truck|suv|commercial|ev|hev|phev|ice — 8 candidates stripped; promote to reference product]']
  vessel_name varchar [note: 'Name of the vessel carrying the vehicles.']
  voyage_number varchar [note: 'Identifier for the specific voyage of the vessel.']

  Note: 'Record of port-of-entry or port-of-exit processing activities for finished vehicles in export/import operations. Captures port facility, vessel name, voyage number, arrival/departure dates, customs clearance status, homologation inspection status, PDI completion, port charges, and release authorization. Supports global distribution and import compliance tracking per UNECE and local customs regulations.'
}

Table logistics.vessel_voyage {
  vessel_voyage_id varchar [pk, note: 'System-generated unique identifier for the vessel voyage record.']
  captain_employee_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to workforce.employee. Business justification: Voyage management tracks the captain (employee) assigned to each vessel voyage for safety and regulatory reporting.']
  carrier_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to logistics.carrier. Business justification: Vessel voyages are operated by carriers (including ocean shipping lines); adding carrier_id connects voyages to carriers.']
  shipping_line_id varchar [note: 'Unique identifier of the shipping line operating the vessel.']
  actual_arrival_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Real‑time date and time when the vessel arrived at the destination port.']
  actual_departure_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Real‑time date and time when the vessel left the origin port.']
  available_capacity_units varchar [note: 'Remaining vehicle capacity after bookings (capacity minus booked units).']
  booked_units varchar [note: 'Number of vehicle units already booked for the voyage.']
  cost_amount decimal(15,2) [note: 'Total cost incurred for the voyage (e.g., charter fee, fuel surcharge).']
  cost_currency varchar [note: 'Three‑letter ISO 4217 currency code for the cost amount.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the voyage record was first created in the system.']
  destination_port_code varchar [note: 'Three‑letter UN/LOCODE of the port where the voyage terminates.']
  imo_number varchar [note: 'Seven‑digit unique identifier for the vessel as defined by IMO conventions.']
  origin_port_code varchar [note: 'Three‑letter UN/LOCODE of the port where the voyage originates.']
  planned_arrival_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Scheduled date and time for vessel arrival at the destination port.']
  planned_departure_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Scheduled date and time for vessel departure from the origin port.']
  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp of the most recent update to the voyage record.']
  vessel_capacity_units varchar [note: 'Maximum number of vehicles the vessel can transport on this voyage.']
  vessel_name varchar [note: 'Human‑readable name of the vessel used for the voyage.']
  voyage_number varchar [note: 'External reference number assigned to the voyage by the shipping line.']
  voyage_status varchar [note: 'Current operational status of the voyage.']
  voyage_status_reason varchar [note: 'Free‑text explanation for the current voyage status, e.g., weather delay, mechanical issue.']
  voyage_type varchar [note: 'Category of vessel operation, such as Roll‑On/Roll‑Off (RoRo) or container.']

  Note: 'Master record for ocean vessel voyages used in finished vehicle export/import logistics. Captures vessel name, IMO number, voyage number, shipping line, origin port, destination port, planned and actual departure/arrival dates, vehicle capacity (units), booked units, and voyage status. Enables RoRo vessel capacity planning and export shipment scheduling.'
}

Table logistics.rail_car_assignment {
  rail_car_assignment_id varchar [pk, note: 'Unique identifier for each rail car assignment record.']
  operator_employee_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to workforce.employee. Business justification: Rail car assignments are executed by a specific operator employee; needed for labor tracking and incident analysis.']
  vehicle_transport_order_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the parent rail transport order to which this assignment belongs.']
  assignment_status varchar [note: 'High‑level status indicating whether the rail car assignment is active, completed, or cancelled.']
  capacity_utilization_pct decimal(5,2) [note: 'Percentage of the rail car\'s capacity that is utilized by the current load.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Date‑time when the assignment record was first created in the system.']
  critical_flag boolean [note: 'True if the assignment is considered critical for meeting OTD (On‑Time Delivery) commitments.']
  destination_yard_code varchar [note: 'Standard code identifying the rail yard where unloading will occur.']
  destination_yard_name varchar [note: 'Descriptive name of the destination rail yard.']
  load_volume_cubic_meters decimal(12,3) [note: 'Combined cargo volume of the loaded vehicles, measured in cubic meters.']
  load_weight_kg decimal(12,2) [note: 'Aggregate weight of all vehicles loaded onto the rail car, expressed in kilograms.']
  loading_date date [note: 'Scheduled calendar date when the rail car is loaded with vehicles.']
  loading_sequence varchar [note: 'Ordinal position of this assignment in the loading plan.']
  loading_status varchar [note: 'Operational status of the loading process for this assignment.']
  notes varchar [note: 'Additional comments, exceptions, or handling instructions related to the assignment.']
  occupied_capacity_tons decimal(12,2) [note: 'Weight of the loaded vehicles expressed as a portion of the rail car\'s total capacity.']
  origin_yard_code varchar [note: 'Standard code identifying the rail yard where loading begins.']
  origin_yard_name varchar [note: 'Descriptive name of the origin rail yard.']
  rail_car_capacity_tons decimal(12,2) [note: 'Design‑specified maximum payload capacity of the rail car, in metric tons.']
  rail_car_number varchar [note: 'Unique number painted on the rail car (autorack) used for this assignment.']
  rail_car_type varchar [note: 'Classification of the rail car based on its design and loading capability.']
  unloading_date date [note: 'Scheduled calendar date when the rail car is unloaded at the destination.']
  unloading_status varchar [note: 'Operational status of the unloading process for this assignment.']
  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Date‑time of the most recent modification to the assignment record.']
  vin_count varchar [note: 'Number of vehicles (VINs) loaded onto the rail car.']
  vin_list varchar [note: 'Comma‑separated list of Vehicle Identification Numbers (VINs) assigned to this rail car.']

  Note: 'Assignment record linking specific VINs to rail cars within a rail transport order. Captures rail car number, rail car type (autorack), VIN list, loading sequence, origin rail yard, destination rail yard, loading date, and unloading date. Supports rail capacity utilization tracking and VIN-level rail traceability for finished vehicle rail logistics.'
}

Table logistics.ckd_kit_shipment {
  ckd_kit_shipment_id varchar [pk, note: 'System generated unique identifier for the CKD kit shipment record.']
  carrier_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the logistics carrier handling the shipment.']
  destination_plant_id varchar [note: 'FK to manufacturing.plant']
  origin_plant_id varchar [note: 'FK to manufacturing.plant']
  shipment_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to logistics.shipment. Business justification: CKD/SKD kit shipments are a type of outbound shipment; linking to shipment consolidates tracking and cost reporting.']
  actual_arrival_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Real‑time timestamp when the shipment arrived at the destination plant.']
  actual_departure_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Real‑time timestamp when the shipment left the origin plant.']
  bom_reference varchar [note: 'Reference to the BOM that defines the components of the kit.']
  compliance_status varchar [note: 'Regulatory compliance status of the shipment.']
  container_number varchar [note: 'Unique container identifier used for the shipment.']
  container_type varchar [note: 'Classification of the container based on its design.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the shipment record was first created in the system.']
  currency_code varchar [note: 'ISO 4217 currency code for monetary amounts.']
  customs_invoice_currency varchar [note: 'ISO 4217 currency code of the customs invoice value.']
  customs_invoice_value decimal(18,2) [note: 'Declared monetary value of the shipment for customs purposes.']
  delay_reason varchar [note: 'Free‑text explanation for any delay affecting the shipment.']
  discount_amount decimal(18,2) [note: 'Total discount applied to the freight cost.']
  export_license_number varchar [note: 'Reference number of the export license authorizing the shipment.']
  field_service_info varchar [note: 'Generic field service info placeholder']
  freight_cost decimal(18,2) [note: 'Base freight charge for the shipment before discounts or taxes.']
  hazardous_material_flag boolean [note: 'True if the shipment contains hazardous materials.']
  hazardous_material_type varchar [note: 'Classification of hazardous material (e.g., flammable, toxic).']
  hs_code varchar [note: 'International tariff code for the kit contents.']
  incoterms_code varchar [note: 'Incoterms rule governing responsibility and cost allocation. [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: EXW|FCA|FOB|CFR|CIF|DAP|DDP — promote to reference product]']
  kit_part_number varchar [note: 'Part number that uniquely identifies the CKD/SKD kit configuration.']
  kit_quantity_per_container varchar [note: 'Number of kits packed in each container.']
  net_cost decimal(18,2) [note: 'Net freight cost after discounts (freight_cost - discount_amount).']
  notes varchar [note: 'Free‑form field for additional remarks or special instructions.']
  number_of_kits varchar [note: 'Count of CKD/SKD kits included in the shipment.']
  otd_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the shipment arrived within the agreed delivery window.']
  packing_list_reference varchar [note: 'Reference to the packing list document for the kit.']
  planned_arrival_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Scheduled date and time for shipment arrival at the destination plant.']
  planned_departure_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Scheduled date and time for shipment departure from the origin plant.']
  seal_number varchar [note: 'Security seal identifier applied to the container.']
  shipment_status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle status of the shipment.']
  temperature_control_required boolean [note: 'Indicates whether temperature control is required for the shipment.']
  temperature_max_c decimal(5,2) [note: 'Maximum temperature to be maintained inside the container.']
  temperature_min_c decimal(5,2) [note: 'Minimum temperature to be maintained inside the container.']
  tracking_number varchar [note: 'External tracking identifier provided by the carrier.']
  transport_mode varchar [note: 'Mode of transportation used for the shipment.']
  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp of the most recent update to the shipment record.']
  volume_cubic_meters decimal(12,3) [note: 'Total cargo volume of the shipment.']
  weight_kg decimal(12,3) [note: 'Total weight of the shipment in kilograms.']

  Note: 'Shipment record for CKD (Completely Knocked Down) and SKD (Semi Knocked Down) kit consignments dispatched from source plants to assembly plants in global markets. Captures kit part number, BOM reference, origin plant, destination assembly plant, packing list, container numbers, customs invoice value, HS codes, export license reference, and shipment status. Supports CKD/SKD global distribution and import duty management.'
}

Table logistics.transport_damage_claim {
  transport_damage_claim_id varchar [pk, note: 'System generated unique identifier for each transport damage claim record.']
  carrier_id varchar [note: 'Unique identifier of the carrier responsible for the transport.']
  claim_party_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to customer.party. Business justification: Damage claims are filed by the vehicle owner; linking claim to the owning party enables claim processing, financial reporting, and warranty tracking.']
  connected_vehicle_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to mobility.connected_vehicle. Business justification: Damage claim processing needs the specific connected vehicle to pull diagnostic logs for root‑cause analysis.']
  cost_center_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to finance.cost_center. Business justification: Damage claim expenses are charged to the responsible cost center for expense tracking.']
  employee_id varchar [note: 'Unique identifier of the adjuster handling the claim.']
  gl_account_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to finance.gl_account. Business justification: Claims are posted to a specific GL account for transportation damage expense reporting.']
  regulatory_requirement_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to compliance.regulatory_requirement. Business justification: Links damage claim to specific regulatory requirement governing liability, used in Regulatory Damage Claim Reporting.']
  shipment_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to logistics.shipment. Business justification: Damage claims are filed per shipment; linking to shipment enables claim‑to‑shipment reconciliation and root‑cause analysis.']
  sku_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to product.sku. Business justification: Damage claim analysis requires SKU to assess warranty and cost impact per vehicle configuration.']
  vehicle_order_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to sales.vehicle_order. Business justification: Damage claims are processed against the specific sales order to adjust revenue, warranty, and customer compensation.']
  actual_repair_cost decimal(12,2) [note: 'Final cost incurred to repair the vehicle after claim settlement.']
  claim_adjuster_code varchar [note: 'Unique identifier of the adjuster handling the claim.']
  claim_adjuster_contact varchar [note: 'Phone number of the claim adjuster.']
  claim_adjuster_name varchar [note: 'Full name of the claim adjuster.']
  claim_created_by varchar [note: 'User identifier of the employee who created the claim record.']
  claim_currency_code varchar [note: 'Three‑letter ISO currency code for the claim amounts.']
  claim_document_url varchar [note: 'Link to supporting documentation (photos, reports).']
  claim_notes varchar [note: 'Additional free‑form notes entered by claim handlers.']
  claim_number varchar [note: 'External business identifier assigned to the claim, used in communications with carriers and insurers.']
  claim_policy_number varchar [note: 'Policy number of the insurance covering the transport.']
  claim_ppm_rate decimal(5,2) [note: 'Parts‑per‑million defect rate associated with the carrier for this claim.']
  claim_priority varchar [note: 'Priority level assigned to the claim for processing.']
  claim_resolution_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Date‑time when the claim reached a final resolution (settled, rejected, or closed).']
  claim_settlement_method varchar [note: 'Method used to settle the claim with the carrier.']
  claim_settlement_reference varchar [note: 'Reference number or code for the settlement transaction.']
  claim_source varchar [note: 'Origin of the claim submission.']
  claim_status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle status of the claim.']
  claim_submission_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Date‑time when the claim was initially filed.']
  claim_type varchar [note: 'Category of claim based on cause of damage.']
  claim_updated_by varchar [note: 'User identifier of the employee who last updated the claim record.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'System timestamp when the claim record was created.']
  damage_category varchar [note: 'Classification of damage type for reporting and analytics.']
  damage_description varchar [note: 'Narrative description of the damage observed on the vehicle during transport.']
  damage_location varchar [note: 'Specific area of the vehicle where damage occurred (e.g., front bumper, left door).']
  damage_severity varchar [note: 'Severity rating of the damage based on repair impact.']
  estimated_repair_cost decimal(12,2) [note: 'Initial cost estimate for repairing the reported damage.']
  insurance_claim_number varchar [note: 'Identifier assigned by the insurer for the related claim.']
  is_fraud_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the claim is suspected of fraud.']
  otd_impact_flag boolean [note: 'True if the damage caused a missed on‑time delivery commitment.']
  repair_estimate_source varchar [note: 'Source of the repair cost estimate.']
  settlement_amount decimal(12,2) [note: 'Final amount paid to the claimant after claim approval.']
  settlement_currency_code varchar [note: 'ISO currency code for the settlement amount.']
  settlement_date date [note: 'Date on which the settlement payment was made.']
  transport_mode varchar [note: 'Mode of transportation used for the shipment (e.g., truck, rail).']
  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'System timestamp of the most recent modification to the claim record.']

  Note: 'Record of vehicle damage claims raised against carriers for damage occurring during transport. Captures VIN, damage description, damage location on vehicle, estimated repair cost, carrier responsible, claim submission date, claim status, settlement amount, and resolution date. Supports carrier liability management, insurance recovery, and damage PPM tracking per carrier and transport mode.'
}

Table logistics.freight_invoice {
  freight_invoice_id varchar [pk, note: 'System-generated unique identifier for the freight invoice record.']
  aftersales_warranty_claim_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to aftersales.warranty_claim. Business justification: Business need: Freight invoices are associated with warranty claims for cost recovery and audit trails.']
  billing_party_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to customer.party. Business justification: Freight invoices are billed to the end‑customer; associating each invoice with the customer party supports financial reconciliation and compliance reporting.']
  carrier_id varchar [note: 'Unique identifier of the carrier that provided the transport service.']
  shipment_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to logistics.shipment. Business justification: Freight invoicing ties each invoice to the specific shipment for cost allocation and audit.']
  vehicle_order_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to sales.vehicle_order. Business justification: Freight invoicing is linked to the sales order for full cost‑to‑serve accounting and profitability analysis.']
  agreed_rate decimal(18,2) [note: 'Contracted rate per unit (e.g., per kilometer or per container) agreed with the carrier.']
  approval_status varchar [note: 'Workflow status of the invoice approval process.']
  approved_by varchar [note: 'Identifier of the employee who approved the invoice.']
  approved_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the invoice was approved.']
  attachment_flag boolean [note: 'True if supporting documents (e.g., PDF invoice) are attached to the record.']
  cost_center_code decimal(18,2) [note: 'Internal cost‑center identifier to which the freight cost is charged.']
  cost_type decimal(18,2) [note: 'Classification of the cost element represented by the invoice.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the freight invoice record was first created in the system.']
  currency_code varchar [note: 'Three‑letter ISO currency code of the invoice amount.']
  discount_amount decimal(18,2) [note: 'Any discount applied to the gross invoiced amount.']
  exchange_rate decimal(18,2) [note: 'Currency conversion rate applied if invoice currency differs from reporting currency.']
  exchange_rate_date decimal(18,2) [note: 'Date for which the exchange rate was valid.']
  field_service_info varchar [note: 'Generic field service info placeholder']
  freight_invoice_status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle state of the freight invoice.']
  incoterms_code varchar [note: 'International commercial term governing responsibility and cost allocation. [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: EXW|FCA|CPT|CIP|DAT|DAP|DDP — 7 candidates stripped; promote to reference product]']
  invoice_date date [note: 'Date and time when the carrier issued the freight invoice.']
  invoice_number varchar [note: 'External invoice number assigned by the carrier or logistics provider.']
  invoiced_amount decimal(18,2) [note: 'Total amount billed by the carrier before discounts, taxes, or adjustments.']
  lane_code varchar [note: 'Code representing the origin‑to‑destination lane for the shipment.']
  net_amount decimal(18,2) [note: 'Final amount payable after discounts and taxes.']
  number_of_units varchar [note: 'Count of individual units (vehicles, kits, parts) covered by the invoice.']
  otd_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the shipment met the agreed on‑time delivery commitment.']
  payment_date date [note: 'Date on which the invoice was actually paid.']
  payment_due_date date [note: 'Date by which the invoice must be paid according to contract terms.']
  payment_status varchar [note: 'Current payment processing status of the invoice.']
  remarks varchar [note: 'Free‑form text for additional comments or notes about the invoice.']
  tax_amount decimal(18,2) [note: 'Tax component included in the invoice, if applicable.']
  transport_mode varchar [note: 'Mode of transportation used for the shipment (e.g., road, rail, sea, air, intermodal).']
  transport_order_number varchar [note: 'Reference number of the transport order linked to this invoice.']
  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp of the most recent modification to the freight invoice record.']
  variance_amount decimal(18,2) [note: 'Difference between the invoiced amount and the agreed rate‑based amount.']
  volume_cbm decimal(10,3) [note: 'Total cubic meter volume of the shipment.']
  weight_kg decimal(10,2) [note: 'Total weight of the shipment associated with the invoice, expressed in kilograms.']

  Note: 'Carrier freight invoice received for transport services rendered on finished vehicle or CKD/SKD shipments. Captures invoice number, carrier, invoice date, transport order references, lane, transport mode, invoiced amount, currency, agreed rate, variance amount, approval status, and payment reference. Supports freight cost management, carrier invoice verification against contracted rates, and logistics cost accounting.'
}

Table logistics.transport_rate {
  transport_rate_id varchar [pk, note: 'System-generated unique identifier for the transport rate record.']
  carrier_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to logistics.carrier. Business justification: Transport rates are defined per carrier; adding carrier_id creates the necessary relationship.']
  created_by_employee_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to workforce.employee. Business justification: Rate creation is performed by a rate analyst employee; linking supports audit of rate changes.']
  logistics_lane_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to logistics.lane. Business justification: Rates are also specific to a logistics lane; adding logistics_lane_id links rates to lanes and resolves lane\'s silo.']
  accessorial_charges decimal(12,4) [note: 'Additional fixed charges (e.g., lift‑gate, detention) associated with the lane.']
  compliance_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the rate complies with applicable transport regulations (e.g., IATF, EPA).']
  container_type varchar [note: 'Type of container used for the shipment, if applicable.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the rate record was first created.']
  currency_code varchar [note: 'Three‑letter ISO currency code for the rate amount.']
  destination_location_code varchar [note: 'Code of the destination dealer or distribution center.']
  effective_from date [note: 'Date when the transport rate becomes valid.']
  effective_until date [note: 'Date when the transport rate expires (null if open‑ended).']
  fuel_surcharge_percent decimal(5,2) [note: 'Percentage surcharge applied to the base rate to cover fuel price volatility.']
  notes varchar [note: 'Free‑form comments or special conditions related to the rate.']
  origin_location_code varchar [note: 'Code of the origin plant or warehouse where the shipment starts.']
  rate_amount decimal(12,4) [note: 'Base monetary amount agreed for the lane before surcharges.']
  rate_code varchar [note: 'Business identifier code for the transport rate contract.']
  rate_source_system varchar [note: 'Source system where the rate originated.']
  rate_version varchar [note: 'Incremental version number for the rate record to track revisions.']
  transport_mode varchar [note: 'Mode of transportation for the lane (e.g., road, rail, sea, air).']
  transport_rate_status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle status of the rate contract.']
  unit_of_measure varchar [note: 'Measurement unit that the rate amount applies to.']
  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp of the most recent update to the rate record.']
  vehicle_type varchar [note: 'Classification of vehicle type applicable to the rate.']
  volume_capacity_cubic_meters decimal(10,2) [note: 'Maximum volume that can be transported under this rate.']
  weight_capacity_tons decimal(8,2) [note: 'Maximum weight that can be transported under this rate.']

  Note: 'Contracted transport rate master for carrier lanes, defining the agreed cost per unit (vehicle or container) by origin-destination pair, transport mode, vehicle type/size class, and effective date range. Captures base rate, fuel surcharge structure, accessorial charges, currency, and rate validity period. Used for freight cost estimation, invoice verification, and logistics cost planning.'
}

Table logistics.lane {
  lane_id varchar [pk, note: 'Primary key']
  cost_center_id varchar
  destination_vehicle_compound_id varchar [note: 'FK to destination compound']
  origin_plant_id varchar [note: 'FK to origin plant']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Record creation timestamp']
  destination_country_code varchar
  destination_location varchar [note: 'Destination location']
  destination_location_code varchar
  distance_km decimal(10,2) [note: 'Distance in km']
  export_import_flag boolean
  is_active boolean [note: 'Active flag']
  lane_code varchar [note: 'Lane code']
  lane_name varchar [note: 'Lane name']
  lane_status varchar
  lane_type varchar
  origin_country_code varchar
  origin_location varchar [note: 'Origin location']
  origin_location_code varchar
  standard_transit_days varchar
  transit_time_days varchar [note: 'Transit time in days']
  transport_mode varchar [note: 'Transport mode']
  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Last update timestamp']

  Note: 'Master record defining a logistics lane as an origin-destination pair for finished vehicle or CKD/SKD transport. Captures origin facility (plant/compound/port), destination facility (dealer/compound/port), transport mode, distance, standard transit time, lane status, and assigned primary/backup carriers. Serves as the reference for route planning, rate assignment, and OTD benchmarking.'
}

Table logistics.logistics_pdi_inspection {
  logistics_pdi_inspection_id varchar [pk, note: 'Primary key']
  inspector_employee_id varchar
  logistics_delivery_schedule_id varchar
  vehicle_compound_id varchar [note: 'FK to vehicle compound']
  vin_registry_id varchar [note: 'FK to VIN registry']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Record creation timestamp']
  damage_description varchar [note: 'Damage description']
  damage_found_flag boolean [note: 'Whether damage was found']
  defect_count varchar
  inspection_date date [note: 'Inspection date']
  inspection_number varchar [note: 'PDI inspection number']
  inspection_result varchar [note: 'Inspection result']
  inspection_status varchar
  inspector_name varchar [note: 'Inspector name']
  notes varchar
  rework_required_flag boolean
  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Last update timestamp']

  Note: 'Pre-Delivery Inspection (PDI) record for finished vehicles conducted at compound or dealer prior to customer handover. Captures VIN, inspection date, inspection location (compound/dealer), inspector ID, checklist completion status, defects found, defect severity, rectification actions, and PDI pass/fail outcome. Ensures vehicle quality at point of delivery and supports warranty baseline establishment. SUPERSEDED: Use quality.quality_pdi_inspection as the single source of truth.'
}

Table logistics.export_declaration {
  export_declaration_id varchar [pk, note: 'System-generated unique identifier for the export declaration record.']
  carrier_id varchar [note: 'FK to logistics.carrier']
  cost_center_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to finance.cost_center. Business justification: Export processing costs are charged to a cost center for compliance and cost recovery.']
  exporter_plant_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the manufacturing plant exporting the goods.']
  regulatory_requirement_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to compliance.regulatory_requirement. Business justification: Ensures each export declaration references the applicable regulatory requirement for audit and customs compliance.']
  shipment_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to logistics.shipment. Business justification: Export declaration must be linked to the shipment for customs compliance tracking.']
  clearance_status varchar [note: 'Current status of customs clearance for the declaration.']
  clearance_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Date and time when customs cleared the export declaration.']
  compliance_notes varchar [note: 'Free‑form text for any additional regulatory or compliance remarks.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the export declaration record was first created in the system.']
  customs_authority_reference varchar [note: 'Identifier assigned by the customs authority for tracking the declaration.']
  declaration_number varchar [note: 'External reference number assigned by the exporting organization for this declaration.']
  declared_value_amount decimal(18,2) [note: 'Total monetary value declared for customs purposes, before duties and taxes.']
  declared_value_currency decimal(18,2) [note: 'Three‑letter ISO 4217 currency code of the declared value.']
  destination_country_code varchar [note: 'ISO 3166‑1 alpha‑3 code of the country receiving the shipment.']
  duty_amount decimal(18,2) [note: 'Duty payable to customs based on the declared value and HS code.']
  export_declaration_status varchar [note: 'Current processing state of the export declaration.']
  export_license_number varchar [note: 'Reference number of the export license authorizing the shipment.']
  export_type varchar [note: 'Category of goods being exported (complete vehicle, CKD kit, SKD kit, or parts).']
  field_service_info varchar [note: 'Generic field service info placeholder']
  hazardous_material_type varchar [note: 'Specific classification of hazardous material, if applicable.']
  hs_code varchar [note: 'Customs tariff classification code for the exported goods.']
  incoterms_code varchar [note: 'International commercial term governing responsibility and cost allocation. [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: EXW|FCA|CPT|CIP|DAT|DAP|DDP — 7 candidates stripped; promote to reference product]']
  is_hazardous boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the shipment contains hazardous materials.']
  net_value_amount decimal(18,2) [note: 'Declared value after deducting duties and any applicable taxes.']
  otd_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the shipment met the promised delivery schedule.']
  quantity varchar [note: 'Total number of individual items or units exported.']
  submission_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Date and time when the export declaration was submitted to customs.']
  temperature_control_required boolean [note: 'Flag indicating whether temperature‑controlled transport is required.']
  temperature_max_c decimal(5,2) [note: 'Maximum temperature in Celsius allowed for the shipment.']
  temperature_min_c decimal(5,2) [note: 'Minimum temperature in Celsius required for the shipment.']
  transport_mode varchar [note: 'Primary mode of transportation used for the export shipment.']
  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp of the most recent modification to the export declaration record.']
  vin_list varchar [note: 'Comma‑separated list of VINs included in the export shipment.']
  volume_cbm decimal(12,3) [note: 'Total cargo volume in cubic meters.']
  weight_kg decimal(12,3) [note: 'Aggregate gross weight of the exported goods in kilograms.']

  Note: 'Customs export declaration record for finished vehicles and CKD/SKD kits shipped to international markets. Captures declaration number, exporting plant, destination country, HS codes, declared value, currency, export license number, customs authority reference, submission date, clearance date, and declaration status. Supports regulatory compliance with DOT, UNECE, and local customs authorities for global distribution.'
}

Table logistics.import_declaration {
  import_declaration_id varchar [pk, note: 'Unique surrogate key for the import declaration record.']
  company_code_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the legal entity importing the goods.']
  cost_center_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to finance.cost_center. Business justification: Import clearance expenses are allocated to a cost center for landed cost accounting.']
  party_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the legal entity importing the goods.']
  regulatory_requirement_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to compliance.regulatory_requirement. Business justification: Associates import declaration with the governing regulatory requirement for compliance verification.']
  shipment_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to logistics.shipment. Business justification: Import declaration ties inbound shipments to customs records for regulatory reporting.']
  arrival_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the shipment arrived at the port of entry.']
  carrier_name varchar [note: 'Name of the logistics carrier handling the shipment.']
  clearance_date date [note: 'Date of customs clearance (date component).']
  clearance_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Date and time when customs clearance was granted.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the import declaration record was first created in the system.']
  currency_code varchar [note: 'Three‑letter ISO 4217 currency code for monetary values.']
  customs_authority varchar [note: 'Name of the customs agency that processed the declaration.']
  customs_document_number varchar [note: 'Reference number of the supporting customs documentation.']
  customs_value_amount decimal(18,2) [note: 'Declared customs value of the imported goods.']
  declaration_number varchar [note: 'Official customs declaration number assigned by the customs authority.']
  departure_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the shipment left the port of exit.']
  duty_amount decimal(18,2) [note: 'Duty amount payable for the import declaration.']
  duty_rate_percent decimal(18,2) [note: 'Applicable duty rate expressed as a percentage.']
  exchange_rate_date decimal(18,2) [note: 'Date on which the exchange rate was applied.']
  exchange_rate_to_usd decimal(18,2) [note: 'Currency exchange rate to US dollars used for conversion.']
  field_service_info varchar [note: 'Generic field service info placeholder']
  freight_cost decimal(18,2) [note: 'Cost of freight transportation for the shipment.']
  homologation_status varchar [note: 'Status of vehicle homologation approval for the destination market.']
  hs_code varchar [note: 'International tariff classification code for the goods.']
  hs_code_description varchar [note: 'Textual description of the HS tariff classification.']
  import_cost_total decimal(18,2) [note: 'Sum of customs value, duty, freight, and insurance costs.']
  import_declaration_status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle status of the import declaration.']
  import_duty_paid_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the customs duty has been fully paid.']
  import_duty_payment_date date [note: 'Date on which the customs duty was paid.']
  import_duty_payment_method varchar [note: 'Method used to settle the customs duty.']
  import_license_expiry_date date [note: 'Expiration date of the import license.']
  import_license_issue_date date [note: 'Date when the import license was issued.']
  import_license_number varchar [note: 'Reference number of the import license authorizing the shipment.']
  import_license_valid boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the import license is currently valid.']
  import_type varchar [note: 'Classification of the imported item (finished vehicle, CKD kit, or SKD kit).']
  insurance_cost decimal(18,2) [note: 'Insurance premium paid for the shipment.']
  model_code varchar [note: 'Manufacturer\'s model code for the imported vehicle or kit.']
  model_year varchar [note: 'Model year of the vehicle or kit being imported.']
  origin_country_code varchar [note: 'Country of origin of the imported goods.']
  port_of_entry varchar [note: 'Customs port where the goods entered the destination market.']
  port_of_exit varchar [note: 'Port from which the goods departed the origin country.']
  regulatory_compliance_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the import complies with all applicable regulations.']
  remarks varchar [note: 'Free‑form comments or notes related to the declaration.']
  submission_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Date and time when the declaration was submitted to customs.']
  total_landed_cost decimal(18,2) [note: 'Aggregate cost including customs value, duty, freight, and insurance.']
  transport_mode varchar [note: 'Primary mode of transport used for the shipment.']
  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp of the most recent update to the import declaration record.']
  vehicle_vin varchar [note: 'VIN of the imported vehicle, if applicable.']
  version varchar [note: 'Version number for the declaration record to support revisions.']

  Note: 'Customs import declaration record for finished vehicles and CKD/SKD kits received at destination markets. Captures declaration number, importing entity, origin country, HS codes, customs value, duty rate, duty amount paid, import license reference, customs authority reference, submission date, clearance date, and declaration status.
