  promotion_updated_by_user_employee_id varchar [note: 'User identifier of the person who last modified the promotion record.']
  applicable_geographies varchar [note: 'Geographic regions (country codes) where the promotion is valid.']
  applicable_vehicle_models varchar [note: 'Comma‑separated list of vehicle models eligible for the promotion.']
  budget_amount decimal(15,2) [note: 'Total monetary budget allocated for the promotion.']
  channel varchar [note: 'Primary distribution channel through which the promotion is offered.']
  cltv_impact_estimate decimal(12,2) [note: 'Estimated change in Customer Lifetime Value attributable to the promotion.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the promotion record was first created in the system.']
  currency_code varchar [note: 'Three‑letter ISO 4217 currency code for monetary values associated with the promotion.']
  customer_segment varchar [note: 'Business segment classification for the promotion\'s target customers.']
  discount_type varchar [note: 'Indicates whether the discount_value is a percentage of the transaction amount or a fixed monetary amount.']
  discount_value decimal(12,2) [note: 'Numeric value of the discount offered; interpretation depends on discount_type (percentage or fixed amount).']
  eligibility_criteria varchar [note: 'Business rules that define which transactions or customers qualify for the promotion.']
  end_date date [note: 'Date after which the promotion is no longer valid.']
  is_exclusive boolean [note: 'True if the promotion cannot be combined with other promotions.']
  loyalty_program_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the promotion is part of a loyalty program.']
  max_discount_amount decimal(12,2) [note: 'Upper limit on the discount value that can be applied per transaction.']
  min_purchase_amount decimal(12,2) [note: 'Minimum transaction amount required for the promotion to be applicable.']
  nps_impact_estimate decimal(5,2) [note: 'Estimated effect of the promotion on Net Promoter Score (percentage points).']
  priority varchar [note: 'Numeric priority used to rank promotions when multiple are applicable.']
  promotion_code varchar [note: 'Unique alphanumeric code assigned to the promotion for tracking and lookup.']
  promotion_name varchar [note: 'Human‑readable name of the promotion as used in marketing materials.']
  promotion_status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle state of the promotion.']
  promotion_type varchar [note: 'Category of the promotion indicating the mechanism used to provide value to the customer.']
  promotional_message varchar [note: 'Marketing copy displayed to customers describing the promotion.']
  redemption_count varchar [note: 'Running total of how many times the promotion has been redeemed.']
  required_product_category varchar [note: 'Product category that must be purchased for the promotion to apply.']
  start_date date [note: 'Date on which the promotion becomes effective and can be redeemed.']
  target_audience varchar [note: 'Segment of customers for whom the promotion is intended.']
  terms_and_conditions varchar [note: 'Legal and operational rules governing the promotion.']
  total_redemption_limit varchar [note: 'Maximum total number of redemptions allowed across all customers.']
  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp of the most recent update to the promotion record.']
  usage_limit_per_customer varchar [note: 'Maximum number of times a single customer may redeem the promotion.']

  Note: 'Master reference table for promotion. Referenced by promotion_id.'
}

Table customer.survey {
  survey_id varchar [pk, note: 'Primary key for survey']
  follow_up_survey_id varchar [note: 'Self-referencing FK on survey (follow_up_survey_id)']
  channel varchar [note: 'Mechanism used to present the survey to respondents.']
  confidentiality_level varchar [note: 'Data classification governing who may view survey content and responses.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Date‑time when the survey definition was initially entered into the system.']
  effective_from date [note: 'Calendar date on which the survey may start being offered to respondents.']
  effective_until date [note: 'Calendar date after which the survey is no longer available (nullable for open‑ended surveys).']
  incentive_type varchar [note: 'Type of reward provided for completing the survey.']
  incentive_value decimal(10,2) [note: 'Financial amount associated with the incentive; null when non‑monetary.']
  is_anonymous boolean [note: 'True when responses are recorded without linking to respondent identities.']
  is_mandatory boolean [note: 'True when respondents are required to complete the survey as part of a process.']
  language varchar [note: 'ISO language code indicating the language in which the survey is delivered.']
  max_responses_allowed varchar [note: 'Cap on total responses that can be accepted; null means unlimited.']
  owner_contact_email varchar [note: 'Email address of the primary owner or coordinator for the survey.']
  owner_contact_phone varchar [note: 'Phone number of the primary owner or coordinator for the survey.']
  owner_department varchar [note: 'Business unit that created and maintains the survey.']
  response_deadline date [note: 'Final date by which responses must be received for the survey period.']
  survey_category varchar [note: 'Broad analytical grouping used for reporting and segmentation.']
  survey_description varchar [note: 'Narrative explaining the objectives, scope, and content of the survey.']
  survey_name varchar [note: 'Human‑readable title of the survey.']
  survey_status varchar [note: 'Indicates whether the survey is being designed, is live, or has been retired.']
  survey_type varchar [note: 'Category that defines the primary intent of the survey.']
  target_audience varchar [note: 'Segment of customers or stakeholders the survey is designed for.']
  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Date‑time of the latest modification to any survey attribute.']
  version_number varchar [note: 'Sequential integer indicating the revision of the survey definition.']

  Note: 'Master reference table for survey. Referenced by survey_id.'
}

Table sales.opportunity {
  opportunity_id varchar [pk, note: 'Unique identifier for the sales opportunity record. Primary key.']
  campaign_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the marketing campaign that generated this opportunity, if applicable.']
  dealership_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the dealership managing this opportunity.']
  nameplate_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to aftersales.nameplate. Business justification: Opportunities are tied to a specific vehicle model (nameplate); linking to aftersales.nameplate captures the product line the opportunity targets.']
  opportunity_customer_party_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the prospect or customer associated with this opportunity.']
  opportunity_model_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to vehicle.model. Business justification: Opportunity tracking by model enables sales forecasting, market analysis, and model performance dashboards.']
  opportunity_party_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the prospect or customer associated with this opportunity.']
  opportunity_rep_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the sales representative or account owner assigned to this opportunity.']
  opportunity_sales_representative_rep_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the sales representative or account owner assigned to this opportunity.']
  owner_employee_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to workforce.employee. Business justification: Required for Opportunity Ownership Report showing which employee owns each opportunity.']
  vehicle_program_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to engineering.vehicle_program. Business justification: Required for Opportunity Management report to align sales opportunities with engineering program schedules, ensuring capacity planning.']
  vin_registry_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the specific vehicle configuration or model of interest for this opportunity.']
  actual_close_date date [note: 'Actual date when the opportunity was closed (won or lost).']
  competitor_brand varchar [note: 'Competitor brand or OEM that the customer is also considering, if known.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the opportunity record was first created in the system.']
  delivery_location varchar [note: 'Preferred delivery location or dealership for vehicle handover.']
  digital_channel_source varchar [note: 'Digital channel source (configurator, website, app, marketplace)']
  discount_amount decimal(18,2) [note: 'Total discount amount applied to the opportunity, including dealer discounts and manufacturer incentives.']
  estimated_value decimal(18,2) [note: 'Estimated total deal value including vehicle price, options, accessories, and services.']
  expected_close_date date [note: 'Anticipated date when the opportunity is expected to close (either won or lost).']
  exterior_color varchar [note: 'Preferred exterior color for the vehicle.']
  financing_type varchar [note: 'Type of financing or payment method the customer intends to use.']
  fiscal_year varchar [note: 'Fiscal year in which the opportunity is expected to close, used for sales forecasting and quota tracking.']
  fleet_size varchar [note: 'Number of vehicles in the fleet opportunity, applicable for fleet and commercial sales.']
  fni_interest_flag boolean
  incentive_amount decimal(18,2) [note: 'Total manufacturer incentive amount applicable to this opportunity.']
  interior_color varchar [note: 'Preferred interior color or trim for the vehicle.']
  is_active boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the opportunity is currently active (open) or closed.']
  is_certified_pre_owned_interest boolean
  is_online_lead boolean
  is_won boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the opportunity was closed as won (successful sale).']
  last_activity_date date [note: 'Date of the most recent sales activity or interaction related to this opportunity.']
  last_modified_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the opportunity record was last modified.']
  lead_source varchar [note: 'Original channel or source through which the opportunity was generated. [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: web|phone|email|walk_in|referral|event|advertising|social_media|partner — 9 candidates stripped; promote to reference product]']
  loss_reason varchar [note: 'Primary reason why the opportunity was lost, if applicable. [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: price|product_fit|competitor|timing|financing|no_response|other — 7 candidates stripped; promote to reference product]']
  model_year varchar [note: 'Model year of the vehicle of interest in this opportunity.']
  msrp decimal(18,2) [note: 'Manufacturer Suggested Retail Price for the vehicle configuration of interest.']
  next_follow_up_date date [note: 'Scheduled date for the next follow-up activity with the prospect.']
  notes varchar [note: 'Free-text notes and comments about the opportunity, customer preferences, and sales interactions.']
  opportunity_name varchar [note: 'Descriptive name of the opportunity, typically including prospect name and vehicle of interest.']
  opportunity_number varchar [note: 'Business-facing unique identifier for the opportunity, typically auto-generated and used in communications with dealers and sales teams.']
  opportunity_type varchar [note: 'Classification of the opportunity based on customer segment and purchase type.']
  powertrain_type varchar [note: 'Type of powertrain for the vehicle of interest: ICE (Internal Combustion Engine), HEV (Hybrid Electric Vehicle), PHEV (Plug-in Hybrid Electric Vehicle), BEV (Battery Electric Vehicle), FCEV (Fuel Cell Electric Vehicle).']
  priority varchar [note: 'Priority level assigned to this opportunity based on strategic importance, deal size, or customer value.']
  probability decimal(5,2) [note: 'Estimated probability of closing this opportunity successfully, expressed as a percentage (0-100).']
  quote_date date [note: 'Date when the quote was generated, if applicable.']
  quote_generated boolean [note: 'Indicates whether a formal quote has been generated for this opportunity.']
  region varchar [note: 'Geographic sales region where this opportunity is being managed.']
  sales_stage varchar [note: 'Current stage of the opportunity in the sales pipeline, reflecting progression from initial contact through close. [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: lead|qualification|needs_analysis|test_drive|quote|negotiation|closed_won|closed_lost — 8 candidates stripped; promote to reference product]']
  subscription_interest_flag boolean [note: 'Whether prospect is interested in subscription/VaaS']
  territory varchar [note: 'Sales territory within the region where this opportunity is being managed.']
  test_drive_completed boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the prospect has completed a test drive for the vehicle of interest.']
  test_drive_date date [note: 'Date when the test drive was completed, if applicable.']
  trade_in_value decimal(18,2) [note: 'Appraised value of the customer\'s trade-in vehicle, if applicable.']
  vehicle_configuration varchar [note: 'Detailed configuration of the vehicle including trim level, options, and packages.']
  win_reason varchar [note: 'Primary reason why the opportunity was won, if applicable. [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: price|product_features|brand_loyalty|service|financing|relationship|other — 7 candidates stripped; promote to reference product]']

  Note: 'Core sales opportunity record tracking a potential vehicle sale from initial identification through close. Captures prospect vehicle interest, estimated deal value, probability of close, sales stage, assigned sales representative, source channel, and expected close date. Aligns with Salesforce Automotive Cloud Opportunity object and SAP SD pre-sales pipeline. Covers retail, fleet, and commercial vehicle opportunities.'
}

Table sales.lead {
  lead_id varchar [pk, note: 'Unique identifier for the sales lead record. Primary key.']
  assigned_owner_employee_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to workforce.employee. Business justification: Lead Assignment Process needs to record the employee responsible for each lead.']
  campaign_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the marketing campaign that generated this lead, if applicable.']
  converted_opportunity_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the opportunity record created upon lead conversion. Null if not yet converted.']
  lead_assigned_dealer_dealership_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the dealership assigned to this lead for follow-up and conversion.']
  lead_assigned_owner_rep_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the sales representative or dealer contact assigned to follow up on this lead.']
  lead_dealership_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the dealership assigned to this lead for follow-up and conversion.']
  lead_rep_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the sales representative or dealer contact assigned to follow up on this lead.']
  party_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to customer.party. Business justification: Associates leads with existing parties for referral tracking and lead conversion analysis in the Lead Management process.']
  city varchar [note: 'City where the lead is located.']
  company_name varchar [note: 'Name of the organization or company associated with the lead, applicable for fleet sales or commercial vehicle inquiries.']
  configurator_session_id varchar
  converted_date date [note: 'The date when the lead was converted into an opportunity. Null if not yet converted. Format: yyyy-MM-dd.']
  country_code varchar [note: 'Three-letter ISO 3166-1 alpha-3 country code representing the leads country of residence or business location.']
  cpo_interest_flag boolean
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'The date and time when the lead record was first created in the system. Format: yyyy-MM-ddTHH:mm:ss.SSSXXX.']
  currency_code varchar [note: 'Three-letter ISO 4217 currency code for the estimated budget amount.']
  digital_lead_flag boolean [note: 'Whether lead originated from digital channel']
  email_address varchar [note: 'Primary email address of the lead for digital communication and follow-up.']
  estimated_budget_amount decimal(15,2) [note: 'Estimated budget or price range the lead has indicated for the vehicle purchase.']
  financing_interest boolean [note: 'Boolean flag indicating whether the lead is interested in financing or leasing options.']
  first_name varchar [note: 'The first name (given name) of the individual lead contact.']
  is_online_lead boolean
  last_contact_date date [note: 'The date when the lead was last contacted by a sales representative. Format: yyyy-MM-dd.']
  last_name varchar [note: 'The last name (family name) of the individual lead contact.']
  lead_number varchar [note: 'Human-readable business identifier for the lead, typically auto-generated by the CRM system. Format: LEAD-NNNNNNNN.']
  lead_status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle status of the lead in the sales pipeline (new, contacted, qualified, unqualified, converted to opportunity, lost).']
  lead_type varchar [note: 'Classification of the lead based on buyer category: individual consumer, fleet buyer, commercial enterprise, or government entity.']
  lost_reason varchar [note: 'Reason why the lead was marked as lost (e.g., purchased from competitor, no longer interested, unresponsive).']
  mobile_number varchar [note: 'Mobile phone number of the lead for SMS campaigns and mobile outreach.']
  model_year_interest varchar [note: 'The model year (MY) of the vehicle the lead is interested in purchasing.']
  modified_timestamp timestamp [note: 'The date and time when the lead record was last modified. Format: yyyy-MM-ddTHH:mm:ss.SSSXXX.']
  next_follow_up_date date [note: 'Scheduled date for the next follow-up activity with the lead. Format: yyyy-MM-dd.']
  notes varchar [note: 'Free-text notes and comments captured by sales representatives regarding the leads preferences, objections, and conversation history.']
  opt_in_email boolean [note: 'Boolean flag indicating whether the lead has opted in to receive email marketing communications.']
  opt_in_phone boolean [note: 'Boolean flag indicating whether the lead has opted in to receive phone call communications.']
  opt_in_sms boolean [note: 'Boolean flag indicating whether the lead has opted in to receive SMS marketing communications.']
  phone_number varchar [note: 'Primary contact phone number for the lead. Used for outbound sales calls and follow-up.']
  postal_code varchar [note: 'Postal or ZIP code of the leads address, used for geographic segmentation and dealer assignment.']
  purchase_timeframe varchar [note: 'Expected timeframe within which the lead intends to make a purchase decision (immediate, within 30 days, within 90 days, within 6 months, or future/undecided).']
  qualification_score varchar [note: 'Numeric score (0-100) representing the leads likelihood to convert, based on engagement, budget, authority, need, and timeline (BANT criteria).']
  rating varchar [note: 'Qualitative rating of the lead based on engagement and conversion potential: hot (high priority), warm (moderate interest), cold (low engagement).']
  referral_source varchar [note: 'Name or identifier of the person or entity that referred this lead, if applicable.']
  region varchar [note: 'Geographic region or sales territory where the lead is located (e.g., North America, Europe, Asia-Pacific).']
  source varchar [note: 'The origin channel through which the lead was captured (web inquiry, dealer walk-in, automotive event, customer referral, digital marketing campaign, phone inquiry).']
  state_province varchar [note: 'State or province where the lead is located.']
  street_address varchar [note: 'Street address of the lead, used for delivery and service planning.']
  subscription_interest_flag boolean
  test_drive_requested boolean [note: 'Boolean flag indicating whether the lead has requested a test drive.']
  trade_in_interest boolean [note: 'Boolean flag indicating whether the lead has expressed interest in trading in an existing vehicle as part of the purchase.']
  unqualified_reason varchar [note: 'Reason why the lead was marked as unqualified (e.g., no budget, no authority, no need, incorrect contact information).']
  vehicle_interest_category varchar [note: 'The powertrain category of vehicle the lead is interested in: ICE (Internal Combustion Engine), EV (Electric Vehicle), HEV (Hybrid Electric Vehicle), or PHEV (Plug-in Hybrid Electric Vehicle).']
  vehicle_model_interest varchar [note: 'Specific vehicle model or model family the lead has expressed interest in (e.g., sedan, SUV, truck model name).']
  web_form_code varchar [note: 'Identifier of the web form or landing page through which the lead was captured, used for digital campaign attribution.']

  Note: 'Inbound or outbound sales lead representing an individual or organization expressing interest in purchasing a vehicle. Tracks lead source (web, dealer walk-in, event, referral, digital campaign), lead status, assigned owner, vehicle interest category (ICE, EV, HEV, PHEV), and qualification score. Feeds into opportunity pipeline upon qualification. Sourced from Salesforce Automotive Cloud Lead object.'
}

Table sales.quote {
  invoice_id varchar [pk, note: 'Unique identifier for the vehicle sales quotation record. Primary key.']
  quote_id varchar [pk, note: 'Primary key for quote']
  compliance_document_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to compliance.compliance_document. Business justification: Quotes reference the compliance documents that certify the quoted vehicle configuration.']
  configuration_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to vehicle.vehicle_configuration. Business justification: Quote must be tied to a specific vehicle configuration to calculate options, OTA updates, and compliance; supports configuration‑based pricing.']
  configurator_session_id varchar
  created_by_employee_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to workforce.employee. Business justification: Quote creation audit requires the employee who generated the quote.']
  model_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to vehicle.model. Business justification: Required for Quote generation to reference the exact vehicle model, ensuring pricing consistency and enabling model‑level reporting.']
  opportunity_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the sales opportunity or lead that generated this quote. Tracks quote back to pipeline stage in Salesforce Automotive Cloud.']
  quote_customer_party_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the customer or prospect receiving this quote. Links to customer master data in SAP or Salesforce Automotive Cloud.']
  quote_dealer_dealership_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the dealership or direct sales channel issuing the quote. Links to dealer master data in CDK Global DMS or SAP.']
  quote_dealership_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the dealership or direct sales channel issuing the quote. Links to dealer master data in CDK Global DMS or SAP.']
  quote_party_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the customer or prospect receiving this quote. Links to customer master data in SAP or Salesforce Automotive Cloud.']
  quote_vehicle_vin_registry_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the specific vehicle configuration being quoted. Links to vehicle master data including model, trim, powertrain, and options.']
  quote_vin_registry_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the specific vehicle configuration being quoted. Links to vehicle master data including model, trim, powertrain, and options.']
  rep_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the sales representative or account manager who prepared the quote. Used for commission tracking and performance analytics.']
  service_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to mobility.mobility_service. Business justification: Quotes can include optional connectivity/ADAS services; linking the quoted service enables accurate pricing, compliance, and downstream provisioning.']
  accessories_total decimal(15,2) [note: 'Total value of dealer-installed accessories (e.g., floor mats, cargo organizers, protection packages). Separate from factory options.']
  apr_rate decimal(5,3) [note: 'Annual percentage rate for financing if offered. Expressed as decimal (e.g., 0.0399 for 3.99% APR). Subject to credit approval.']
  buy_rate_apr decimal(5,3)
  conversion_date date [note: 'Date when quote was converted to order. Used for sales cycle time analytics and conversion rate reporting.']
  converted_to_order boolean [note: 'Indicates whether this quote was successfully converted to a customer order. True when customer accepts quote and order is created in SAP SD.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when this quote record was first created in the system. Audit trail for record creation.']
  credit_tier varchar
  currency_code varchar [note: 'Three-letter ISO 4217 currency code for all monetary amounts in this quote (e.g., USD, CAD, EUR, MXN).']
  delivery_method varchar [note: 'Method by which customer will take delivery of vehicle. Dealer pickup is standard; home delivery, port pickup (for imports), and factory pickup (for premium brands) are alternatives.']
  destination_charge decimal(15,2) [note: 'Freight and delivery charge from manufacturing plant to dealer. Typically a fixed amount per vehicle set by OEM.']
  doc_fee decimal(15,2) [note: 'Dealer documentation and administrative fee for processing the sale. Regulated by state law in many jurisdictions.']
  down_payment decimal(15,2) [note: 'Customer down payment amount if financing is offered. Reduces amount financed and monthly payment.']
  drivetrain varchar [note: 'Drivetrain configuration: FWD (Front-Wheel Drive), RWD (Rear-Wheel Drive), AWD (All-Wheel Drive), 4WD (Four-Wheel Drive).']
  engine_code varchar [note: 'Internal code identifying the specific engine or electric motor configuration. Used for parts ordering and service documentation.']
  estimated_delivery_date date [note: 'Estimated date when vehicle will be available for customer delivery. For in-stock vehicles, typically within days; for build-to-order, may be weeks or months.']
  expiry_date date [note: 'Date when the quote expires and pricing/terms are no longer valid. Typically 30-90 days from quote_date depending on market and vehicle type.']
  extended_warranty_flag boolean
  exterior_color_code varchar [note: 'Code representing the exterior paint color selected by customer. Links to color master data and may affect pricing for premium colors.']
  fi_monthly_payment_estimate decimal(18,2) [note: 'Estimated monthly F&I payment included in quote']
  financing_offered boolean [note: 'Indicates whether financing terms are included in this quote. True if quote includes loan or lease options, false for cash-only quotes.']
  financing_term_months varchar [note: 'Length of financing term in months if financing_offered is true. Common terms: 36, 48, 60, 72, 84 months.']
  fni_product_type varchar [note: 'F&I product offered (loan/lease/balloon)']
  gap_insurance_flag boolean
  incentive_total decimal(15,2) [note: 'Total value of manufacturer incentives, rebates, and discounts applied to this quote (e.g., loyalty bonus, conquest incentive, EV tax credit eligibility). Reduces net selling price.']
  interior_color_code varchar [note: 'Code representing the interior upholstery and trim color selected by customer.']
  is_certified_pre_owned boolean
  lease_annual_mileage varchar [note: 'Annual mileage allowance for lease if offered. Common values: 10000, 12000, 15000 miles per year. Excess mileage incurs per-mile charges.']
  lease_monthly_payment decimal(15,2) [note: 'Estimated monthly lease payment if lease is offered. Based on capitalized cost, residual value, money factor, and term.']
  lease_offered boolean [note: 'Indicates whether lease terms are included in this quote as an alternative to purchase financing.']
  lease_term_months varchar [note: 'Length of lease term in months if lease_offered is true. Common terms: 24, 36, 39, 48 months.']
  lender_name varchar
  model_year varchar [note: 'Model year of the vehicle being quoted. Critical for pricing, incentive eligibility, and inventory management.']
  modified_by varchar [note: 'User ID or name of the person who last modified this quote record. Audit trail for change tracking.']
  modified_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when this quote record was last modified. Audit trail for record updates and revisions.']
  money_factor decimal(8,6)
  monthly_payment decimal(15,2) [note: 'Estimated monthly payment amount if financing is offered. Calculated from amount financed, APR, and term. Subject to credit approval.']
  msrp_base decimal(15,2) [note: 'Base MSRP for the vehicle model and trim before options, accessories, and destination charges. Published pricing from OEM.']
  net_selling_price decimal(15,2) [note: 'Final vehicle price after all incentives and trade-in allowance. Calculated as subtotal_amount - incentive_total - trade_in_allowance + trade_in_payoff. Base for tax calculation.']
  notes varchar [note: 'Free-text notes and comments about the quote. May include special customer requests, configuration details, or sales rep observations.']
  options_total decimal(15,2) [note: 'Total value of factory-installed options and packages selected by customer (e.g., ADAS, premium audio, sunroof). Sum of individual option prices.']
  powertrain_type varchar [note: 'Type of powertrain: ICE (Internal Combustion Engine), HEV (Hybrid Electric Vehicle), PHEV (Plug-in Hybrid Electric Vehicle), BEV (Battery Electric Vehicle), FCEV (Fuel Cell Electric Vehicle). Critical for incentive eligibility and regulatory compliance.']
  quote_date date [note: 'Date when the quote was issued to the customer or prospect. Represents the principal business event timestamp for this transaction.']
  quote_number varchar [note: 'Externally visible business identifier for the quote, typically generated by SAP SD (VA21) or Salesforce Automotive Cloud. Used for customer communication and dealer reference.']
  quote_status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle status of the quote. Tracks progression from draft through approval to conversion or expiry. [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: draft|submitted|approved|rejected|expired|converted|cancelled — 7 candidates stripped; promote to reference product]']
  quote_type varchar [note: 'Classification of quote by sales channel and vehicle delivery format. Retail for individual consumers, fleet for corporate bulk orders, CKD (Completely Knocked Down) and SKD (Semi Knocked Down) for export assembly, commercial for business vehicles, demo for demonstration units. [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: retail|fleet|ckd|skd|commercial|demo|export — 7 candidates stripped; promote to reference product]']
  registration_fee decimal(15,2) [note: 'Government registration and title fees for the vehicle. Varies by state/province and vehicle type.']
  rejection_reason varchar [note: 'Free-text reason why quote was rejected or not converted. Captured for loss analysis and sales process improvement.']
  residual_value_amount decimal(15,2)
  residual_value_percentage decimal(5,2)
  sales_channel varchar [note: 'Channel through which quote was generated. Dealer for franchise network, direct for OEM-owned stores, online for digital sales, fleet for corporate accounts, broker for third-party intermediaries.']
  sales_region varchar [note: 'Geographic sales region code where quote was issued. Used for regional pricing, incentive eligibility, and sales performance tracking.']
  sell_rate_apr decimal(5,3)
  subscription_option_flag boolean [note: 'Whether subscription/VaaS option presented in quote']
  subtotal_amount decimal(15,2) [note: 'Subtotal before incentives, trade-in, taxes, and fees. Calculated as msrp_base + options_total + accessories_total + destination_charge.']
  tax_amount decimal(15,2) [note: 'Total sales tax calculated on net_selling_price based on customer delivery location jurisdiction. May include state, county, and local taxes.']
  total_amount decimal(18,2)
  total_amount_due decimal(15,2) [note: 'Final total amount customer must pay. Calculated as net_selling_price + tax_amount + registration_fee + doc_fee. Used for financing calculation or cash payment.']
  trade_in_allowance decimal(15,2) [note: 'Value credited to customer for trade-in vehicle. Based on used vehicle appraisal. Reduces amount due from customer.']
  trade_in_payoff decimal(15,2) [note: 'Outstanding loan balance on trade-in vehicle that must be paid off. If greater than trade_in_allowance, creates negative equity rolled into new financing.']
  trade_in_vin varchar [note: 'VIN of the customer\'s trade-in vehicle if applicable. Used for appraisal lookup and title transfer processing.']
  transmission_type varchar [note: 'Type of transmission: manual, automatic, CVT (Continuously Variable Transmission), DCT (Dual Clutch Transmission), or single-speed (for EVs).']
  trim_level varchar [note: 'Trim or grade level of the vehicle (e.g., Base, Sport, Luxury, Premium). Determines standard equipment and base pricing.']
  valid_until_date date
  version varchar [note: 'Version number of the quote. Increments when quote is revised with updated pricing, configuration, or terms. Supports quote revision history and audit trail.']
  vin varchar [note: '17-character Vehicle Identification Number if quote is for a specific in-stock or allocated vehicle. Null for build-to-order quotes where VIN is not yet assigned.']
  created_by varchar [note: 'User ID or name of the person who created this quote record. Audit trail for accountability.']

  Note: 'Formal vehicle sales quotation issued to a prospect or customer, detailing configured vehicle, MSRP, applied incentives, trade-in allowance, financing terms, accessories, and net selling price. Tracks quote version, expiry date, quote status, and issuing dealer or direct sales channel. Supports retail, fleet, and CKD/SKD export quotes. Linked to SAP SD quotation (VA21) and Salesforce Automotive Cloud Quote.'
}

Table sales.quote_line {
  quote_line_id varchar [pk, note: 'Unique identifier for the quote line item. Primary key.']
  dealer_incentive_program_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the manufacturer or dealer incentive program applied to this line. Links to incentive program master for eligibility rules, amounts, and expiration dates.']
  msrp_schedule_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to sales.msrp_schedule. Business justification: Quote line items need to reference the official MSRP schedule for the selected configuration; adding msrp_schedule_id eliminates redundant MSRP columns and enables consistent pricing lookup.']
  part_master_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to engineering.part_master. Business justification: Needed for Pricing Engine to pull cost, lead time, and compliance from Part Master when generating quotes.']
  quote_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key reference to the parent quote header. Establishes the header-detail relationship for this line item.']
  quote_vehicle_vin_registry_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the specific vehicle configuration being quoted. Applicable when line_type is vehicle. Links to the vehicle master for model, trim, and base specifications.']
  quote_vin_registry_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the specific vehicle configuration being quoted. Applicable when line_type is vehicle. Links to the vehicle master for model, trim, and base specifications.']
  sku_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to product.sku. Business justification: Quote lines are proposals for specific SKUs; adding a foreign key to product.sku enables pricing and configuration consistency.']
  vehicle_option_package_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to vehicle.vehicle_option_package. Business justification: Quote line for an option package should reference the canonical package entity for accurate pricing, warranty, and regulatory compliance.']
  availability_status varchar [note: 'Current availability status of the line item. Indicates whether the product is in dealer inventory, allocated from manufacturer, requires build-to-order, is backordered, or has been discontinued.']
  commission_eligible boolean [note: 'Indicates whether this line item is eligible for sales representative commission. Certain line types (fees, trade-ins) may be excluded from commission calculations.']
  commission_rate decimal(5,4) [note: 'Commission rate applied to this line item for sales representative compensation. Expressed as a decimal percentage. May vary by product type and sales program.']
  cost_amount decimal(15,2) [note: 'Dealer cost or transfer price for this line item. Used for margin analysis and profitability reporting. Confidential business data not disclosed to customers.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Date and time when this quote line was first created. Recorded in ISO 8601 format with timezone. Used for audit trail and lifecycle tracking.']
  currency_code varchar [note: 'Three-letter ISO 4217 currency code for all monetary amounts on this line. Typically inherits from quote header but may differ for international fleet quotes.']
  delivery_date date [note: 'Estimated or committed delivery date for this line item. Critical for customer expectations, logistics planning, and order fulfillment tracking.']
  discount_amount decimal(15,2) [note: 'Total discount applied to this line item. Includes dealer discounts, promotional discounts, and volume discounts. Expressed as a positive value that reduces the line total.']
  discount_percentage decimal(5,2) [note: 'Discount expressed as a percentage of the unit price. Used for percentage-based discount calculations and reporting. Stored alongside discount_amount for transparency.']
  extended_price decimal(15,2) [note: 'Line item subtotal before tax. Calculated as (unit_price * quantity) - discount_amount - incentive_amount. Represents the pre-tax line total.']
  exterior_color_code varchar [note: 'Manufacturer color code for the vehicle exterior paint. Used for vehicle configuration, pricing (premium colors), and inventory matching.']
  fi_product_type varchar [note: 'Type of F&I product if line is F&I (extended_warranty, gap, paint_protection)']
  fni_product_flag boolean
  incentive_amount decimal(15,2) [note: 'Total manufacturer or dealer incentive applied to this line item. Includes cash rebates, loyalty bonuses, conquest incentives, and special financing subsidies. Reduces the customer-facing price.']
  incentive_description varchar [note: 'Human-readable description of the incentive applied. Provides customer-facing explanation of the incentive program, eligibility criteria, and value proposition.']
  interior_color_code varchar [note: 'Manufacturer color code for the vehicle interior trim and upholstery. Used for vehicle configuration, pricing, and customer preference tracking.']
  is_cpo_item boolean
  line_number varchar [note: 'Sequential line item number within the quote. Determines the ordering and display sequence of line items.']
  line_status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle status of the quote line. Tracks the line through draft, approval, conversion to order, or cancellation workflows.']
  line_total decimal(15,2) [note: 'Total amount for this line item including tax. Calculated as extended_price + tax_amount. Represents the final customer-facing line total.']
  line_type varchar [note: 'Classification of the quote line item. Distinguishes between vehicle configurations, accessories, service packages, warranties, insurance products, fees, discounts, and trade-in credits. [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: vehicle|accessory|service_package|warranty|insurance|fee|discount|trade_in — 8 candidates stripped; promote to reference product]']
  list_price decimal(15,2) [note: 'Manufacturer Suggested Retail Price (MSRP) or standard list price for the line item before any discounts or incentives. Expressed in the quote currency.']
  margin_amount decimal(15,2) [note: 'Gross margin for this line item. Calculated as extended_price - cost_amount. Used for profitability analysis and sales performance evaluation.']
  model_code varchar [note: 'Manufacturer model code representing the configured vehicle variant. Includes base model, trim level, and factory option packages. Used for pricing and inventory lookup.']
  model_year varchar [note: 'Model year of the vehicle being quoted. Critical for pricing, incentive eligibility, and inventory allocation. Aligns with manufacturer production cycles.']
  modified_by varchar [note: 'User identifier of the person who last modified this quote line. Supports change tracking and audit requirements.']
  modified_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Date and time of the most recent modification to this quote line. Recorded in ISO 8601 format with timezone. Used for change tracking and audit trail.']
  notes varchar [note: 'Free-text notes and comments specific to this line item. Used for special instructions, configuration details, customer requests, or internal coordination.']
  product_code varchar [note: 'Stock Keeping Unit (SKU) or product code for accessories, service packages, warranties, or other non-vehicle line items. Links to product master for pricing and availability.']
  product_description varchar [note: 'Detailed description of the line item product or service. Includes accessory names, service package details, warranty coverage terms, or fee descriptions for customer clarity.']
  quantity varchar [note: 'Number of units for this line item. Typically 1 for vehicles, but may be greater than 1 for accessories, fleet orders, or service packages.']
  rejection_reason varchar [note: 'Explanation for why this line item was rejected or removed from the quote. Captures business reasons such as unavailability, pricing issues, or customer preference changes.']
  tax_amount decimal(15,2) [note: 'Total sales tax calculated for this line item. Calculated as extended_price * tax_rate. Contributes to the overall quote tax total.']
  tax_code decimal(18,2) [note: 'Tax jurisdiction code determining the applicable sales tax rate for this line item. Links to tax master for rate lookup and tax calculation rules.']
  tax_rate decimal(5,4) [note: 'Sales tax rate applied to this line item, expressed as a decimal (e.g., 0.0825 for 8.25%). Used for tax calculation and compliance reporting.']
  unit_of_measure varchar [note: 'Unit of measure for the line item quantity. Common values include each (vehicles, accessories), set, pair, kit, hour (labor), month/year (subscriptions, warranties). [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: each|set|pair|kit|hour|month|year — 7 candidates stripped; promote to reference product]']
  unit_price decimal(15,2) [note: 'Actual selling price per unit after dealer adjustments but before line-level discounts and incentives. May differ from list price due to market conditions or dealer pricing strategy.']
  vin varchar [note: '17-character Vehicle Identification Number uniquely identifying a specific vehicle unit. Populated when quoting a specific in-stock or allocated vehicle. Null for build-to-order quotes.']
  created_by varchar [note: 'User identifier of the sales representative or system user who created this quote line. Used for audit trail and accountability.']

  Note: 'Individual line item within a vehicle sales quote, representing a specific vehicle configuration, accessory, service package, or fee. Captures line type, configured model code, option packages, unit price, discount amount, incentive applied, and line-level tax. Enables multi-vehicle fleet quotes and accessory bundling. Child entity of quote.'
}

Table sales.vehicle_order {
  vehicle_order_id varchar [pk, note: 'Primary key for vehicle_order']
  company_code_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to finance.company_code. Business justification: Order Accounting: each vehicle order must be tied to a legal entity (company code) for statutory reporting and consolidation.']
  contact_point_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the specific address where the vehicle will be delivered. Links to customer or dealer address master data.']
  cost_center_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to finance.cost_center. Business justification: Cost Allocation: orders are charged to a cost center for expense tracking and internal budgeting.']
  dealership_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the dealership through which the order was placed. Links to the dealer network master data.']
  homologation_record_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to compliance.homologation_record. Business justification: Regulatory reporting requires each vehicle order to reference the homologation approval authorizing the model for the market.']
  nameplate_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to aftersales.nameplate. Business justification: Vehicle orders need nameplate reference to align production schedules and meet regulatory filing requirements.']
  order_sales_rep_employee_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to workforce.employee. Business justification: Order Responsibility Report tracks which employee (sales rep) is accountable for each vehicle order.']
  primary_test_event_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to compliance.compliance_test_event. Business justification: Order fulfillment includes traceability to the primary compliance test event that validated the vehicle before delivery.']
  primary_vehicle_vin_registry_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the specific vehicle unit ordered. For stock orders, links to existing inventory. For build-to-order, links to the vehicle configuration that will be manufactured.']
  profit_center_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to finance.profit_center. Business justification: Profit Center Reporting: each order contributes to a profit center for profitability analysis per business unit.']
  subscription_sales_link_id varchar [note: 'FK to subscription sales link if VaaS order']
  subscription_sales_order_subscription_sales_link_id varchar
  vehicle_customer_party_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the customer who placed the vehicle order. Links to the customer master data.']
  vehicle_party_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the customer who placed the vehicle order. Links to the customer master data.']
  vehicle_program_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to engineering.vehicle_program. Business justification: Order fulfillment tracks against Vehicle Program to manage production volume and delivery timelines.']
  vehicle_rep_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the sales representative or sales agent who handled the order. Used for commission calculation and performance tracking.']
  vehicle_sales_representative_rep_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the sales representative or sales agent who handled the order. Used for commission calculation and performance tracking.']
  vehicle_vin_registry_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the specific vehicle unit ordered. For stock orders, links to existing inventory. For build-to-order, links to the vehicle configuration that will be manufactured.']
  actual_delivery_date date [note: 'Actual date when the vehicle was delivered to the customer or dealer. Used for On-Time Delivery (OTD) performance measurement.']
  build_week varchar [note: 'Scheduled production week for the vehicle in ISO week format (YYYYWWW). Represents the planned Start of Production (SOP) week.']
  cancellation_reason varchar [note: 'Free-text explanation for order cancellation. Populated only when order_status is cancelled. Used for loss analysis and process improvement.']
  committed_delivery_date date [note: 'OEM-committed delivery date communicated to the customer. Represents the contractual delivery obligation.']
  configurator_session_id varchar
  confirmed_date date [note: 'Date when the order was confirmed by the OEM and accepted into the production schedule. Represents the commitment to fulfill the order.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when this order record was first created in the data platform. Used for audit trail and data lineage.']
  currency_code varchar [note: 'Three-letter ISO 4217 currency code for all monetary amounts in this order.']
  delivery_location varchar [note: 'Type of location where the vehicle will be delivered. Dealer for dealership pickup, customer_address for home delivery, port for export shipments, distribution_center for fleet staging.']
  discount_amount decimal(15,2) [note: 'Total discount amount applied to the MSRP. Includes dealer discounts, promotional offers, and negotiated price reductions.']
  exterior_color_code varchar [note: 'Code representing the selected exterior paint color for the ordered vehicle.']
  fi_application_id varchar
  fi_contract_id varchar [note: 'FK to F&I contract']
  finance_contract_id varchar
  financing_reference_number varchar [note: 'External reference number for the financing or lease agreement associated with this vehicle order. Links to the financial institution contract.']
  financing_type varchar [note: 'Source of financing for the vehicle purchase. Captive for OEM-owned finance arm, third_party for external lenders, none for cash purchases.']
  fiscal_year varchar [note: 'Fiscal year in which the order was placed. Used for financial reporting and sales performance tracking.']
  incentive_amount decimal(15,2) [note: 'Total manufacturer incentive amount applied to the order. Includes cash rebates, loyalty bonuses, conquest incentives, and special financing subsidies.']
  interior_color_code varchar [note: 'Code representing the selected interior trim and upholstery color for the ordered vehicle.']
  is_certified_pre_owned boolean
  is_online_order boolean
  is_subscription boolean
  model_year varchar [note: 'Model year designation of the ordered vehicle. Represents the production year classification used for regulatory compliance and marketing.']
  msrp decimal(15,2) [note: 'Manufacturer Suggested Retail Price for the configured vehicle before any discounts, incentives, or dealer adjustments.']
  online_order_flag boolean [note: 'Whether order originated from online/digital channel']
  online_order_id varchar
  order_date date [note: 'Date when the customer placed the vehicle order. Represents the business event timestamp for order capture.']
  order_number varchar [note: 'Externally-visible unique order number assigned to the vehicle purchase order. Used for customer communication and dealer reference.']
  order_status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle status of the vehicle order. Tracks progression from initial placement through manufacturing, shipment, and final delivery to customer. [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: draft|placed|confirmed|scheduled|in_production|built|shipped|delivered|cancelled — 9 candidates stripped; promote to reference product]']
  order_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Precise timestamp when the vehicle order was captured in the system. Used for order sequencing and audit trail.']
  order_type varchar [note: 'Classification of the vehicle order by customer segment and sales channel. Retail for individual consumers, fleet for commercial bulk purchases, government for public sector contracts, export for international sales, demo for dealer demonstration vehicles, internal for company use.']
  payment_method varchar [note: 'Method of payment for the vehicle order. Cash for full upfront payment, finance for loan-based purchase, lease for lease agreement, fleet_contract for commercial fleet arrangements.']
  powertrain_type varchar [note: 'Type of powertrain system for the ordered vehicle. ICE for Internal Combustion Engine, HEV for Hybrid Electric Vehicle, PHEV for Plug-in Hybrid Electric Vehicle, BEV for Battery Electric Vehicle, FCEV for Fuel Cell Electric Vehicle.']
  priority_code varchar [note: 'Priority classification for production scheduling. VIP for high-value customers, expedited for rush orders, fleet_priority for large commercial contracts, standard for normal processing.']
  production_plant_code varchar [note: 'Code identifying the manufacturing plant assigned to build this vehicle. Used for production scheduling and capacity planning.']
  region_code varchar [note: 'Geographic sales region code where the order was placed. Used for regional sales performance analysis and territory management.']
  requested_delivery_date date [note: 'Customer-requested date for vehicle delivery. Used for production planning and logistics scheduling.']
  sales_channel varchar [note: 'Channel through which the order was captured. Dealer for traditional dealership sales, direct for OEM-direct sales, online for e-commerce platform, fleet_sales for commercial fleet division, broker for third-party intermediaries.']
  sales_channel_type varchar
  selling_price decimal(15,2) [note: 'Final agreed selling price for the vehicle after all discounts, incentives, rebates, and negotiations. Represents the actual transaction price.']
  special_instructions varchar [note: 'Free-text field for special handling instructions, customer requests, or delivery notes that require attention during order fulfillment.']
  tax_amount decimal(15,2) [note: 'Total sales tax, value-added tax, or other applicable taxes calculated for the vehicle order based on delivery jurisdiction.']
  total_amount decimal(15,2) [note: 'Total amount payable by the customer including selling price, taxes, fees, and any additional charges minus trade-in value.']
  trade_in_value decimal(15,2) [note: 'Appraised value of the customer trade-in vehicle applied toward the purchase. Null if no trade-in is involved.']
  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when this order record was last modified in the data platform. Used for change tracking and audit trail.']
  vehicle_configuration_code varchar [note: 'Complete configuration code representing all selected options, packages, and features for the ordered vehicle. Encodes the full Bill of Materials (BOM) specification.']
  vehicle_model_code varchar [note: 'Internal model code identifying the base vehicle platform and variant. Used for production planning and parts management.']
  vehicle_service_subscription_id varchar
  vin varchar [note: '17-character Vehicle Identification Number assigned to the ordered vehicle. May be null at order placement for build-to-order vehicles and populated when the vehicle enters production.']

  Note: 'Confirmed customer vehicle purchase order capturing the commercial commitment to buy a specific configured vehicle. Records order type (retail, fleet, government, export), ordered VIN or build-to-order configuration, agreed selling price, payment method, financing reference, delivery commitment date, and order status lifecycle (placed, confirmed, in-production, shipped, delivered). Interfaces with SAP SD sales order (VA01) and triggers manufacturing scheduling.'
}

Table sales.order_line {
  order_line_id varchar [pk, note: 'Unique identifier for the order line item. Primary key for the order_line product.']
  aftersales_trim_level_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to product.trim_level. Business justification: Order lines must reference exact trim level definition for accurate BOM generation and cost tracking; this FK is standard in manufacturing.']
  configuration_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the detailed vehicle configuration record capturing all selected options, packages, and specifications for this order line.']
  dealership_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the dealership responsible for this order line. Links to dealer network and channel management.']
  fleet_contract_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the fleet sales contract or commercial vehicle agreement governing this line item. Null for retail orders.']
  gl_account_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to finance.gl_account. Business justification: Revenue Posting: every order line maps to a GL account to generate journal entries for recognized revenue.']
  order_rep_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the sales representative or sales agent who captured this order line. Used for commission calculation and performance tracking.']
  order_sales_representative_rep_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the sales representative or sales agent who captured this order line. Used for commission calculation and performance tracking.']
  order_trade_in_vehicle_vin_registry_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the trade-in vehicle appraisal record if this order line includes a trade-in transaction. Null if no trade-in.']
  order_vehicle_vin_registry_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the specific vehicle master record when line_type is vehicle. Links to vehicle configuration and specifications.']
  order_vin_registry_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the specific vehicle master record when line_type is vehicle. Links to vehicle configuration and specifications.']
  part_master_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to engineering.part_master. Business justification: Production scheduling uses Order Line to retrieve Part Master details for manufacturing execution.']
  sales_rep_employee_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to workforce.employee. Business justification: Line‑level accountability requires the employee responsible for each order line.']
  trade_in_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the trade-in vehicle appraisal record if this order line includes a trade-in transaction. Null if no trade-in.']
  vehicle_option_package_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to vehicle.vehicle_option_package. Business justification: Order line must reference option package entity to drive production planning, parts allocation, and warranty tracking.']
  vehicle_order_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key reference to the parent sales order header. Links this line item to its containing order transaction.']
  actual_delivery_date date [note: 'Actual date when the line item was delivered and accepted by the dealer or customer. Triggers revenue recognition.']
  actual_production_date date [note: 'Actual date when vehicle production was completed. Populated from MES upon job completion.']
  allocation_date date [note: 'Date when a specific vehicle unit or inventory item was allocated to fulfill this order line. Null until allocation occurs.']
  cancellation_reason varchar [note: 'Reason code or description explaining why this order line was cancelled. Null for non-cancelled lines.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when this order line record was first created in the system. Represents the moment of order line capture.']
  currency_code varchar [note: 'Three-letter ISO 4217 currency code for all monetary amounts on this line item.']
  digital_channel_flag boolean
  discount_amount decimal(15,2) [note: 'Total discount applied to this line item including dealer discounts, promotional discounts, and volume discounts.']
  estimated_delivery_date date [note: 'Estimated date when the line item will be delivered to the dealer or end customer. Updated based on production and logistics schedules.']
  exterior_color_code varchar [note: 'Manufacturer color code for the vehicle exterior paint finish. Links to paint specification and supply chain planning.']
  fi_product_flag boolean [note: 'Whether order line is an F&I product (warranty, GAP, etc.)']
  financing_type varchar [note: 'Method of financing selected for this line item. Indicates whether the customer is paying cash, securing a loan, entering a lease, or using fleet financing.']
  fleet_indicator boolean [note: 'Boolean flag indicating whether this line item is part of a fleet or commercial vehicle order. True for fleet sales, False for retail sales.']
  incentive_amount decimal(15,2) [note: 'Manufacturer or dealer incentive amount applied to this line item. Includes rebates, loyalty bonuses, and promotional incentives.']
  interior_color_code varchar [note: 'Manufacturer color code for the vehicle interior trim and upholstery. Links to interior material specifications.']
  line_number varchar [note: 'Sequential line item number within the parent order. Determines display and processing sequence.']
  line_status varchar [note: 'Current fulfillment status of this order line. Tracks progression from order capture through delivery or cancellation. [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: open|allocated|in_production|shipped|delivered|cancelled|on_hold — 7 candidates stripped; promote to reference product]']
  line_total decimal(15,2) [note: 'Total amount for this line item including net price, taxes, and fees. Calculated as (net_price * quantity) plus tax_amount.']
  line_type varchar [note: 'Classification of the order line item indicating whether it represents a vehicle unit, accessory, warranty product, service contract, parts, freight charge, or documentation fee. [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: vehicle|accessory|extended_warranty|service_contract|parts|freight|documentation_fee — 7 candidates stripped; promote to reference product]']
  list_price decimal(15,2) [note: 'Manufacturer Suggested Retail Price (MSRP) or catalog list price per unit before any discounts or incentives.']
  model_code varchar [note: 'Manufacturer model code identifying the vehicle platform, body style, and base configuration. Used for production planning and parts allocation.']
  model_year varchar [note: 'Model year designation for the vehicle. Represents the production year classification, not the calendar year of manufacture.']
  modified_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when this order line record was last modified. Updated whenever any attribute changes.']
  net_price decimal(15,2) [note: 'Net unit price after applying all discounts and incentives but before taxes and fees. Calculated as list_price minus discount_amount minus incentive_amount.']
  plant_code varchar [note: 'Code identifying the manufacturing plant or assembly facility assigned to produce this vehicle unit.']
  powertrain_type varchar [note: 'Type of powertrain system. ICE=Internal Combustion Engine, HEV=Hybrid Electric Vehicle, PHEV=Plug-in Hybrid Electric Vehicle, BEV=Battery Electric Vehicle, FCEV=Fuel Cell Electric Vehicle.']
  product_description varchar [note: 'Human-readable description of the line item product or service. Provides business context for reporting and customer documentation.']
  quantity decimal(10,2) [note: 'Ordered quantity for this line item. Typically 1 for vehicle units, may be greater than 1 for accessories, parts, or fleet orders.']
  scheduled_production_date date [note: 'Planned Start of Production (SOP) date for this vehicle unit. Applicable only for build-to-order vehicles.']
  ship_date date [note: 'Date when the line item was shipped from the manufacturing plant or distribution center to the dealer or customer.']
  special_instructions varchar [note: 'Free-text field capturing any special handling instructions, customer requests, or delivery notes specific to this order line.']
  tax_amount decimal(15,2) [note: 'Total tax amount for this line item including sales tax, value-added tax, and any applicable excise taxes.']
  unit_of_measure varchar [note: 'Unit of measure for the quantity field. EA=Each, SET=Set, KIT=Kit, HR=Hour (for service contracts), UNIT=Unit.']
  vin varchar [note: '17-character Vehicle Identification Number assigned to this line item when available. May be null at order capture and populated during production allocation. Uniquely identifies the physical vehicle unit.']

  Note: 'Individual line item within a vehicle order representing a specific vehicle unit, accessory, extended warranty, or service contract. Captures VIN assignment (when available), model code, trim level, exterior/interior color, option packages, unit net price, quantity, and line fulfillment status. Supports multi-unit fleet orders with individual VIN-level tracking per line.'
}

Table sales.sales_incentive_program {
  sales_incentive_program_id varchar [pk, note: 'Unique identifier for the sales_incentive_program data product (auto-inserted pre-linking).']
  campaign_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to sales.campaign. Business justification: OEM incentive programs are typically launched as part of structured marketing campaigns. Adding campaign_id to sales_incentive_program links the incentive to its originating campaign, enabling campaig']
  channel_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to sales.channel. Business justification: Incentive programs are channel-specific — retail incentives differ from fleet incentives, and digital channel programs have different eligibility criteria. The current model has digital_channel_flag a']
  active_flag boolean
  budget_amount decimal(18,2) [note: 'Total program budget']
  created_timestamp timestamp
  digital_channel_eligible_flag boolean [note: 'Whether incentive applies to digital/online sales']
  digital_channel_flag boolean
  discount_rate decimal(9,4)
  eligibility_criteria varchar
  eligible_models varchar [note: 'Models eligible for this incentive']
  end_date date [note: 'Program end date']
  incentive_amount decimal(18,2) [note: 'Incentive amount per vehicle']
  incentive_rate decimal(18,2)
  incentive_type varchar
  program_code varchar [note: 'Unique program code']
  program_name varchar [note: 'Name of the incentive program']
  program_status varchar
  program_type varchar [note: 'Type (cash back, financing, lease, loyalty, conquest)']
  region varchar [note: 'Geographic region for the program']
  sales_incentive_program_status varchar [note: 'Program status (planned, active, expired)']
  start_date date [note: 'Program start date']
  subscription_eligible_flag boolean [note: 'Whether incentive applies to subscription sales']
  updated_timestamp timestamp

  Note: 'Master record for OEM-sponsored sales incentive programs including customer cash rebates, dealer cash allowances, low-APR financing offers, lease support, conquest bonuses, loyalty rewards, and fleet incentives. Captures program code, program type, eligible model year and nameplate, start and end dates, maximum incentive amount, funding source (OEM vs regional), stackability rules, and eligibility criteria. Managed centrally and distributed to dealer network.'
}

Table sales.sales_incentive_claim {
  sales_incentive_claim_id varchar [pk, note: 'Unique identifier for the sales_incentive_claim data product (auto-inserted pre-linking).']
  dealership_id varchar [note: 'Dealership submitting the claim']
  online_order_id varchar [note: 'FK to online order if claim from digital sale']
  rep_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to sales.rep. Business justification: Incentive claims are submitted by or attributed to a sales representative. Adding rep_id to sales_incentive_claim enables commission tracking, rep performance analytics, and claim audit trails. No bid']
  sales_incentive_program_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to sales.sales_incentive_program. Business justification: Link claim to internal incentive program for accurate incentive tracking.']
  vehicle_order_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to sales.vehicle_order. Business justification: An incentive claim is tied to a specific confirmed vehicle sale. Adding vehicle_order_id to sales_incentive_claim normalizes the claim-to-order relationship, enabling accurate incentive reconciliation']
  approval_date date [note: 'Date claim was approved']
  approved_amount decimal(18,2)
  claim_amount decimal(18,2) [note: 'Amount claimed']
  claim_date date [note: 'Date the incentive claim was submitted']
  claim_number varchar
  claim_status varchar [note: 'Status (submitted, approved, rejected, paid)']
  created_timestamp timestamp
  digital_channel_flag boolean
  payment_date date [note: 'Date payment was made']
  rejection_reason varchar [note: 'Reason for rejection if applicable']
  updated_timestamp timestamp
  vin varchar [note: 'VIN of the vehicle sold']

  Note: 'Transactional record of an incentive applied to a specific vehicle sale or lease transaction. Captures the incentive program applied, claimed amount, claim date, approving authority, claim status (submitted, approved, paid, rejected), dealer or direct channel submitting the claim, and supporting documentation references. Enables incentive spend tracking and reconciliation against program budgets.'
}

Table sales.fleet_contract {
  fleet_contract_id varchar [pk, note: 'Unique identifier for the fleet contract. Primary key for the fleet contract entity.']
  customer_fleet_account_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the fleet customer account that holds this contract. Links to the master fleet account entity.']
  dealer_incentive_program_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the fleet incentive program linked to this contract. Determines eligibility for manufacturer rebates and special financing.']
  fleet_customer_party_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the primary customer entity associated with this fleet contract. May represent corporate buyer, government agency, or rental company.']
  fleet_party_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the primary customer entity associated with this fleet contract. May represent corporate buyer, government agency, or rental company.']
  fleet_rep_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the sales representative or account manager responsible for this fleet contract. Typically a dedicated fleet sales specialist.']
  fleet_sales_representative_rep_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the sales representative or account manager responsible for this fleet contract. Typically a dedicated fleet sales specialist.']
  sales_rep_employee_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to workforce.employee. Business justification: Fleet Contract Management tracks the sales employee handling each fleet contract.']
  sales_territory_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to sales.sales_territory. Business justification: Fleet contracts are managed by sales representatives within specific territories. Adding sales_territory_id to fleet_contract enables territory-level fleet sales analytics, quota attainment tracking f']
  annual_mileage_allowance varchar [note: 'Maximum annual mileage allowed per vehicle under lease terms without excess mileage charges. Typical values range from 10,000 to 25,000 miles per year. Null for purchase contracts.']
  approval_date date [note: 'Date when the fleet contract received final internal approval from sales management or finance. Precedes contract signing.']
  approved_by_user_code varchar [note: 'Reference to the user who granted final approval for this fleet contract. Typically a sales director or VP of fleet sales.']
  auto_renewal_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the contract automatically renews for an additional term unless either party provides notice of non-renewal.']
  base_discount_percentage decimal(5,2) [note: 'Base percentage discount off Manufacturer Suggested Retail Price (MSRP) granted to the fleet customer. Additional volume-based discounts may apply.']
  committed_volume varchar [note: 'Total number of vehicles the fleet customer has committed to purchase or lease under this contract. Used for volume-based pricing tier qualification.']
  contract_name varchar [note: 'Descriptive name or title of the fleet contract, typically including customer name and program identifier for easy reference.']
  contract_number varchar [note: 'Externally-known unique business identifier for the fleet contract, used in communications with fleet customers and internal systems. Format: FC-YYYYNNNN.']
  contract_signed_date date [note: 'Date when the fleet contract was formally signed by both parties. Marks the legal binding of the agreement.']
  contract_status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle status of the fleet contract. Governs whether new orders can be placed and whether pricing and incentives are active. [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: draft|pending_approval|active|suspended|expired|terminated|completed — 7 candidates stripped; promote to reference product]']
  contract_term_months varchar [note: 'Duration of the fleet contract expressed in months. Typical terms range from 12 to 60 months for corporate fleets.']
  contract_type varchar [note: 'Classification of the fleet contract based on customer segment and business model. Determines pricing rules, incentive eligibility, and delivery processes.']
  contract_value_amount decimal(18,2) [note: 'Total estimated monetary value of the fleet contract based on committed volume and agreed pricing. Expressed in contract currency.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when this fleet contract record was first created in the system. Used for audit trail and data lineage.']
  currency_code varchar [note: 'Three-letter ISO 4217 currency code for all monetary amounts in this contract (e.g., USD, EUR, CAD).']
  delivered_volume varchar [note: 'Cumulative count of vehicles delivered to the fleet customer under this contract to date. Updated upon each delivery completion.']
  delivery_schedule_type varchar [note: 'Classification of how vehicles will be delivered over the contract term. Staggered and quarterly schedules are common for large fleet orders.']
  digital_channel_flag boolean
  effective_end_date date [note: 'Date when the fleet contract expires or terminates. After this date, no new orders can be placed under the contract terms. Nullable for open-ended agreements.']
  effective_start_date date [note: 'Date when the fleet contract becomes active and eligible for vehicle orders. Aligns with fiscal year or model year start in many cases.']
  eligible_model_years varchar [note: 'Comma-separated list of model years eligible for purchase under this contract. Typically current and next model year.']
  eligible_nameplates varchar [note: 'Comma-separated list of vehicle nameplates (model names) eligible for purchase under this fleet contract. May include sedans, SUVs, trucks, or commercial vehicles.']
  eligible_powertrain_types varchar [note: 'Comma-separated list of powertrain types eligible under this contract. May include ICE (Internal Combustion Engine), HEV (Hybrid Electric Vehicle), PHEV (Plug-in Hybrid Electric Vehicle), EV (Electric Vehicle), or combinations.']
  financing_type varchar [note: 'Primary financing method for vehicles under this contract. Captive finance refers to manufacturer-owned financing arm.']
  government_contract_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether this is a government procurement contract subject to special regulations, reporting requirements, and compliance standards.']
  gsa_schedule_number varchar [note: 'GSA schedule contract number for U.S. federal government fleet purchases. Null for non-government contracts.']
  last_modified_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when this fleet contract record was last updated. Tracks the most recent change to any field in the record.']
  lease_term_months varchar [note: 'Duration of lease agreement in months if financing_type is lease. Typical fleet lease terms are 24, 36, or 48 months. Null for cash purchases.']
  maintenance_included_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether scheduled maintenance services are included in the fleet contract pricing. Common for lease agreements and full-service fleet contracts.']
  minimum_order_quantity varchar [note: 'Minimum number of vehicles that must be ordered in a single transaction to qualify for fleet contract pricing.']
  multi_location_delivery_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether vehicles under this contract will be delivered to multiple locations. True for national fleet accounts with regional distribution.']
  national_fleet_account_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether this is a national fleet account with centralized purchasing and multi-region delivery. National accounts receive special pricing and dedicated account management.']
  payment_terms varchar [note: 'Standard payment terms governing when payment is due after vehicle delivery. Net 30/60/90 are common for corporate fleets; government contracts may have custom terms.']
  primary_delivery_location varchar [note: 'Primary geographic location or facility where fleet vehicles will be delivered. May be a corporate headquarters, fleet depot, or distribution center.']
  remaining_volume varchar [note: 'Number of vehicles remaining to be delivered under the committed volume. Calculated as committed_volume minus delivered_volume.']
  renewal_eligible_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether this fleet contract is eligible for renewal upon expiration. Based on customer performance, payment history, and strategic account status.']
  sales_region varchar [note: 'Geographic sales region where this fleet contract is managed. Used for regional sales performance tracking and territory management.']
  special_terms_notes varchar [note: 'Free-text field capturing any special terms, conditions, or negotiated provisions unique to this fleet contract that are not captured in standard fields.']
  subscription_model_flag boolean [note: 'Whether fleet contract uses subscription/VaaS model']
  termination_date date [note: 'Date when the fleet contract was terminated prior to its natural expiration. Null for contracts that completed normally or are still active.']
  termination_reason varchar [note: 'Business reason for early termination of the fleet contract. Examples include customer request, breach of terms, business closure, or strategic change.']
  volume_tier_discount_percentage decimal(5,2) [note: 'Additional discount percentage applied when cumulative volume reaches specified tier thresholds. Stacks on top of base discount.']
  warranty_extension_months varchar [note: 'Number of months beyond standard manufacturer warranty that are included in the fleet contract. Zero indicates standard warranty only.']

  Note: 'Commercial agreement governing the sale or lease of multiple vehicles to a fleet customer (corporate, government, rental, utility). Captures fleet account reference, contracted volume commitments, agreed pricing tiers, eligible nameplates and model years, contract term, delivery schedule, fleet incentive program linkage, and contract status. Supports national fleet accounts and government procurement contracts. Distinct from retail sales orders due to volume pricing, multi-delivery scheduling, and contract lifecycle management.'
}

Table sales.fleet_contract_line {
  fleet_contract_line_id varchar [pk, note: 'Unique identifier for the fleet contract line item. Primary key for this entity.']
  dealer_incentive_program_id varchar [note: 'Reference to any manufacturer incentive program applied to this contract line (e.g., fleet rebate, volume discount program).']
  dealership_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the dealership or distribution partner involved in fulfilling this contract line, if applicable.']
  fleet_contract_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the parent fleet contract under which this line item is allocated. Links this line to the master fleet agreement.']
  fleet_rep_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the sales representative or account manager responsible for this contract line.']
  fleet_sales_representative_rep_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the sales representative or account manager responsible for this contract line.']
  fleet_vehicle_vin_registry_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the specific vehicle master record representing the nameplate and configuration allocated in this line.']
  msrp_schedule_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to sales.msrp_schedule. Business justification: Fleet contract lines specify vehicle configurations with pricing based on the MSRP schedule. Adding msrp_schedule_id to fleet_contract_line links each line to the applicable MSRP schedule, enabling di']
  sales_rep_employee_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to workforce.employee. Business justification: Line‑level fleet contract tracking needs the employee responsible for each line.']
  storage_location_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the specific delivery location, distribution center, or customer facility where vehicles will be delivered.']
