  allocation_priority varchar [note: 'The priority level for production allocation and delivery scheduling: standard, high, urgent, or critical. Influences manufacturing sequence and resource allocation.']
  amendment_notes varchar [note: 'Free-text notes documenting any amendments or changes made to this contract line after initial creation.']
  body_style varchar [note: 'The body style or vehicle type (e.g., Sedan, SUV, Truck, Van, Coupe). Defines the physical configuration and use case category.']
  cancellation_reason varchar [note: 'The reason for cancellation if this contract line was cancelled. Captures business justification for contract line termination.']
  created_by_user_code varchar [note: 'The user ID of the person who created this contract line record. Audit trail for accountability.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'The date and time when this contract line record was first created in the system. Audit trail for record creation.']
  currency_code varchar [note: 'The three-letter ISO 4217 currency code for all monetary values in this contract line (e.g., USD, EUR, CAD).']
  delivery_window_end_date date [note: 'The latest date in the delivery window for vehicles under this contract line. Defines the end of the acceptable delivery period.']
  delivery_window_start_date date [note: 'The earliest date in the delivery window for vehicles under this contract line. Defines the beginning of the acceptable delivery period.']
  destination_country_code varchar [note: 'The three-letter ISO 3166-1 alpha-3 country code for the destination market of vehicles in this line (e.g., USA, CAN, MEX).']
  destination_region varchar [note: 'The geographic region or sales territory where vehicles in this line will be delivered (e.g., Northeast, Southwest, Pacific).']
  digital_channel_flag boolean
  discount_percentage decimal(5,2) [note: 'The percentage discount applied to the MSRP to arrive at the unit contracted price. Represents fleet pricing concession.']
  exterior_color_code varchar [note: 'The OEM color code for the exterior paint finish specified for vehicles in this line.']
  fleet_use_type varchar [note: 'The intended use category for the fleet vehicles: commercial (business operations), rental (rental fleet), government (public sector), corporate (executive/employee), utility (service/maintenance), or emergency (police/fire/EMS).']
  fulfillment_status varchar [note: 'The current fulfillment status of this contract line: pending (not yet started), in_production (vehicles being built), ready_for_delivery (built and awaiting shipment), partially_fulfilled (some units delivered), fully_fulfilled (all units delivered), or cancelled.']
  interior_color_code varchar [note: 'The OEM color code for the interior trim and upholstery specified for vehicles in this line.']
  last_modified_by_user_code varchar [note: 'The user ID of the person who last modified this contract line record. Audit trail for accountability.']
  last_modified_timestamp timestamp [note: 'The date and time when this contract line record was last updated. Audit trail for record changes.']
  line_number varchar [note: 'Sequential line item number within the parent fleet contract. Used for ordering and referencing specific allocations within the contract.']
  line_status varchar [note: 'The current administrative status of this contract line: active (in force), on_hold (temporarily suspended), cancelled (terminated), completed (fully delivered and closed), or amended (modified after creation).']
  model_year varchar [note: 'The model year (MY) of the vehicles allocated in this contract line. Represents the production year designation for the vehicle configuration.']
  msrp decimal(15,2) [note: 'The Manufacturer Suggested Retail Price (MSRP) for the vehicle configuration in this line. Used as baseline for discount calculations.']
  nameplate varchar [note: 'The brand and model nameplate of the vehicle allocated in this line (e.g., F-150, Silverado, Camry). Represents the commercial product identity.']
  planned_production_month varchar [note: 'The planned production month for vehicles in this line, in YYYY-MM format. Aligns with manufacturing scheduling and capacity planning.']
  powertrain_type varchar [note: 'The powertrain technology type for the vehicle: ICE (Internal Combustion Engine), EV (Electric Vehicle), HEV (Hybrid Electric Vehicle), PHEV (Plug-in Hybrid Electric Vehicle), or FCEV (Fuel Cell Electric Vehicle).']
  quantity_committed varchar [note: 'The total number of vehicle units committed under this contract line. Represents the contractual obligation for delivery.']
  quantity_fulfilled varchar [note: 'The number of vehicle units that have been delivered and fulfilled against this contract line to date.']
  quantity_remaining varchar [note: 'The number of vehicle units still pending delivery under this contract line. Calculated as quantity_committed minus quantity_fulfilled.']
  regulatory_compliance_notes varchar [note: 'Free-text notes documenting any special regulatory compliance requirements for vehicles in this line (e.g., CARB emissions, CAFE standards, safety certifications).']
  requested_delivery_date date [note: 'The customer-requested target delivery date for vehicles in this contract line. May differ from actual delivery schedule.']
  special_equipment_codes varchar [note: 'Comma-separated list of special equipment or option codes included in the vehicle configuration for this line (e.g., towing package, advanced safety features).']
  subscription_model_flag boolean [note: 'Whether line uses subscription/VaaS pricing']
  total_line_value decimal(18,2) [note: 'The total monetary value of this contract line, calculated as quantity_committed multiplied by unit_contracted_price.']
  trim_level varchar [note: 'The specific trim or equipment level of the vehicle (e.g., Base, XLT, Limited, Platinum). Defines the feature set and equipment package.']
  unit_contracted_price decimal(15,2) [note: 'The negotiated price per vehicle unit for this contract line. Represents the agreed-upon unit price before taxes and fees.']

  Note: 'Individual vehicle allocation line within a fleet contract specifying a particular nameplate, model year, trim, powertrain type (ICE/EV/HEV/PHEV), quantity committed, unit contracted price, and delivery window. Tracks fulfillment status per line against the parent fleet contract. Enables granular fleet order management and delivery scheduling.'
}

Table sales.msrp_schedule {
  msrp_schedule_id varchar [pk, note: 'Unique identifier for the MSRP schedule record. Primary key.']
  model_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the vehicle nameplate and configuration this MSRP applies to.']
  adas_level varchar [note: 'SAE automation level for ADAS features included in this configuration: Level 0 (no automation) through Level 5 (full automation). Impacts pricing and regulatory compliance.']
  advertising_fee decimal(10,2) [note: 'Regional or national advertising fee included in the MSRP to fund cooperative advertising programs. Disclosed separately on buyer\'s order.']
  approved_by varchar [note: 'Name or user ID of the pricing manager or executive who approved this MSRP schedule for publication.']
  approved_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Date and time when this MSRP schedule was approved for publication. Part of audit trail for pricing governance.']
  base_msrp decimal(12,2) [note: 'The base MSRP for the vehicle configuration before destination charge, options, taxes, or fees. Expressed in the schedule currency.']
  body_style varchar [note: 'The body style of the vehicle configuration (sedan, coupe, SUV, truck, van, wagon, convertible, hatchback). [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: sedan|coupe|suv|truck|van|wagon|convertible|hatchback — 8 candidates stripped; promote to reference product]']
  cafe_credit_value decimal(10,2) [note: 'CAFE credit or debit value for this vehicle configuration, used to calculate fleet-wide CAFE compliance. Positive for over-compliance, negative for under-compliance. Confidential regulatory data.']
  country_code varchar [note: 'Three-letter ISO 3166-1 alpha-3 country code where this MSRP applies (e.g., USA, CAN, MEX, DEU).']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Date and time when this MSRP schedule record was first created in the system. Part of audit trail.']
  currency_code varchar [note: 'Three-letter ISO 4217 currency code for the MSRP amounts (e.g., USD, CAD, EUR, MXN).']
  destination_charge decimal(10,2) [note: 'Standard destination and delivery charge applied to transport the vehicle from manufacturing plant to dealer. Mandated by federal regulation to be uniform within a market region.']
  digital_channel_flag boolean
  drivetrain varchar [note: 'Drivetrain configuration: FWD (Front-Wheel Drive), RWD (Rear-Wheel Drive), AWD (All-Wheel Drive), 4WD (Four-Wheel Drive).']
  effective_date date [note: 'The date from which this MSRP schedule becomes effective. Typically aligned with model year launch or mid-cycle pricing adjustments.']
  engine_code varchar [note: 'Internal engine code or designation (e.g., 2GR-FE, EcoBoost 3.5L V6). Links to engineering specifications.']
  epa_fuel_economy_city varchar [note: 'EPA-certified city fuel economy rating in miles per gallon (MPG) for ICE/HEV/PHEV, or MPGe (miles per gallon equivalent) for BEV/FCEV. Used for CAFE compliance and consumer disclosure.']
  epa_fuel_economy_combined varchar [note: 'EPA-certified combined fuel economy rating (55% city, 45% highway) in MPG or MPGe. Primary metric for CAFE and consumer comparison.']
  epa_fuel_economy_highway varchar [note: 'EPA-certified highway fuel economy rating in miles per gallon (MPG) or MPGe. Used for CAFE compliance and consumer disclosure.']
  expiration_date date [note: 'The date on which this MSRP schedule expires and is superseded by a new schedule. Null if currently active with no planned end date.']
  gas_guzzler_tax decimal(10,2) [note: 'Federal gas guzzler tax applied to vehicles with EPA fuel economy below statutory thresholds. Zero if not applicable.']
  holdback_amount decimal(10,2) [note: 'Manufacturer holdback amount paid to dealer after vehicle sale, typically 2-3% of MSRP. Used to support dealer cash flow and inventory financing. Confidential business data.']
  invoice_price decimal(12,2) [note: 'The dealer invoice price (wholesale cost to dealer) for this vehicle configuration. Used for dealer margin calculations and incentive programs. Confidential business data.']
  market_region varchar [note: 'Geographic market region or sales territory where this MSRP schedule applies (e.g., USA, Canada, Mexico, Europe). MSRP may vary by region due to regulatory requirements, taxes, and market conditions.']
  model_year varchar [note: 'The model year (MY) for which this MSRP schedule is effective. Typically ranges from current year to next year.']
  modified_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Date and time when this MSRP schedule record was last modified. Updated on any change to pricing, dates, or status.']
  nameplate varchar [note: 'The vehicle nameplate or model name (e.g., Camry, F-150, Model 3). Denormalized for reporting convenience.']
  ncap_safety_rating varchar [note: 'Overall NCAP safety rating (1-5 stars) for this vehicle configuration. Used for marketing and consumer safety disclosure. Null if not yet rated.']
  notes varchar [note: 'Free-text notes or comments about this MSRP schedule, such as rationale for mid-cycle adjustments, competitive positioning, or special market conditions.']
  online_price_flag decimal(18,2) [note: 'Whether this MSRP schedule applies to online/digital pricing']
  option_package_code varchar [note: 'Code representing the factory-installed option package or bundle (e.g., Premium Package, Technology Package, Winter Package). May be null for base configuration.']
  powertrain_type varchar [note: 'The powertrain type: ICE (Internal Combustion Engine), HEV (Hybrid Electric Vehicle), PHEV (Plug-in Hybrid Electric Vehicle), BEV (Battery Electric Vehicle), FCEV (Fuel Cell Electric Vehicle).']
  powertrain_warranty_miles varchar [note: 'Extended powertrain warranty duration in miles (e.g., 60,000 miles). Covers engine, transmission, drivetrain components.']
  powertrain_warranty_months varchar [note: 'Extended powertrain warranty duration in months (e.g., 60 months / 5 years). Typically longer than bumper-to-bumper warranty.']
  published_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Date and time when this MSRP schedule was published to dealer systems and public-facing channels (website, configurator, dealer portals).']
  schedule_number varchar [note: 'Business identifier for the MSRP schedule, typically assigned at model year launch or mid-cycle refresh. Format: MSRP-NNNNNN.']
  schedule_status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle status of the MSRP schedule: draft (pending approval), active (currently in effect), superseded (replaced by newer schedule), archived (historical record).']
  schedule_type varchar [note: 'Type of MSRP schedule: launch (initial model year pricing), mid_cycle (mid-year adjustment), promotional (temporary special pricing), fleet (commercial/fleet pricing).']
  total_msrp decimal(12,2) [note: 'Total MSRP including base price, destination charge, gas guzzler tax, and any mandatory fees. Excludes dealer-installed accessories and local taxes.']
  transmission_type varchar [note: 'Type of transmission: manual, automatic, CVT (Continuously Variable Transmission), DCT (Dual-Clutch Transmission).']
  trim_level varchar [note: 'The trim level or grade of the vehicle (e.g., Base, LE, XLE, Limited, Platinum). Defines the standard equipment package.']
  warranty_miles varchar [note: 'Standard manufacturer warranty duration in miles (e.g., 36,000 miles). Warranty expires at the earlier of months or miles threshold.']
  warranty_months varchar [note: 'Standard manufacturer warranty duration in months (e.g., 36 months / 3 years). Used for warranty cost accrual and customer communication.']

  Note: 'Official Manufacturer Suggested Retail Price schedule for each vehicle nameplate, model year, trim level, and option package combination. Captures base MSRP, destination and delivery charge, gas guzzler tax (if applicable), effective date, market region, and currency. Serves as the pricing reference baseline for all quotes, orders, and incentive calculations. Updated at model year launch and mid-cycle adjustments.'
}

Table sales.sales_territory {
  sales_territory_id varchar [pk, note: 'Unique identifier for the sales territory. Primary key.']
  primary_sales_manager_employee_id varchar [note: 'FK to workforce.employee']
  rep_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the sales manager responsible for this territory. Links to employee or sales representative master data.']
  sales_employee_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the regional director overseeing this territory. Represents the next level of sales leadership hierarchy.']
  tertiary_sales_regional_director_employee_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the regional director overseeing this territory. Represents the next level of sales leadership hierarchy.']
  annual_quota_revenue decimal(18,2) [note: 'Annual revenue quota target for this territory in the base currency. Represents expected sales value including MSRP and incentives.']
  annual_quota_units varchar [note: 'Annual sales quota for this territory measured in vehicle units. Used for performance tracking and incentive calculation.']
  competitive_intensity varchar [note: 'Assessment of competitive pressure in the territory based on number of competing brands, dealer density, and market share dynamics.']
  country_code varchar [note: 'Three-letter ISO 3166-1 alpha-3 country code where the territory operates (e.g., USA, CAN, MEX, DEU, CHN).']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when this territory record was first created in the system. Used for audit trail and data lineage tracking.']
  dealer_count varchar [note: 'Number of authorized dealerships operating within this territory. Used for dealer network density analysis and coverage planning.']
  digital_channel_flag boolean
  distribution_channel varchar [note: 'Primary distribution channel used in this territory. Direct represents OEM-owned sales, dealer represents franchised network, fleet serves corporate buyers, online covers digital sales, and export handles international shipments.']
  district_code varchar [note: 'Code identifying the district within the region. Represents a mid-level geographic or organizational subdivision.']
  district_name varchar [note: 'Name of the district (e.g., \'Northeast District\', \'Southern California District\').']
  ecommerce_enabled_flag boolean [note: 'Whether territory supports e-commerce direct sales']
  effective_end_date date [note: 'Date when this territory configuration expires or is superseded. Null for currently active territories. Supports territory history and audit trails.']
  effective_start_date date [note: 'Date when this territory configuration becomes active. Used for territory realignment and historical tracking.']
  fiscal_year varchar [note: 'Fiscal year for which the territory configuration and quotas are defined (e.g., FY2024, FY2025). Aligns with corporate financial planning cycles.']
  household_count varchar [note: 'Number of households in the territory. Key metric for retail automotive market potential analysis.']
  incentive_program_code varchar [note: 'Code of the primary sales incentive program applicable to this territory. Links to dealer incentive and rebate programs.']
  language_code varchar [note: 'Primary language code for customer communication and marketing materials in this territory (e.g., en, es, fr, de, zh). Follows ISO 639-1 two-letter codes.']
  last_modified_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp of the most recent update to this territory record. Supports change tracking and data quality monitoring.']
  market_segment varchar [note: 'Primary market segment focus for this territory. Determines product mix, pricing strategy, and customer targeting approach.']
  median_household_income decimal(12,2) [note: 'Median household income in the territory. Used for market segmentation and product mix planning (luxury vs. mass market).']
  model_year_focus varchar [note: 'Primary model year of vehicles being sold in this territory (e.g., MY2024, MY2025). Reflects inventory and product launch timing.']
  modified_by_user varchar [note: 'User ID or name of the person who last modified this territory record. Supports accountability and audit requirements.']
  notes varchar [note: 'Free-text notes capturing special considerations, territory-specific strategies, market conditions, or operational instructions for sales teams.']
  population_count varchar [note: 'Total population within the territory boundaries. Used for market sizing and potential customer base estimation.']
  postal_code_range varchar [note: 'Postal code or ZIP code ranges covered by this territory (e.g., \'90001-90099, 91001-91199\'). Used for geographic assignment of leads and customers.']
  priority varchar [note: 'Strategic priority level assigned to this territory for resource allocation, investment, and management attention. Strategic territories receive highest focus and support.']
  quota_currency_code varchar [note: 'Three-letter ISO 4217 currency code for quota and revenue targets (e.g., USD, EUR, CNY, JPY).']
  region_code varchar [note: 'Code identifying the parent region in the geographic hierarchy (e.g., national, regional, district level). Used for roll-up reporting and regional performance tracking.']
  region_name varchar [note: 'Name of the parent region (e.g., \'North America\', \'Western Europe\', \'Asia Pacific\').']
  regulatory_region varchar [note: 'Regulatory jurisdiction or compliance region (e.g., EPA, CARB, Euro NCAP, UNECE). Determines applicable emissions standards, safety requirements, and homologation rules.']
  sales_office_code varchar [note: 'Code of the primary sales office serving this territory. Links to SAP SD sales organization structure.']
  sales_organization_code varchar [note: 'SAP sales organization code responsible for this territory. Represents the legal entity or business unit managing sales operations.']
  state_province_code varchar [note: 'State or province code within the country (e.g., CA for California, ON for Ontario, TX for Texas). May contain multiple values if territory spans multiple states.']
  territory_code varchar [note: 'Business identifier code for the sales territory used across systems and reporting. Typically alphanumeric format following regional coding standards.']
  territory_name varchar [note: 'Full descriptive name of the sales territory (e.g., \'Northeast Region - Metro\', \'California Fleet Sales Zone\').']
  territory_status varchar [note: 'Current operational status of the territory. Active territories are operational, inactive are closed, suspended are temporarily paused, planned are future territories, consolidating are merging with others, and splitting are being divided.']
  territory_type varchar [note: 'Classification of the territory by sales channel or customer segment. Retail serves individual consumers, fleet serves corporate fleet buyers, export covers international markets, commercial targets business customers, government serves public sector, and dealer_network represents indirect sales through franchised dealers.']
  time_zone varchar [note: 'Primary time zone for the territory (e.g., America/New_York, Europe/Berlin, Asia/Shanghai). Used for scheduling and operational coordination.']
  vehicle_category_focus varchar [note: 'Primary vehicle categories sold in this territory (e.g., \'SUV, Truck\', \'Sedan, EV\', \'Commercial Vehicles\'). Reflects regional demand patterns and product strategy.']
  vehicle_registration_count varchar [note: 'Total number of registered vehicles in the territory. Indicates market saturation and replacement demand potential.']
  zone_code varchar [note: 'Code identifying the zone within the district. Represents the most granular level of the territory hierarchy.']
  zone_name varchar [note: 'Name of the zone (e.g., \'Manhattan Zone\', \'Orange County Zone\').']

  Note: 'Geographic or channel-based sales territory definition used to assign sales representatives, dealers, and regional managers to specific market areas. Captures territory code, territory name, region hierarchy (national/regional/district/zone), assigned sales manager, territory type (retail/fleet/export), and effective dates. Supports regional sales performance tracking and quota allocation.'
}

Table sales.rep {
  rep_id varchar [pk, note: 'Unique identifier for the OEM direct sales representative. Primary key.']
  channel_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to sales.channel. Business justification: Normalize channel reference; replace string attribute with FK to channel.']
  primary_rep_crm_user_employee_id varchar [note: 'User identifier in Salesforce Automotive Cloud. Used to link sales activities, opportunities, and customer interactions to this representative.']
  tertiary_rep_manager_employee_id varchar [note: 'Employee identifier of the direct manager or regional sales manager overseeing this sales representative. Used for reporting hierarchy and approval workflows.']
  active_status boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the sales representative is currently active and eligible for lead assignment and quota tracking. False indicates inactive (terminated, on leave, or transferred out of sales).']
  certification_expiry_date date [note: 'Date when the current sales certification expires and recertification is required. Null if certification does not expire or is not required for the role.']
  certification_status varchar [note: 'Status of the representative\'s sales certification or training completion. Certified indicates all required product, compliance, and sales methodology training is current. Used for dealer-facing role authorization and advanced product sales eligibility.']
  commission_plan_code varchar [note: 'Identifier for the incentive compensation plan assigned to the representative. Links to commission structure, bonus tiers, and payout rules in the compensation management system.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when this sales representative record was first created in the system. Used for audit trail and data lineage tracking.']
  crm_user_code varchar [note: 'User identifier in Salesforce Automotive Cloud. Used to link sales activities, opportunities, and customer interactions to this representative.']
  dealer_count varchar [note: 'Number of dealerships assigned to this representative for relationship management and sales support. Applicable primarily to retail field reps and dealer development roles.']
  digital_channel_flag boolean
  digital_sales_certified_flag boolean [note: 'Whether rep is certified for digital/online sales']
  email_address varchar [note: 'Primary corporate email address for the sales representative. Used for customer communication and system notifications.']
  first_name varchar [note: 'Legal first name of the sales representative.']
  fiscal_year varchar [note: 'Fiscal year for which the current quota is assigned. Used for year-over-year performance comparison and quota planning.']
  fleet_account_count varchar [note: 'Number of fleet or commercial accounts assigned to this representative. Applicable primarily to fleet account managers and national account executives.']
  hire_date date [note: 'Date the sales representative was hired by the OEM. Used for tenure calculation and eligibility for tenure-based incentives.']
  language_proficiency varchar [note: 'Comma-separated list of languages the representative is proficient in (e.g., English, Spanish, Mandarin). Used for customer matching and international account assignment.']
  last_name varchar [note: 'Legal last name of the sales representative.']
  mobile_number varchar [note: 'Mobile phone number for field sales representative. Used for on-the-go communication and CRM mobile app access.']
  modified_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when this sales representative record was last modified. Used for change tracking and data synchronization across systems.']
  notes varchar [note: 'Free-text field for additional information about the sales representative, such as special skills, awards, territory transition notes, or temporary assignment details.']
  office_location varchar [note: 'Primary office or branch location where the representative is based (e.g., Detroit HQ, Los Angeles Regional Office, Remote). Used for travel planning and regional coordination.']
  performance_tier varchar [note: 'Current performance classification based on quota attainment, customer satisfaction (NPS), and other KPIs. Used for recognition programs, incentive multipliers, and career development planning.']
  phone_number varchar [note: 'Primary business phone number for the sales representative. Used for dealer and customer contact.']
  product_specialization varchar [note: 'Primary product line or vehicle segment specialization (e.g., Electric Vehicles, Commercial Trucks, Luxury Sedans, SUVs, Performance Vehicles). Used for lead routing and expert assignment in Salesforce Automotive Cloud.']
  quota_amount decimal(18,2) [note: 'Annual or period-based sales quota target assigned to the representative, expressed in the base currency. Used for performance measurement and incentive compensation calculation.']
  quota_currency varchar [note: 'Three-letter ISO 4217 currency code for the quota amount (e.g., USD, EUR, JPY). Supports multi-currency sales operations.']
  quota_period varchar [note: 'Time period over which the quota is measured (annual, quarterly, or monthly). Aligns with fiscal year and performance review cycles.']
  region varchar [note: 'Higher-level geographic region grouping multiple territories (e.g., North America, Europe, Asia Pacific, Latin America). Used for regional performance rollup and management hierarchy.']
  sales_role varchar [note: 'Functional sales role classification defining the representative\'s primary responsibility area. Retail field reps manage dealer relationships, fleet account managers handle commercial fleet sales, national account executives manage large enterprise accounts, export sales covers international markets, regional sales managers oversee territories, and dealer development focuses on dealer network expansion.']
  sales_start_date date [note: 'Date the representative began their current sales role or territory assignment. May differ from hire_date if the employee transferred from another department or role.']
  sales_territory_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to sales.sales_territory. Business justification: Link sales_rep to its sales territory for proper reporting; replace string code with FK.']
  termination_date date [note: 'Date the sales representative\'s employment or sales role ended. Null for active representatives. Used for historical performance analysis and territory reassignment.']
  work_arrangement varchar [note: 'Primary work location arrangement. Field-based representatives spend majority of time visiting dealers or customers; office-based work from regional offices; hybrid split time; remote work from home.']

  Note: 'Master record for OEM direct sales representatives and field sales personnel responsible for managing dealer relationships, fleet accounts, and direct sales channels. Captures employee reference, assigned territory, sales role (retail field rep, fleet account manager, national account executive, export sales), quota assignment, certification status, and active status. Distinct from dealer-side sales staff managed in the dealer domain.'
}

Table sales.quota {
  quota_id varchar [pk, note: 'Unique identifier for the sales quota record. Primary key.']
  assignee_rep_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key reference to the entity assigned this quota. Interpretation depends on assignee_type: references sales_representative, dealership, territory, region, or team table.']
  dealer_incentive_program_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key reference to the incentive program associated with this quota. Null if quota is not tied to a specific incentive program.']
  dealership_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key reference to the dealership this quota is assigned to. Null if quota is not dealership-specific.']
  employee_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key reference to the entity assigned this quota. Interpretation depends on assignee_type: references sales_representative, dealership, territory, region, or team table.']
  quota_rep_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key reference to the individual sales representative this quota is assigned to. Null if quota is not individual-specific.']
  quota_sales_representative_rep_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key reference to the individual sales representative this quota is assigned to. Null if quota is not individual-specific.']
  regional_sales_plan_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to sales.regional_sales_plan. Business justification: Sales quotas are derived from and allocated against regional sales plans. Adding regional_sales_plan_id to quota creates the direct link between individual rep/dealer quotas and the regional plan they']
  sales_territory_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key reference to the sales territory this quota is assigned to. Null if quota is not territory-specific.']
  approval_status varchar [note: 'Approval workflow status for the quota: pending (awaiting approval), approved (management approved), rejected (not approved), revision_required (sent back for changes).']
  approved_by varchar [note: 'Name or identifier of the manager or executive who approved this quota. Null if not yet approved.']
  approved_date date [note: 'Date on which the quota was approved by management. Null if not yet approved.']
  assignee_name varchar [note: 'Human-readable name of the quota assignee (representative name, dealer name, territory name, etc.) for reporting and display purposes.']
  assignee_type varchar [note: 'Type of entity to which the quota is assigned: sales_representative (individual salesperson), dealer (dealership entity), territory (geographic sales territory), region (multi-territory region), district (sales district), zone (sales zone), team (sales team). [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: sales_representative|dealer|territory|region|district|zone|team — 7 candidates stripped; promote to reference product]']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the quota record was first created in the system, in format yyyy-MM-ddTHH:mm:ss.SSSXXX.']
  digital_channel_flag boolean
  fiscal_month varchar [note: 'Fiscal month within the fiscal year (M01 through M12). Null if quota is quarterly or annual.']
  fiscal_quarter varchar [note: 'Fiscal quarter within the fiscal year (Q1, Q2, Q3, Q4). Null if quota is annual or monthly.']
  fiscal_year varchar [note: 'Fiscal year for which the quota is assigned, in format FYYYYYYY (e.g., FY2024). Aligns with corporate fiscal calendar.']
  incentive_eligible boolean [note: 'Boolean flag indicating whether achievement of this quota makes the assignee eligible for incentive compensation (True) or is a non-incentivized target (False).']
  model_year varchar [note: 'Model year of vehicles covered by this quota (e.g., MY2024). Used when quota is specific to a model year production run. Null if quota spans multiple model years.']
  modified_by varchar [note: 'User identifier or name of the person who last modified the quota record.']
  modified_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the quota record was last modified, in format yyyy-MM-ddTHH:mm:ss.SSSXXX.']
  notes varchar [note: 'Free-text notes or comments regarding the quota assignment, special conditions, or context for sales management and reporting.']
  period_end_date date [note: 'End date of the quota performance period. Defines when quota measurement concludes.']
  period_start_date date [note: 'Start date of the quota performance period. Defines when quota measurement begins.']
  powertrain_type varchar [note: 'Powertrain type this quota applies to: ICE (Internal Combustion Engine), HEV (Hybrid Electric Vehicle), PHEV (Plug-in Hybrid Electric Vehicle), BEV (Battery Electric Vehicle), FCEV (Fuel Cell Electric Vehicle), all (applies to all powertrains). Null if not powertrain-specific.']
  product_line varchar [note: 'Specific product line or brand this quota applies to (e.g., premium brand, economy brand, commercial line). Null if quota applies to all product lines.']
  quota_name varchar [note: 'Descriptive name for the quota assignment, e.g., \'Q1 FY2024 Northeast Region EV Target\' or \'Annual MY2024 Fleet Sales Goal\'.']
  quota_number varchar [note: 'Human-readable business identifier for the quota assignment, typically following format QTA-YYYYNNNN.']
  quota_status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle status of the quota: draft (under review), approved (management approved), active (in effect), suspended (temporarily paused), closed (period ended), cancelled (voided before completion).']
  quota_type varchar [note: 'Classification of the quota by measurement type: unit_volume (vehicle units sold), revenue (dollar/currency target), ev_mix (Electric Vehicle penetration percentage), fleet_penetration (commercial fleet sales), market_share (regional market share target), model_mix (specific model line targets).']
  region_code varchar [note: 'Three-letter geographic region code where quota applies (e.g., USA, CAN, MEX, DEU, GBR, CHN, JPN). Follows ISO 3166-1 alpha-3 country codes or internal regional codes.']
  revision_number varchar [note: 'Version number of the quota record, incremented each time the quota is revised or adjusted. Initial version is 1.']
  revision_reason varchar [note: 'Business reason for the most recent revision to the quota (e.g., \'Market conditions adjustment\', \'Territory realignment\', \'Product launch delay\'). Null if no revisions have been made.']
  sales_channel varchar [note: 'Sales channel this quota applies to: retail (individual consumer sales), fleet (corporate fleet sales), commercial (business sales), government (government contracts), direct (OEM direct sales), dealer_network (indirect dealer sales). Null if applies to all channels.']
  subscription_quota_amount decimal(18,2) [note: 'Quota target for subscription/VaaS sales']
  target_unit varchar [note: 'Unit of measure for the target_value: units (vehicle count), currency codes (USD, EUR, GBP, JPY, CNY), percentage (for mix/share targets), market_points (for market share basis points). [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: units|usd|eur|gbp|jpy|cny|percentage|market_points — 8 candidates stripped; promote to reference product]']
  target_value decimal(18,2) [note: 'Numeric target value for the quota. Interpretation depends on quota_type: unit count for unit_volume, currency amount for revenue, percentage for ev_mix or market_share.']
  threshold_minimum decimal(18,2) [note: 'Minimum performance threshold (as percentage of target_value or absolute value) required for any incentive payout or recognition. Null if no minimum threshold applies.']
  threshold_stretch decimal(18,2) [note: 'Stretch performance threshold (as percentage of target_value or absolute value) that triggers maximum incentive payout or recognition. Null if no stretch threshold applies.']
  vehicle_segment varchar [note: 'Vehicle segment or category this quota applies to (e.g., sedan, SUV, truck, commercial, luxury). Null if quota applies to all segments. [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: sedan|suv|truck|crossover|van|commercial|luxury|compact|midsize — promote to reference product]']
  created_by varchar [note: 'User identifier or name of the person who created the quota record.']

  Note: 'Sales volume and revenue quota assigned to a sales representative, dealer, sales territory, or regional team for a defined period (monthly, quarterly, annual). Captures quota type (unit volume, revenue, EV mix, fleet penetration), target value, model year or fiscal period, assigned entity type and reference, and quota approval status. Enables sales performance tracking against targets.'
}

Table sales.activity {
  activity_id varchar [pk, note: 'Unique identifier for the sales activity record. Primary key.']
  activity_customer_party_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the customer account associated with this sales activity.']
  activity_party_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the customer account associated with this sales activity.']
  activity_rep_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the sales representative who performed or is responsible for this sales activity.']
  activity_sales_representative_rep_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the sales representative who performed or is responsible for this sales activity.']
  activity_vehicle_vin_registry_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the specific vehicle that was the subject of this sales activity, if applicable (e.g., test drive, demo).']
  activity_vin_registry_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the specific vehicle that was the subject of this sales activity, if applicable (e.g., test drive, demo).']
  campaign_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the marketing campaign that generated or is associated with this sales activity.']
  channel_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to sales.channel. Business justification: Channel identifies the sales channel used for the activity; a FK to sales.channel provides a controlled reference and eliminates the free‑text column.']
  competitor_vehicle_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to sales.competitor_vehicle. Business justification: Standardize competitor vehicle reference; replace free‑text with FK to competitor_vehicle.']
  contact_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the specific contact person involved in this sales activity.']
  contact_point_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the specific contact person involved in this sales activity.']
  created_by_employee_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to workforce.employee. Business justification: Activity logging audit needs the employee who created the sales activity.']
  dealership_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the dealership location where the sales activity took place or is associated with.']
  lead_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the lead record associated with this sales activity, if the activity is related to a lead.']
  opportunity_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the opportunity record associated with this sales activity, if the activity is related to an opportunity.']
  quote_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to sales.quote. Business justification: Sales activities include quote presentation events. The activity table has a quote_presented boolean flag but no FK to the specific quote. Adding quote_id to activity enables tracking which specific q']
  sales_territory_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to sales.sales_territory. Business justification: Sales activity occurs within a sales territory; linking to sales_territory enables consistent reporting and removes the free‑text territory column.']
  activity_date date [note: 'The date on which the sales activity occurred or is scheduled to occur.']
  activity_description varchar [note: 'Detailed description or notes about the sales activity, capturing key discussion points, customer feedback, and action items.']
  activity_number varchar [note: 'Business-facing unique identifier for the sales activity, typically system-generated in format ACT-########.']
  activity_status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle status of the sales activity indicating whether it is scheduled, in progress, completed, cancelled, no-show, or rescheduled.']
  activity_type varchar [note: 'Classification of the sales activity indicating the nature of the interaction (call, email, test drive, demo, site visit, proposal presentation, follow-up, negotiation, or other). [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: call|email|meeting|test_drive|demo|site_visit|proposal_presentation|follow_up|negotiation|other — 10 candidates stripped; promote to reference product]']
  competitor_mentioned varchar [note: 'Name of any competitor brand or product mentioned by the customer during the sales activity.']
  created_by_user_code varchar [note: 'Reference to the user who created this sales activity record in the system.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when this sales activity record was first created in the system.']
  currency_code varchar [note: 'Three-letter ISO 4217 currency code for the estimated deal value (e.g., USD, EUR, GBP).']
  customer_sentiment varchar [note: 'Qualitative assessment of the customer\'s sentiment or attitude during the sales activity (very positive, positive, neutral, negative, very negative).']
  demo_completed boolean [note: 'Boolean flag indicating whether a product demonstration was completed as part of this sales activity.']
  digital_channel_flag boolean
  duration_minutes varchar [note: 'The duration of the sales activity in minutes, calculated or manually entered.']
  end_timestamp timestamp [note: 'The precise date and time when the sales activity ended or is scheduled to end.']
  estimated_deal_value decimal(15,2) [note: 'Estimated monetary value of the potential deal discussed or progressed during this sales activity, in the base currency.']
  field_service_info varchar [note: 'Field service related information, consolidating field service concepts.']
  fiscal_quarter varchar [note: 'Fiscal quarter in which the sales activity occurred (Q1, Q2, Q3, Q4).']
  fiscal_year varchar [note: 'Fiscal year in which the sales activity occurred, in format FY#### (e.g., FY2024).']
  is_commercial_vehicle boolean [note: 'Boolean flag indicating whether this sales activity involves a commercial vehicle.']
  is_fleet_sale boolean [note: 'Boolean flag indicating whether this sales activity is related to a fleet sale opportunity.']
  location varchar [note: 'Physical or virtual location where the sales activity took place (e.g., dealership showroom, customer site, online).']
  model_year varchar [note: 'Model year of the vehicle discussed in the sales activity, in format MY#### (e.g., MY2024).']
  modified_by_user_code varchar [note: 'Reference to the user who last modified this sales activity record in the system.']
  modified_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when this sales activity record was last modified in the system.']
  next_action varchar [note: 'Description of the next planned action or follow-up step resulting from this sales activity.']
  next_action_date date [note: 'The scheduled date for the next follow-up action or activity.']
  objection_raised varchar [note: 'Description of any objections or concerns raised by the customer during the sales activity.']
  objection_resolved boolean [note: 'Boolean flag indicating whether the customer\'s objection was successfully resolved during the activity.']
  outcome varchar [note: 'The result or outcome of the sales activity indicating whether it was successful, unsuccessful, pending, no contact made, customer interested, not interested, or callback requested. [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: successful|unsuccessful|pending|no_contact|interested|not_interested|callback_requested — 7 candidates stripped; promote to reference product]']
  priority varchar [note: 'Priority level assigned to the sales activity indicating its urgency and importance (low, medium, high, urgent).']
  quote_presented boolean [note: 'Boolean flag indicating whether a price quote or proposal was presented during this sales activity.']
  region varchar [note: 'Geographic sales region where the activity took place or is associated with.']
  start_timestamp timestamp [note: 'The precise date and time when the sales activity started or is scheduled to start.']
  subject varchar [note: 'Brief subject or title of the sales activity describing the purpose or topic of the interaction.']
  test_drive_completed boolean [note: 'Boolean flag indicating whether a test drive was completed as part of this sales activity.']

  Note: 'Record of a sales-related interaction or activity logged against a lead, opportunity, or customer account. Captures activity type (call, email, test drive, demo, site visit, proposal presentation), activity date and time, outcome, next action, associated opportunity or lead reference, and sales rep performing the activity. Sourced from Salesforce Automotive Cloud Activity/Task/Event objects. Supports pipeline velocity and conversion analysis.'
}

  model_id varchar [note: 'Model test driven']
  opportunity_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to sales.opportunity. Business justification: A sales test drive is generated as part of a sales opportunity; adding opportunity_id FK links each test drive to its originating opportunity, eliminating the silo and enabling reporting across the sa']

  rep_employee_id varchar
  rep_id varchar [note: 'Sales rep who facilitated the test drive']
  vin_registry_id varchar [note: 'FK to vehicle.vin_registry']

  scheduled_timestamp timestamp
  test_drive_date date [note: 'Date of the test drive']

  Note: 'Record of a scheduled or completed vehicle test drive event conducted with a prospect or customer.
