  ev_penetration_target_percentage decimal(5,2) [note: 'Target percentage of electric vehicle sales within the total volume mix, supporting electrification strategy.']
  ev_volume_units varchar [note: 'Planned sales volume for battery electric vehicles.']
  fiscal_quarter varchar [note: 'Fiscal quarter within the fiscal year for quarterly planning granularity.']
  fiscal_year varchar [note: 'Fiscal year for which this regional sales plan is defined, following the company\'s fiscal calendar.']
  fleet_mix_percentage decimal(5,2) [note: 'Target percentage of total volume allocated to fleet and commercial sales channels.']
  hev_volume_units varchar [note: 'Planned sales volume for hybrid electric vehicles.']
  ice_volume_units varchar [note: 'Planned sales volume for internal combustion engine vehicles.']
  incentive_budget_amount decimal(18,2) [note: 'Total incentive budget allocated to this regional sales plan for customer and dealer incentives.']
  last_modified_by_user_code varchar [note: 'Identifier for the user who last modified this regional sales plan record.']
  last_modified_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when this regional sales plan record was last updated.']
  market_zone varchar [note: 'Sub-regional market zone or territory grouping within the broader sales region.']
  minimum_volume_units varchar [note: 'Minimum acceptable sales volume threshold for the planning period.']
  model_year varchar [note: 'Model year designation for vehicles covered by this sales plan, critical for product lifecycle planning.']
  nameplate varchar [note: 'Vehicle nameplate or model line covered by this regional sales plan.']
  phev_volume_units varchar [note: 'Planned sales volume for plug-in hybrid electric vehicles.']
  plan_name varchar [note: 'Descriptive name of the regional sales plan for identification and reporting purposes.']
  plan_notes varchar [note: 'Free-text notes capturing assumptions, constraints, and strategic context for the regional sales plan.']
  plan_number varchar [note: 'Business identifier for the regional sales plan, used for external reference and reporting.']
  plan_status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle status of the regional sales plan in the approval and execution workflow.']
  plan_type varchar [note: 'Classification of the sales plan by planning horizon and purpose.']
  planning_period_end_date date [note: 'End date of the planning period covered by this regional sales plan.']
  planning_period_start_date date [note: 'Start date of the planning period covered by this regional sales plan.']
  powertrain_type varchar [note: 'Powertrain technology type for this plan segment. [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: ICE|EV|HEV|PHEV|FCEV|diesel|gasoline|hybrid — promote to reference product]']
  region_code varchar [note: 'Code identifying the sales region or market zone for which this plan is defined.']
  region_name varchar [note: 'Descriptive name of the sales region or market zone covered by this plan.']
  retail_mix_percentage decimal(5,2) [note: 'Target percentage of total volume allocated to retail sales channels.']
  revision_number varchar [note: 'Version number tracking revisions and amendments to the regional sales plan.']
  revision_reason varchar [note: 'Business justification for revisions or amendments to the original plan.']
  sales_channel varchar [note: 'Primary sales channel for which this plan is defined.']
  stretch_volume_units varchar [note: 'Stretch or aspirational sales volume target representing best-case scenario.']
  target_revenue_amount decimal(18,2) [note: 'Planned revenue target for the region and planning period in the specified currency.']
  target_volume_units varchar [note: 'Planned sales volume in units for the region and planning period.']
  vehicle_segment varchar [note: 'Vehicle segment classification for planning and mix analysis. [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: sedan|suv|truck|van|coupe|hatchback|crossover|commercial — 8 candidates stripped; promote to reference product]']

  Note: 'Annual or quarterly sales volume and mix plan for a specific sales region or market zone, defining target unit volumes by nameplate, powertrain type (ICE/EV/HEV/PHEV), and channel. Captures planning period, region reference, planned volumes by model, EV penetration targets, revenue targets, and plan approval status. Supports top-down quota cascading and regional performance management. Distinct from individual quota records which are assigned to reps or dealers.'
}

Table sales.dealer_rep_assignment {
  dealer_rep_assignment_id varchar [pk, note: 'Primary key for the DealerRepAssignment association']
  dealership_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to the dealership master record']
  rep_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to the sales_rep master record']
  sales_territory_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to sales.sales_territory. Business justification: A dealer-rep assignment is always within a specific sales territory. The current model stores territory_code as a denormalized string. Adding sales_territory_id normalizes this reference, enabling ter']
  assignment_type varchar [note: 'Type of assignment (primary, backup, temporary)']
  digital_channel_flag boolean
  digital_lead_assignment_flag boolean [note: 'Whether assignment originated from digital lead routing']
  end_date date [note: 'Date the sales_rep assignment to the dealership ends (null if active)']
  field_service_info varchar [note: 'Field service related information, consolidating field service concepts.']
  is_active boolean [note: 'Whether assignment is currently active']
  role varchar [note: 'Specific sales role for this assignment (e.g., Retail Field Rep, Fleet Account Manager)']
  start_date date [note: 'Date the sales_rep assignment to the dealership begins']

  Note: 'Represents the assignment of a sales representative to a dealership, capturing the period of assignment and the specific role the rep plays for that dealership.. Existence Justification: OEM sales representatives are assigned to multiple dealerships, and each dealership can have multiple sales representatives. The assignment is actively managed by the business with start/end dates and a role for each rep‑dealership pairing, and the relationship is tracked as a standalone entity.'
}

Table sales.configurator_session {
  configurator_session_id varchar [pk, note: 'Primary key']
  configuration_id varchar [note: 'FK to vehicle configuration built']
  dealership_id varchar [note: 'FK to dealership if session is dealer-linked']
  lead_id varchar [note: 'FK to lead if session generated a lead']
  model_id varchar [note: 'FK to vehicle model selected']
  party_id varchar [note: 'FK to customer party']
  channel varchar [note: 'Channel used (web, mobile_app, in_dealer_kiosk)']
  conversion_flag boolean [note: 'Whether session converted to a lead or order']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Record creation timestamp']
  currency_code varchar [note: 'Currency code for pricing']
  device_type varchar [note: 'Device type (desktop, tablet, mobile)']
  fi_interest_flag boolean [note: 'Whether user explored financing options']
  field_service_info varchar [note: 'Field service related information, consolidating field service concepts.']
  geo_region varchar [note: 'Geographic region of user']
  market_country_code varchar [note: 'Country code of market']
  monthly_payment_estimate decimal(18,2) [note: 'Estimated monthly payment shown']
  saved_configuration_code varchar [note: 'Unique code for saved configuration share/retrieve']
  selected_exterior_color varchar [note: 'Exterior color chosen']
  selected_interior_color varchar [note: 'Interior color chosen']
  selected_packages varchar [note: 'Comma-separated list of option package codes selected']
  selected_powertrain varchar [note: 'Powertrain option selected']
  selected_trim_code varchar [note: 'Trim level selected during session']
  session_duration_seconds varchar [note: 'Total duration of session in seconds']
  session_end_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when configurator session ended']
  session_start_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when configurator session started']
  session_status varchar [note: 'Status (in_progress, completed, abandoned, converted_to_order)']
  subscription_interest_flag boolean [note: 'Whether user explored subscription/VaaS options']
  total_configured_price decimal(18,2) [note: 'Total MSRP of configured vehicle']
  trade_in_estimate_amount decimal(18,2) [note: 'Estimated trade-in value if provided']
  utm_campaign varchar [note: 'Marketing attribution campaign']
  utm_source varchar [note: 'Marketing attribution source']

  Note: 'Captures online vehicle configurator sessions where customers build and customize vehicles digitally before purchase.'
}

Table sales.online_order {
  online_order_id varchar [pk, note: 'Primary key']
  configuration_id varchar [note: 'FK to vehicle configuration ordered']
  configurator_session_id varchar [note: 'FK to originating configurator session']
  dealership_id varchar [note: 'FK to fulfilling dealership']
  fi_contract_id varchar [note: 'FK to F&I contract if financing selected']
  party_id varchar [note: 'FK to customer party']
  subscription_sales_link_id varchar [note: 'FK to subscription sales link if VaaS']
  trade_in_id varchar [note: 'FK to trade-in record']
  vehicle_order_id varchar [note: 'FK to vehicle order']
  actual_delivery_date date [note: 'Actual delivery date']
  cancellation_reason varchar [note: 'Reason if order cancelled']
  cancellation_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp of cancellation']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Record creation timestamp']
  currency_code varchar [note: 'Currency code']
  delivery_address varchar [note: 'Home delivery address if applicable']
  delivery_preference varchar [note: 'Delivery preference (dealer_pickup, home_delivery)']
  deposit_amount decimal(18,2) [note: 'Reservation/deposit amount paid']
  deposit_payment_method varchar [note: 'Payment method for deposit']
  digital_signature_flag boolean [note: 'Whether digitally signed']
  estimated_delivery_date date [note: 'Estimated delivery date']
  financing_type varchar [note: 'Financing type selected (cash, finance, lease, subscription)']
  market_country_code varchar [note: 'Market country code']
  order_channel varchar [note: 'Digital channel (website, mobile_app, marketplace)']
  order_date date [note: 'Date order was placed']
  order_number varchar [note: 'Unique online order number']
  order_status varchar [note: 'Status (pending, confirmed, in_production, shipped, delivered, cancelled)']
  order_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Exact timestamp of order placement']
  total_vehicle_price decimal(18,2) [note: 'Total vehicle price including options']
  trade_in_flag boolean [note: 'Whether trade-in is included']
  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Record last update timestamp']

  Note: 'Direct-to-consumer e-commerce vehicle orders placed through digital channels without dealer visit.'
}

Table sales.cpo_listing {
  cpo_listing_id varchar [pk, note: 'Primary key']
  dealership_id varchar [note: 'FK to selling dealership']
  fi_contract_id varchar [note: 'FK to F&I contract if financed']
  sales_incentive_program_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to sales.sales_incentive_program. Business justification: CPO programs are often supported by OEM-sponsored incentive programs offering special financing rates or cash allowances on certified pre-owned vehicles. Adding sales_incentive_program_id to cpo_listi']
  used_vehicle_appraisal_id varchar [note: 'FK to dealer appraisal record']

  asking_price decimal(18,2) [note: 'Listed asking price']

  currency_code varchar [note: 'Currency code']
  days_on_lot varchar [note: 'Number of days on lot before sale']
  field_service_info varchar [note: 'Field service related information, consolidating field service concepts.']
  inspection_date date [note: 'Date of CPO multi-point inspection']

  inspection_point_count varchar [note: 'Number of inspection points checked']
  listing_date date [note: 'Date listed for sale']
  listing_number varchar [note: 'Unique CPO listing number']
  listing_status varchar [note: 'Status (pending_inspection, inspection_passed, certified, listed, reserved, sold, failed, decertified)']
  mileage_at_certification varchar [note: 'Odometer reading at certification']

  online_listing_flag boolean [note: 'Whether listed on online marketplace']
  powertrain_warranty_months varchar [note: 'Powertrain warranty extension months']
  previous_owner_count varchar [note: 'Number of previous owners']
  reconditioning_cost decimal(18,2) [note: 'Total reconditioning cost']
  reconditioning_items varchar [note: 'List of reconditioning work performed']
  roadside_assistance_months varchar [note: 'Roadside assistance coverage months']
  sale_date date [note: 'Date sold']
  sale_price decimal(18,2) [note: 'Actual sale price']
  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Record last update timestamp']
  vehicle_history_clean_flag boolean [note: 'Whether vehicle history is clean (no accidents/salvage)']

  Note: 'Certified Pre-Owned vehicle listings tracking the full CPO workflow from inspection through certification to sale.'
}

Table sales.fi_contract {
  fi_contract_id varchar [pk, note: 'Primary key']
  dealership_id varchar [note: 'FK to originating dealership']
  fi_application_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to sales.fi_application. Business justification: An F&I contract is the executed outcome of an approved F&I application. Adding fi_application_id to fi_contract creates the direct traceability link from contract back to the originating credit applic']
  party_id varchar [note: 'FK to customer party']
  vehicle_order_id varchar [note: 'FK to vehicle order']
  vin_registry_id varchar [note: 'FK to vehicle']
  apr_pct decimal(6,4) [note: 'Annual percentage rate']
  buyout_amount decimal(18,2) [note: 'Early buyout/payoff amount']
  contract_end_date date [note: 'Contract maturity/end date']
  contract_number varchar [note: 'Unique F&I contract number']
  contract_start_date date [note: 'Contract start date']
  contract_status varchar [note: 'Status (pending, active, paid_off, defaulted, terminated, matured)']
  contract_type varchar [note: 'Type (retail_finance, lease, balloon, subscription_finance)']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Record creation timestamp']
  credit_score_tier varchar [note: 'Customer credit score tier']
  currency_code varchar [note: 'Currency code']
  dealer_reserve_amount decimal(18,2) [note: 'Dealer finance reserve/markup']
  digital_contract_flag boolean [note: 'Whether contract was executed digitally']
  down_payment_amount decimal(18,2) [note: 'Down payment amount']
  excess_mileage_rate decimal(8,4) [note: 'Per-mile charge for excess mileage']
  extended_warranty_amount decimal(18,2) [note: 'Extended warranty cost']
  extended_warranty_flag boolean [note: 'Whether extended warranty purchased']
  field_service_info varchar [note: 'Field service related information, consolidating field service concepts.']
  financed_amount decimal(18,2) [note: 'Total amount financed']
  gap_insurance_flag boolean [note: 'Whether GAP insurance included']
  interest_rate_pct decimal(6,4) [note: 'Annual interest rate percentage']
  is_captive_finance boolean [note: 'Whether financed through OEM captive finance']
  lender_code varchar [note: 'Lender institution code']
  lender_name varchar [note: 'Financing institution name']
  mileage_allowance_annual varchar [note: 'Annual mileage allowance (lease)']
  money_factor decimal(10,6) [note: 'Lease money factor']
  monthly_payment_amount decimal(18,2) [note: 'Monthly payment amount']
  paint_protection_flag boolean [note: 'Whether paint protection purchased']
  residual_pct decimal(5,2) [note: 'Residual value as percentage of MSRP']
  residual_value_amount decimal(18,2) [note: 'Residual value (for leases)']
  subvention_rate_flag boolean [note: 'Whether OEM-subvented rate applied']
  term_months varchar [note: 'Contract term in months']
  tire_wheel_protection_flag boolean [note: 'Whether tire/wheel protection purchased']
  total_fi_product_amount decimal(18,2) [note: 'Total F&I product revenue']
  trade_in_equity_amount decimal(18,2) [note: 'Trade-in equity applied']
  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Record last update timestamp']

  Note: 'Finance and Insurance contracts covering vehicle financing, leasing, extended warranties, and insurance products sold at point of sale.'
}

  Note: 'Links mobility vehicle-as-a-service subscriptions into the sales flow, connecting subscription enrollment to sales pipeline and revenue recognition.'

Table sales.fi_application {
  fi_application_id varchar [pk, note: 'Primary key for fi_application']
  channel_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to sales.channel. Business justification: F&I applications are submitted through specific sales channels (dealer, online, direct). The current model stores channel as a STRING field. Adding channel_id normalizes this reference to the channel ']
  co_applicant_party_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the secondary applicant (co-borrower or co-lessee) on the F&I application, if applicable. Nullable when no co-applicant is present.']
  dealership_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the dealership that originated and submitted the F&I application on behalf of the customer.']
  finance_product_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the specific finance product (rate plan, lease program, or loan product) offered by the lender and selected for this application.']
  lender_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the financial institution, captive finance company (e.g., OEM captive), or bank that is providing the financing for this application.']
  party_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the primary applicant (customer) who is the principal borrower or lessee on the F&I application.']
  quote_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to sales.quote. Business justification: F&I applications are initiated based on a vehicle quote, using the quoted vehicle price, configured options, and financing terms as inputs. Adding quote_id to fi_application links the credit applicati']
  sales_incentive_program_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to sales.sales_incentive_program. Business justification: F&I applications for subvented financing are tied to OEM incentive programs that offer below-market interest rates. Adding sales_incentive_program_id to fi_application links the credit application to ']
  sales_order_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the vehicle sales order associated with this F&I application, linking the financing request to the specific vehicle purchase transaction.']
  superseded_fi_application_id varchar [note: 'Self-referencing FK on fi_application (superseded_fi_application_id)']
  vin_registry_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the specific vehicle (identified by VIN) being financed under this F&I application.']
  adverse_action_notice_sent boolean [note: 'Indicates whether a mandatory adverse action notice has been sent to the applicant following a credit decline or counter-offer, as required by ECOA and FCRA regulations.']
  annual_income decimal(18,2) [note: 'Self-declared or verified gross annual income of the primary applicant in the application currency, used as a key input for debt-to-income ratio calculation and credit decisioning.']
  annual_mileage_allowance varchar [note: 'Contracted annual mileage allowance (in kilometres or miles) for lease applications. Excess mileage charges apply if the customer exceeds this limit at lease end.']
  applicant_date_of_birth date [note: 'Date of birth of the primary applicant, used for identity verification and credit eligibility assessment. Subject to GDPR/CCPA data protection requirements.']
  applicant_email varchar [note: 'Primary email address of the applicant used for application status notifications and document delivery. Subject to GDPR/CCPA data protection requirements.']
  applicant_first_name varchar [note: 'Legal first (given) name of the primary applicant as provided on the F&I application. Subject to GDPR/CCPA data protection requirements.']
  applicant_last_name varchar [note: 'Legal last (family) name of the primary applicant as provided on the F&I application. Subject to GDPR/CCPA data protection requirements.']
  applicant_national_id_number varchar [note: 'Government-issued national identification number (e.g., Social Security Number in the US, National Insurance Number in the UK) of the primary applicant, used for credit bureau inquiry and identity verification. Must be masked in non-production environments.']
  applicant_phone varchar [note: 'Primary contact phone number of the applicant for application follow-up and verification purposes. Subject to GDPR/CCPA data protection requirements.']
  application_number varchar [note: 'Externally visible, human-readable reference number assigned to the F&I application at origination, used across dealer management systems (DMS), lender portals, and customer communications.']
  application_status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle state of the F&I application, tracking progression from initial submission through credit decisioning to funding. [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: draft|submitted|under_review|approved|conditionally_approved|declined|cancelled|funded — promote to reference product]']
  application_type varchar [note: 'Classification of the financing structure being applied for: retail installment sale, operating lease, balloon payment plan, fleet financing, or commercial loan. [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: retail_finance|lease|balloon|fleet_finance|commercial_loan|hire_purchase — promote to reference product]']
  approved_amount decimal(18,2) [note: 'Actual financing amount approved by the lender, which may differ from the requested amount based on credit assessment and lender policy.']
  buy_rate decimal(8,4) [note: 'The base interest rate at which the lender offers financing to the dealer (wholesale rate), before the dealer marks it up to the customer sell rate. Confidential commercial data.']
  conditions_text varchar [note: 'Free-text description of conditions that must be satisfied for a conditionally approved application to proceed to funding (e.g., proof of income, additional down payment, co-signer requirement).']
  contract_signed_date date [note: 'Date on which the customer signed the finance or lease contract, marking the legal commencement of the financing agreement.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the F&I application record was first created in the system, used for audit trail and data lineage purposes.']
  credit_bureau_source varchar [note: 'Name of the credit reporting agency from which the credit score and credit report were obtained for this application.']
  credit_score varchar [note: 'Credit bureau score (e.g., FICO score or equivalent) of the primary applicant at the time of application, used as the primary quantitative input for credit decisioning and interest rate determination.']
  currency_code varchar [note: 'ISO 4217 three-letter currency code for all monetary amounts on this F&I application (e.g., USD, EUR, GBP).']
  dealer_reserve_amount decimal(18,2) [note: 'Dealer participation or reserve income earned by the dealership from the lender for placing the finance contract, calculated as the spread between the buy rate and the sell rate. Confidential commercial data.']
  decision_code varchar [note: 'Lender-assigned decision code indicating the specific reason for approval, conditional approval, or decline of the application (e.g., A01 for standard approval, D03 for insufficient income). Codes vary by lender.']
  decision_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Date and time when the lender or captive finance company issued the credit decision (approval, conditional approval, or decline) on the application.']
  decline_reason varchar [note: 'Standardized reason description for application decline as required by ECOA adverse action notice regulations (e.g., insufficient income, poor credit history, excessive obligations). Populated only when application_status is declined.']
  down_payment_amount decimal(18,2) [note: 'Cash down payment amount provided by the customer at the point of sale, reducing the financed principal. Includes trade-in equity where applicable.']
  employer_name varchar [note: 'Name of the primary applicant\'s current employer, used for income verification and credit assessment purposes.']
  employment_status varchar [note: 'Current employment status of the primary applicant as declared on the F&I application, used in credit risk assessment.']
  expiry_date date [note: 'Date on which the credit approval or application offer expires if not funded, after which a new application or re-pull of credit may be required.']
  fi_product_premium decimal(18,2) [note: 'Total premium or cost of ancillary F&I products (GAP, extended warranty, etc.) included in the financed amount, contributing to the total amount financed.']
  fi_product_type varchar [note: 'Type of ancillary Finance and Insurance (F&I) product included in the application (e.g., GAP insurance, extended warranty, paint protection film). Multiple F&I products may be associated via a separate line table. [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: gap_insurance|extended_warranty|paint_protection|tyre_insurance|credit_life|service_plan — promote to reference product]']
  funding_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Date and time when the approved F&I application was funded by the lender, marking the point at which the financial contract is activated and proceeds are disbursed to the dealer.']
  interest_rate decimal(8,4) [note: 'Annual interest rate (APR) applied to the financed amount as approved by the lender. Expressed as a decimal percentage (e.g., 0.0499 for 4.99%). Used for monthly payment calculation and regulatory disclosure.']
  market_country_code varchar [note: 'ISO 3166-1 alpha-3 country code of the market in which the F&I application was originated, used for regulatory compliance routing and reporting (e.g., USA, GBR, DEU).']
  monthly_payment_amount decimal(18,2) [note: 'Calculated monthly installment or lease payment amount due from the customer, inclusive of principal, interest, and any applicable fees as disclosed under TILA/CCD.']
  regulatory_disclosure_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether all mandatory regulatory disclosures (e.g., TILA Truth-in-Lending disclosure, EU Consumer Credit Directive pre-contractual information) have been provided to the applicant prior to contract signing.']
  requested_amount decimal(18,2) [note: 'Total amount of financing requested by the applicant, representing the principal loan or lease amount before lender adjustments.']
  residual_value decimal(18,2) [note: 'Estimated residual (balloon) value of the vehicle at the end of the lease or balloon finance term, used to calculate monthly payments and end-of-term purchase option pricing.']
  source_system_reference varchar [note: 'Application reference number or identifier from the originating source system (DMS, lender portal, or Salesforce Automotive Cloud), used for cross-system reconciliation and audit trail.']
  submission_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Date and time when the F&I application was formally submitted by the dealer or customer for credit review, representing the principal business event timestamp.']
  term_months varchar [note: 'Duration of the financing agreement in months (e.g., 24, 36, 48, 60, 72, 84), representing the repayment or lease period.']
  trade_in_value decimal(18,2) [note: 'Agreed appraised value of the customer\'s trade-in vehicle applied as equity toward the new vehicle purchase, reducing the financed amount.']
  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the F&I application record was most recently modified, supporting audit trail and change tracking requirements.']
  vehicle_selling_price decimal(18,2) [note: 'Agreed final selling price of the vehicle being financed, as negotiated between the dealer and customer. May differ from MSRP due to dealer discounts or incentives.']

  Note: 'Master reference table for fi_application. Referenced by fi_application_id.'
}

Table sales.lender {
  lender_id varchar [pk, note: 'Primary key for lender']
  api_endpoint_url varchar [note: 'Base URL of the lender\'s credit decisioning or financing application API, used for real-time credit application submission and rate quote retrieval from dealer systems.']
  approval_turnaround_hours decimal(5,2) [note: 'Average or contractual credit decision turnaround time in hours from application submission to approval/decline. Used for dealer SLA management and lender performance benchmarking.']
  base_rate_type varchar [note: 'Type of base interest rate structure used by the lender. Fixed rates are locked at origination; variable rates float with a benchmark index (SOFR, Prime). Impacts F&I deal structuring and incentive subvention calculations.']
  captive_oem_code varchar [note: 'OEM brand code identifying the automotive manufacturer that owns or exclusively partners with this captive finance company (e.g., \'FORD\' for Ford Motor Credit, \'BMW\' for BMW Financial Services). Null for third-party lenders.']
  commercial_fleet_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the lender supports commercial fleet financing programs for corporate, government, or rental fleet customers. Fleet lenders typically offer volume-based rate structures.']
  country_code varchar [note: 'ISO 3166-1 alpha-3 country code of the lender\'s primary country of incorporation and operations (e.g., USA, DEU, GBR, JPN). Drives market-specific financing program eligibility.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the lender master record was first created in the system, in ISO 8601 format (yyyy-MM-ddTHH:mm:ss.SSSXXX). Supports audit trail and data lineage requirements.']
  credit_tier_supported varchar [note: 'Credit quality tier(s) that the lender is approved to finance. Prime lenders target high-credit-score buyers; subprime lenders specialize in challenged credit. Drives dealer routing logic for financing applications.']
  currency_code varchar [note: 'ISO 4217 three-letter currency code for the lender\'s primary operating currency (e.g., USD, EUR, GBP, JPY). Used to denominate financing rates, fees, and incentive program amounts.']
  data_sharing_consent_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the lender has provided consent for data sharing with the OEM for analytics, incentive reconciliation, and portfolio performance reporting under the data sharing agreement.']
  dealer_portal_url varchar [note: 'URL of the lender\'s dealer-facing portal for submitting financing applications, accessing rate sheets, and managing floorplan accounts. Integrated with DMS and Salesforce Automotive Cloud.']
  dealer_reserve_cap_pct decimal(5,2) [note: 'Maximum dealer reserve markup (in percentage points above buy rate) that the lender permits dealers to add to the customer\'s contract rate. Regulated by CFPB fair lending guidelines to prevent discriminatory pricing.']
  ev_financing_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the lender has specific EV financing programs, including battery residual value guarantees, federal tax credit assignment (IRA Section 30D), and EV-specific underwriting criteria.']
  floorplan_financing_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the lender offers wholesale floorplan financing to dealers for vehicle inventory. Floorplan lenders advance funds to dealers to purchase inventory from the OEM.']
  funding_turnaround_hours decimal(5,2) [note: 'Average or contractual time in hours from contract submission to dealer funding (disbursement of loan proceeds to the dealer). Critical for dealer cash flow management.']
  headquarters_address_line1 varchar [note: 'First line of the lender\'s registered headquarters street address, used for legal correspondence and regulatory filings.']
  headquarters_city varchar [note: 'City of the lender\'s registered headquarters, used for geographic segmentation of lender coverage and regulatory jurisdiction determination.']
  headquarters_country_code varchar [note: 'ISO 3166-1 alpha-3 country code of the lender\'s registered headquarters location. May differ from country_code if the lender operates across multiple markets.']
  headquarters_postal_code varchar [note: 'Postal or ZIP code of the lender\'s registered headquarters address.']
  headquarters_state_province varchar [note: 'State, province, or region of the lender\'s registered headquarters. Determines applicable state-level lending regulations (e.g., usury laws, dealer reserve caps).']
  last_review_date date [note: 'Date of the most recent compliance and performance review of the lender relationship, including fair lending audit, CFPB compliance check, and program performance assessment.']
  lease_financing_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the lender offers vehicle lease financing products (closed-end or open-end leases). Lease-capable lenders support residual value programs and money factor pricing.']
  lender_category varchar [note: 'Business category of financing products offered by the lender. Retail lenders support consumer vehicle purchase loans; wholesale lenders support dealer floorplan financing; fleet lenders support commercial fleet accounts.']
  lender_code varchar [note: 'Externally-known alphanumeric business identifier for the lender, used in SAP SD financing interfaces, dealer management systems (DMS), and captive finance platform integrations.']
  lender_name varchar [note: 'Full legal registered name of the lending institution or captive finance company (e.g., Ford Motor Credit Company, Toyota Financial Services, Volkswagen Financial Services AG).']
  lender_short_name varchar [note: 'Abbreviated or trade name of the lender used in dealer portals, sales reporting dashboards, and Salesforce Automotive Cloud opportunity records.']
  lender_status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle status of the lender relationship. Active lenders are eligible to receive financing applications from dealers. Suspended lenders are temporarily blocked pending compliance review.']
  lender_type varchar [note: 'Classification of the lender by institutional type. Captive lenders are OEM-owned finance arms (e.g., GMAC, BMW Financial Services); banks and credit unions are third-party. [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: captive|bank|credit_union|independent_finance|leasing_company|government — promote to reference product]']
  max_loan_amount decimal(18,2) [note: 'Maximum vehicle financing loan amount (in lender\'s primary currency) that the lender will approve per transaction. Caps deal size for risk management purposes.']
  max_loan_to_value_pct decimal(5,2) [note: 'Maximum loan-to-value ratio (expressed as a percentage) the lender will finance relative to the vehicle\'s MSRP or appraised value. A value of 110.00 means the lender will finance up to 110% of vehicle value (including negative equity).']
  max_term_months varchar [note: 'Maximum financing term in months that the lender offers for vehicle purchase loans (e.g., 84 months). Longer terms reduce monthly payments but increase total interest cost.']
  max_vehicle_age_years varchar [note: 'Maximum age of the vehicle (in years from model year) that the lender will finance. Older vehicles typically carry higher default risk and are excluded by prime lenders.']
  max_vehicle_mileage varchar [note: 'Maximum odometer reading (in miles or kilometers per lender\'s market standard) of a used vehicle that the lender will finance. High-mileage vehicles are excluded from many prime lending programs.']
  min_loan_amount decimal(18,2) [note: 'Minimum vehicle financing loan amount (in lender\'s primary currency) that the lender will approve. Used to filter lender eligibility during deal structuring in the F&I (Finance and Insurance) office.']
  min_term_months varchar [note: 'Minimum financing term in months that the lender offers for vehicle purchase loans (e.g., 12 months). Used to filter lender eligibility for short-term financing requests.']
  next_review_date date [note: 'Date on which the next scheduled compliance and performance review of the lender is due. Drives compliance calendar and audit scheduling workflows.']
  onboarding_date date [note: 'Date on which the lender was formally onboarded and activated in the OEM\'s financing ecosystem, including DMS integration, portal access provisioning, and compliance verification completion.']
  parent_lender_id varchar [note: 'Self-referencing identifier for the parent lender entity, enabling hierarchical lender group structures (e.g., a regional subsidiary referencing its national parent captive finance company).']
  preferred_lender_rank varchar [note: 'Numeric ranking (1 = highest preference) indicating the OEM\'s or dealer group\'s preferred routing order for financing applications. Lower rank lenders receive first-look submission priority in the dealer\'s F&I workflow.']
  primary_contact_email varchar [note: 'Business email address of the primary lender relationship contact for program communications, rate sheet distribution, and incentive claim correspondence.']
  primary_contact_name varchar [note: 'Full name of the primary relationship manager or account executive at the lender responsible for OEM/dealer program coordination.']
  primary_contact_phone varchar [note: 'Direct phone number of the primary lender relationship contact, used for escalation and program negotiation.']
  program_end_date date [note: 'Date on which the lender\'s financing program agreement expires or is scheduled to terminate. Null for open-ended agreements. Triggers renewal workflow in Salesforce Automotive Cloud.']
  program_start_date date [note: 'Date on which the lender\'s financing program agreement with the OEM or dealer group became effective. Determines eligibility window for incentive subvention and preferred lender programs.']
  registration_number varchar [note: 'Official government-issued legal entity registration or charter number for the lending institution (e.g., NMLS ID in the USA, BaFin registration in Germany). Required for regulatory compliance verification.']
  routing_number varchar [note: 'American Bankers Association (ABA) routing transit number for the lender\'s primary settlement bank account, used for ACH disbursements of dealer incentive payments and floorplan advances.']
  subvention_eligible_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the lender participates in OEM-sponsored rate subvention programs (e.g., 0% APR for 60 months). Subvention programs require the OEM to buy down the customer\'s interest rate by paying the lender a subsidy.']
  supported_vehicle_types varchar [note: 'Comma-separated list or description of vehicle types the lender finances (e.g., new, certified_pre_owned, used, commercial, electric_vehicle). Determines lender eligibility routing in F&I deal structuring. [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: new|certified_pre_owned|used|commercial|electric_vehicle|motorcycle — promote to reference product]']
  swift_bic_code varchar [note: 'SWIFT/BIC code uniquely identifying the lender\'s financial institution for international wire transfers and cross-border automotive financing settlements.']
  tax_id varchar [note: 'Federal or national tax identification number of the lender (e.g., EIN in the USA, VAT registration number in the EU). Used for 1099 reporting, withholding tax, and cross-border financing compliance.']
  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp of the most recent update to the lender master record, in ISO 8601 format. Used for change data capture (CDC) and incremental Lakehouse Silver layer processing.']
  website_url varchar [note: 'Official public website URL of the lender, used for dealer portal links, consumer financing application redirects, and program documentation access.']

  Note: 'Master reference table for lender. Referenced by lender_id.'
}

Table sales.finance_product {
  finance_product_id varchar [pk, note: 'Primary key for finance_product']
  superseded_finance_product_id varchar [note: 'Self-referencing FK on finance_product (superseded_finance_product_id)']
  annual_mileage_allowance varchar [note: 'Standard contracted annual mileage allowance included in the base product terms for lease and PCP products. Excess mileage is charged at the excess_mileage_rate.']
  apr decimal(10,6) [note: 'The Annual Percentage Rate (APR) for this finance product, expressed as a decimal. Mandatory regulatory disclosure metric representing the true cost of credit including fees. Required under Consumer Credit Directive.']
  arrangement_fee decimal(18,2) [note: 'Fixed fee charged to the customer at the inception of the finance agreement. Included in APR calculations and disclosed in pre-contractual information.']
  balloon_payment_pct decimal(10,6) [note: 'The guaranteed future value (GFV) or balloon payment expressed as a percentage of the vehicle\'s on-the-road price. Applicable to PCP (Personal Contract Purchase) and balloon finance products. Null for standard loans.']
  benchmark_rate_index varchar [note: 'Reference rate index to which a variable rate product is linked (e.g., SOFR, EURIBOR, Bank of England Base Rate). Null for fixed-rate products.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when this finance product record was first created in the data lakehouse. Used for audit trail and data governance purposes.']
  currency_code varchar [note: 'Three-letter ISO 4217 currency code in which the finance product is denominated (e.g., USD, EUR, GBP). Determines the currency of all monetary terms associated with this product.']
  dealer_commission_rate decimal(10,6) [note: 'The commission rate payable to the dealer for introducing this finance product, expressed as a decimal. Subject to FCA discretionary commission arrangement (DCA) rules. Confidential commercial term.']
  discontinuation_date date [note: 'The date on which this finance product was formally discontinued and removed from the active product catalog. Null for active products.']
  early_settlement_fee decimal(18,2) [note: 'Fee charged to the customer for settling the finance agreement before the contracted end date. Subject to statutory rebate rules under the Consumer Credit Act.']
  effective_from_date date [note: 'The date from which this finance product is available for new originations. Used in product eligibility date-range checks during quote generation.']
  effective_to_date date [note: 'The date after which this finance product is no longer available for new originations. Null indicates the product is open-ended with no planned end date.']
  eligible_vehicle_age_max_years varchar [note: 'Maximum age of the vehicle in years at the time of finance origination. Used to restrict certain products to new or nearly-new vehicles and to manage residual value risk.']
  excess_mileage_rate decimal(18,2) [note: 'Charge per unit of distance (mile or kilometre) for mileage exceeding the contracted annual mileage allowance. Applicable to lease and PCP products. Null for loan products.']
  external_product_id varchar [note: 'The identifier for this finance product in the originating source system (e.g., SAP SD material number, Salesforce product ID). Used for cross-system reconciliation and data lineage.']
  fca_product_category varchar [note: 'FCA-defined product category classification for regulated credit products (e.g., \'Hire Purchase\', \'Conditional Sale\', \'Personal Contract Purchase\', \'Finance Lease\'). Required for FCA regulatory reporting.']
  finance_channel varchar [note: 'The distribution channel through which this finance product is offered. Determines eligibility rules, commission structures, and regulatory disclosure requirements.']
  is_ev_incentive_eligible boolean [note: 'Indicates whether this finance product is eligible for government or manufacturer EV purchase incentives (e.g., Plug-in Car Grant, IRA EV tax credit). Used in incentive program eligibility logic.']
  is_regulated boolean [note: 'Indicates whether this finance product is a regulated credit agreement subject to consumer credit legislation and conduct of business rules. Drives mandatory disclosure and affordability assessment requirements.']
  late_payment_fee decimal(18,2) [note: 'Fee charged per late payment event under this finance product. Must be disclosed in the pre-contractual information and is subject to FCA fairness rules.']
  launch_date date [note: 'The date on which this finance product was first made commercially available to dealers and customers. Used in product performance analytics and vintage analysis.']
  market_country_code varchar [note: 'ISO 3166-1 alpha-3 country code of the market in which this finance product is offered. Finance products are market-specific due to regulatory and tax differences.']
  max_dealer_rate_markup_bps varchar [note: 'Maximum number of basis points by which a dealer is permitted to mark up the standard rate when quoting to a customer. Regulated under FCA DCA rules. Confidential commercial term.']
  max_deposit_pct decimal(10,6) [note: 'Maximum deposit percentage allowed under this finance product. Prevents over-capitalisation and ensures the product remains within its intended credit structure.']
  max_loan_amount decimal(18,2) [note: 'Maximum principal amount that can be financed under this product. Caps the exposure per agreement and is used in credit risk and underwriting rules.']
  max_term_months varchar [note: 'Maximum contract duration in months for this finance product. Defines the upper bound for repayment schedules and residual value calculations.']
  mileage_unit varchar [note: 'Unit of distance measurement used for mileage allowance and excess mileage charges. Varies by market (miles in UK/US, km in continental Europe).']
  min_deposit_pct decimal(10,6) [note: 'Minimum required deposit (down payment) as a percentage of the vehicle\'s on-the-road price, expressed as a decimal (e.g., 0.10 for 10%). Used in affordability and eligibility checks.']
  min_loan_amount decimal(18,2) [note: 'Minimum principal amount that can be financed under this product. Used in eligibility checks during quote generation and order capture in SAP SD and Salesforce.']
  min_term_months varchar [note: 'Minimum contract duration in months for this finance product. Used in eligibility validation and product suitability assessments.']
  new_used_eligibility varchar [note: 'Indicates whether this finance product is available for new vehicles, used/pre-owned vehicles, or both. Drives product filtering in dealer quoting systems.']
  nominal_interest_rate decimal(10,6) [note: 'The stated annual nominal interest rate (flat rate) for this finance product, expressed as a decimal (e.g., 0.0699 for 6.99%). Used in payment schedule calculations.']
  payment_frequency varchar [note: 'Frequency at which regular repayments are due under this finance product. Monthly is standard for retail automotive finance; quarterly or annual may apply to fleet or commercial products.']
  payment_in_advance_count varchar [note: 'Number of rental payments collected in advance at the start of the agreement (e.g., 3 months in advance for a lease). Common in fleet and business lease products.']
  product_category varchar [note: 'Business segment category for the finance product, distinguishing retail consumer finance from fleet, commercial, dealer stock, or wholesale financing arrangements.']
  product_code varchar [note: 'Externally-known alphanumeric code uniquely identifying the finance product within the automotive finance product catalog. Used in SAP SD and Salesforce Automotive Cloud for product referencing.']
  product_description varchar [note: 'Detailed narrative description of the finance product, including its key features, target customer segment, and commercial positioning. Used in dealer training materials and product documentation.']
  product_name varchar [note: 'Human-readable commercial name of the finance product (e.g., \'Standard Auto Loan\', \'Balloon Finance Plan\', \'Lease with Maintenance\'). Used in dealer-facing and customer-facing materials.']
  product_owner varchar [note: 'Name or identifier of the business owner responsible for this finance product\'s commercial performance, pricing, and compliance. Used in governance and escalation workflows.']
  product_status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle status of the finance product. Controls whether the product is available for new originations, under review, or retired from the product catalog.']
  product_type varchar [note: 'Classification of the finance product by its fundamental structure. Determines the financial mechanics, regulatory treatment, and accounting classification. [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: loan|lease|balloon|hire_purchase|fleet_finance|subscription|pcp|pcm — promote to reference product]']
  rate_margin_bps varchar [note: 'The margin in basis points added to the benchmark rate index for variable-rate products. For example, a margin of 150 bps over EURIBOR. Null for fixed-rate products.']
  rate_type varchar [note: 'Indicates whether the interest rate for this finance product is fixed for the full term, variable (linked to a benchmark rate), capped, or stepped over the contract period.']
  regulatory_framework varchar [note: 'The primary regulatory framework governing this finance product (e.g., \'Consumer Credit Act 1974\', \'Consumer Credit Directive 2008/48/EC\', \'Regulation Z / TILA\'). Determines disclosure and conduct obligations.']
  residual_value_pct decimal(10,6) [note: 'Estimated residual value of the vehicle at the end of the finance term, expressed as a percentage of the original vehicle price. Used in lease and PCP product pricing and risk modelling.']
  source_system_code varchar [note: 'Code identifying the operational system of record from which this finance product definition originates (e.g., \'SAP_SD\', \'SALESFORCE_AC\', \'DEALER_FMS\'). Used for data lineage and reconciliation.']
  subsidy_type varchar [note: 'Indicates whether the finance product is subsidised by the manufacturer (subvented rate), the dealer, or is unsubsidised. Subvented products are funded by the OEM to support vehicle sales incentives.']
  subvention_rate decimal(10,6) [note: 'The rate subsidy provided by the manufacturer or dealer to reduce the customer-facing APR below the standard market rate. Expressed as a decimal. Confidential commercial term.']
  target_vehicle_segment varchar [note: 'The vehicle segment or nameplate category for which this finance product is designed (e.g., passenger car, SUV, commercial vehicle, EV). Used in product eligibility rules and marketing targeting.']
  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when this finance product record was last modified. Used for change tracking, incremental data loads, and audit compliance.']

  Note: 'Master reference table for finance_product. Referenced by finance_product_id.'
}

Table dealer.dealership {
  dealership_id varchar [pk, note: 'Unique surrogate identifier for each dealer location in the OEM franchise network. Primary key for the dealership master record and the enterprise Single Source of Truth (SSOT) for dealer identity.']
  account_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to billing.billing_account. Business justification: Required for finance: each dealership must be linked to its primary billing account for invoice generation and payment reconciliation, a standard practice in automotive dealer finance operations.']
  company_code_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to finance.company_code. Business justification: Financial consolidation reports require each dealership to be assigned to a legal company code for statutory reporting; dealers know their company code.']
  cost_center_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to finance.cost_center. Business justification: Expense allocation and internal budgeting are performed per dealership via a dedicated cost center; required for cost‑center expense statements.']
  payment_term_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to billing.payment_term. Business justification: Required for billing: dealership default payment terms are needed for all invoices, enabling consistent net‑due days and discount calculations per dealer.']
  region_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to dealer.dealer_region. Business justification: Dealerships are assigned to a region; add dealer_region_id FK to link each dealership to its region.']
  activation_date date [note: 'Date on which the dealership was formally activated in the OEM dealer network and became eligible to receive vehicle allocations and participate in OEM programs.']
  adas_certified boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the dealership is certified to perform Advanced Driver Assistance Systems (ADAS) calibration and repair. Required for servicing vehicles equipped with cameras, radar, and LiDAR-based safety systems.']
  address_line1 varchar [note: 'Primary street address of the dealership physical location. Used for logistics, customer navigation, regulatory filings, and Pre-Delivery Inspection (PDI) vehicle delivery coordination.']
  address_line2 varchar [note: 'Secondary address line for the dealership (suite, unit, building number). Supplements address_line1 for precise location identification.']
  cdk_dealer_code varchar [note: 'Unique dealer identifier assigned within the CDK Global Dealer Management System (DMS). This is the integration key used for all data exchanges between the OEM lakehouse and the CDK DMS platform including inventory, F&I, and service scheduling feeds.']
  channel_classification varchar [note: 'Categorizes the dealer\'s primary sales channel model. Retail covers traditional showroom sales; fleet covers B2B volume sales; agency model covers OEM-set pricing arrangements; export covers cross-border sales points.']
  city varchar [note: 'City in which the dealership is physically located. Used for geographic market analysis, territory assignment, and customer proximity reporting.']
  country_code varchar [note: 'Three-letter ISO 3166-1 alpha-3 country code for the country in which the dealership is physically located (e.g., USA, CAN, MEX, GBR, DEU). Drives regulatory compliance, currency, and tax treatment.']
  deactivation_date date [note: 'Date on which the dealership was deactivated or terminated from the OEM dealer network. Nullable for currently active dealers. Used for franchise termination tracking and regulatory reporting.']
  dealer_code varchar [note: 'Externally-known alphanumeric code assigned by the OEM to uniquely identify the dealer location across all enterprise systems including SAP SD, CDK Global DMS, and Salesforce Automotive Cloud. Used on all inter-system communications, vehicle allocations, and incentive programs.']
  dealer_status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle status of the dealership within the OEM franchise network. Controls eligibility for vehicle allocation, incentive programs, and DMS integration. [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: active|inactive|suspended|pending_approval|terminated|under_review — promote to reference product]']
  dealer_tier varchar [note: 'OEM-assigned performance tier classification for the dealership based on annual sales volume, customer satisfaction scores, and compliance metrics. Determines eligibility for premium vehicle allocations, co-op marketing funds, and incentive program tiers.']
  dms_go_live_date date [note: 'Date on which the CDK Global DMS integration for this dealership went live and began transmitting data to the OEM enterprise systems. Used for integration tenure tracking and data completeness assessments.']
  dms_integration_status varchar [note: 'Current status of the CDK Global DMS data integration feed for this dealership. Indicates whether real-time inventory, sales, and service data is flowing correctly into the OEM lakehouse.']
  ev_certified boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the dealership has completed OEM Electric Vehicle (EV) certification requirements including technician training, charging infrastructure installation, and EV-specific tooling. Required for allocation of BEV and PHEV models.']
  ev_charger_count varchar [note: 'Number of EV charging stations installed at the dealership for customer and demo vehicle use. Relevant for EV certification compliance and customer experience reporting.']
  franchise_agreement_number varchar [note: 'Reference number of the active franchise agreement between the OEM and the dealer entity. Used to link the dealership master record to the franchise agreement contract for legal and compliance purposes.']
  franchise_expiry_date date [note: 'Date on which the current franchise agreement is scheduled to expire or must be renewed. Nullable for perpetual agreements. Triggers renewal workflow when within the notice period.']
  franchise_start_date date [note: 'Date on which the current franchise agreement between the OEM and the dealer became effective. Used for tenure calculations, renewal scheduling, and performance baseline setting.']
  franchise_type varchar [note: 'Classification of the dealer\'s franchise arrangement with the OEM. Distinguishes OEM-owned (captive) outlets from independent franchise dealers, authorized repairers, fleet-only points, used vehicle specialists, and satellite locations. [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: oem_owned|independent_franchise|authorized_repairer|fleet_only|used_vehicle_only|satellite — promote to reference product]']
  home_delivery_enabled_flag boolean [note: 'Whether this dealership supports home delivery to customers.']
  last_mile_delivery_radius_km decimal(8,2) [note: 'Maximum delivery radius in km for home delivery from this dealership.']
  latitude decimal(9,6) [note: 'Geographic latitude coordinate (WGS 84 decimal degrees) of the dealership location. Enables spatial analytics, territory mapping, and customer proximity calculations for dealer locator services.']
  legal_name varchar [note: 'Full registered legal name of the dealer entity as recorded with the relevant state or national business registry. Used for franchise agreements, regulatory filings, and financial settlements.']
  longitude decimal(9,6) [note: 'Geographic longitude coordinate (WGS 84 decimal degrees) of the dealership location. Enables spatial analytics, territory mapping, and customer proximity calculations for dealer locator services.']
  lot_capacity varchar [note: 'Maximum number of vehicles that can be stored on the dealer lot (outdoor inventory storage). Used for vehicle allocation limits, inventory aging analysis, and logistics planning.']
  market_region_code varchar [note: 'OEM-defined market region code to which this dealership belongs (e.g., NORTHEAST, MIDWEST, SOUTHWEST, WEST, SOUTHEAST). Used for territory management, regional incentive programs, and sales performance reporting.']
  new_vehicle_sales_capacity varchar [note: 'OEM-assessed annual new vehicle sales capacity (unit count) for this dealership based on facility size, staffing, and market area. Used as the denominator for allocation planning and sales target setting.']
  oem_brand_codes varchar [note: 'Pipe-delimited list of OEM brand codes (e.g., BRAND_A|BRAND_B) that this dealership is franchised to sell and service. A single dealer point may hold multi-brand authorizations (e.g., passenger car and commercial vehicle brands).']
  ownership_group_name varchar [note: 'Name of the dealer group or automotive retail group that owns this dealership location (e.g., AutoNation, Penske, Lithia). Enables group-level performance aggregation, consolidated incentive calculations, and multi-point dealer management.']
  parts_warehouse_area_sqm decimal(10,2) [note: 'Total floor area in square metres of the dealership\'s parts storage facility. Used for parts inventory capacity planning, MRP replenishment calculations, and Just-in-Time (JIT) parts delivery scheduling.']
  pdi_certified boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the dealership is certified to perform Pre-Delivery Inspection (PDI) on new vehicles prior to customer handover. PDI certification is required for new vehicle delivery authorization.']
  postal_code varchar [note: 'Postal or ZIP code of the dealership\'s physical location. Used for geographic market segmentation, territory boundary analysis, and customer catchment area reporting.']
  primary_email varchar [note: 'Primary business email address for the dealership used for OEM communications, vehicle allocation notifications, incentive program updates, and Technical Service Bulletin (TSB) distribution.']
  primary_phone varchar [note: 'Main switchboard or primary contact telephone number for the dealership. Used for OEM-to-dealer communications, customer service escalations, and directory listings.']
  principal_contact_email varchar [note: 'Email address of the primary OEM relationship contact at the dealership. Used for franchise communications, incentive program notifications, and regulatory bulletin distribution.']
  principal_contact_name varchar [note: 'Full name of the primary OEM relationship contact at the dealership (typically the Dealer Principal or General Manager). Used for OEM communications, franchise agreement correspondence, and escalation routing.']
  record_created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the dealership master record was first created in the enterprise data platform. Follows ISO 8601 format (yyyy-MM-ddTHH:mm:ss.SSSXXX). Used for data lineage, audit trail, and record age analysis.']
  record_updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp of the most recent update to the dealership master record in the enterprise data platform. Follows ISO 8601 format (yyyy-MM-ddTHH:mm:ss.SSSXXX). Used for change detection, data freshness monitoring, and audit compliance.']
  sales_district_code varchar [note: 'OEM-defined sales district code representing the sub-regional territory assignment for this dealership. Used for district sales manager (DSM) alignment, vehicle allocation quotas, and performance benchmarking.']
  sap_customer_number varchar [note: 'SAP S/4HANA customer master number (SD module) assigned to this dealership for vehicle order processing, invoicing, and financial settlement. Links dealership to SAP SD sales orders and FI accounts receivable.']
  service_bay_count varchar [note: 'Total number of service bays available at the dealership for vehicle maintenance and repair operations. Used for after-sales capacity planning, warranty repair throughput analysis, and service scheduling optimization.']
  showroom_display_capacity varchar [note: 'Maximum number of vehicles that can be displayed simultaneously in the dealership showroom. Used for vehicle allocation planning, demo fleet sizing, and facility investment decisions.']
  state_province_code varchar [note: 'ISO 3166-2 state or province code for the dealership\'s physical location (e.g., CA, TX, NY, ON). Used for CAFE compliance reporting, CARB emissions zone classification, and state-level dealer franchise law compliance.']
  trading_name varchar [note: 'The public-facing \'doing business as\' (DBA) name of the dealership as displayed to customers, on signage, and in marketing materials. May differ from the legal entity name.']
  used_vehicle_sales_capacity varchar [note: 'OEM-assessed annual used vehicle sales capacity (unit count) for this dealership. Used for certified pre-owned (CPO) program eligibility and used vehicle allocation planning.']
  warranty_authorized boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the dealership is authorized to perform OEM warranty repairs and submit warranty claims. Drives warranty claim processing eligibility in SAP and CDK DMS.']
  website_url varchar [note: 'Public-facing website URL for the dealership. Used for digital marketing integration, online inventory syndication, and customer-facing dealer locator services.']
  yard_slot_capacity varchar [note: 'Number of vehicle storage slots available at the dealership yard.']

  Note: 'Master record for each dealer location in the OEM franchise network. Captures dealer legal entity, DMS (Dealer Management System) integration identifiers (CDK Global), franchise type (OEM-owned vs independent), physical address, contact details, operational status, market region, and channel classification. This is the SSOT for dealer identity across the enterprise.'
}

Table dealer.franchise_agreement {
  franchise_agreement_id varchar [pk, note: 'Unique identifier for the franchise agreement record. Primary key.']
  franchise_dealer_dealership_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the dealer entity that is party to this franchise agreement.']
  franchise_dealership_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the dealer entity that is party to this franchise agreement.']
  agreement_currency_code varchar [note: 'Three-letter ISO 4217 currency code for all financial terms in the franchise agreement (quotas, fees, investment requirements). Example: USD, EUR, JPY.']
  agreement_document_url varchar [note: 'Secure URL or file path to the digitally stored franchise agreement contract document (PDF or scanned image).']
  agreement_name varchar [note: 'Human-readable name or title of the franchise agreement, typically including dealer name and location.']
  agreement_number varchar [note: 'Externally-known unique business identifier for the franchise agreement. Format: FA-NNNNNNNN.']
  agreement_status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle status of the franchise agreement: draft (being negotiated), pending approval (awaiting OEM sign-off), active (in force), suspended (temporarily inactive), terminated (ended before expiration), or expired (reached end date).']
  agreement_type varchar [note: 'Classification of the franchise agreement based on its purpose: new franchise grant, renewal of existing agreement, amendment to terms, territory expansion, or termination agreement.']
  allocation_priority_tier varchar [note: 'Priority tier for vehicle inventory allocation. Higher tiers receive preferential allocation of high-demand models and limited-production vehicles. Tier 1 = highest priority.']
  authorized_nameplates varchar [note: 'Comma-separated list of vehicle nameplates (brands, model lines) that the dealer is authorized to sell under this franchise agreement. Examples: Sedan, SUV, Truck, EV (Electric Vehicle), HEV (Hybrid Electric Vehicle).']
  authorized_vehicle_lines varchar [note: 'Specific vehicle lines or series the dealer is authorized to sell, such as luxury, commercial, electric, or performance segments.']
  auto_renewal_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the franchise agreement automatically renews at expiration unless either party provides notice. True = auto-renews, False = requires explicit renewal.']
  certified_pre_owned_authorized_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the dealer is authorized to sell OEM-certified pre-owned vehicles under the manufacturer\'s CPO program. True = authorized, False = not authorized.']
  commercial_fleet_authorized_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the dealer is authorized to sell vehicles to commercial fleet customers and participate in fleet sales programs. True = authorized, False = not authorized.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when this franchise agreement record was first created in the system. Format: yyyy-MM-ddTHH:mm:ss.SSSXXX.']
  customer_satisfaction_target_score decimal(5,2) [note: 'Minimum Net Promoter Score (NPS) or customer satisfaction score the dealer must achieve to maintain franchise agreement in good standing. Typically measured on a scale of 0-100.']
  dealer_signatory_name varchar [note: 'Full name of the dealer authorized representative (typically dealer principal or owner) who signed the franchise agreement.']
  digital_retailing_required_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the dealer must offer digital retailing capabilities (online sales, virtual showroom, e-commerce) as required by the franchise agreement. True = required, False = optional.']
  dms_integration_required_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the dealer must integrate their DMS (Dealer Management System) with OEM systems for real-time inventory, sales, and service data sharing. True = required, False = optional.']
  effective_date date [note: 'Date when the franchise agreement becomes legally binding and operational. Marks the start of the dealer\'s franchise rights and obligations.']
  ev_charging_infrastructure_required_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the dealer must install and maintain EV (Electric Vehicle) charging infrastructure at their facility as a condition of selling electric or hybrid vehicles. True = required, False = optional.']
  exclusive_territory_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the dealer has exclusive rights to sell in the assigned territory. True = exclusive (no other dealers in territory), False = non-exclusive (shared territory).']
  expiration_date date [note: 'Date when the franchise agreement is scheduled to end. Nullable for open-ended or perpetual agreements subject to performance review.']
  facility_investment_requirement_amount decimal(15,2) [note: 'Minimum capital expenditure (CapEx) the dealer must invest in facility improvements, showroom standards, service equipment, and infrastructure to meet OEM brand standards.']
  franchise_tier varchar [note: 'Tier or level of the franchise agreement indicating dealer status, privileges, and performance expectations. Higher tiers typically receive preferential allocation and incentives.']
  governing_law_jurisdiction varchar [note: 'Legal jurisdiction and governing law that applies to the franchise agreement, typically the state or country where the dealer operates or where the OEM is headquartered.']
  home_delivery_obligation_flag boolean [note: 'Whether the franchise agreement requires home delivery capability.']
  incentive_program_eligibility_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the dealer is eligible to participate in OEM dealer incentive programs, volume bonuses, and performance rewards. True = eligible, False = not eligible.']
  last_modified_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when this franchise agreement record was last updated in the system. Format: yyyy-MM-ddTHH:mm:ss.SSSXXX.']
  minimum_sales_quota_annual varchar [note: 'Minimum number of vehicle units the dealer must sell annually to maintain franchise agreement in good standing. Performance obligation defined in agreement.']
  minimum_service_capacity varchar [note: 'Minimum number of vehicles the dealer must be capable of servicing per month to meet franchise agreement service obligations.']
  notice_period_days varchar [note: 'Number of days advance notice required by either party to terminate or not renew the franchise agreement. Typical values are 30, 60, 90, or 180 days.']
  oem_signatory_name varchar [note: 'Full name of the OEM authorized representative who signed the franchise agreement on behalf of the manufacturer.']
  ownership_model varchar [note: 'Classification of dealer ownership structure: OEM (Original Equipment Manufacturer) owned, independent franchise, joint venture, or corporate store.']
  parts_inventory_requirement_amount decimal(15,2) [note: 'Minimum dollar value of OEM (Original Equipment Manufacturer) parts inventory the dealer must maintain at all times to meet franchise agreement obligations.']
  performance_review_frequency varchar [note: 'Frequency at which the OEM conducts formal performance reviews of the dealer against franchise agreement obligations and performance metrics.']
  recall_service_authorized_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the dealer is authorized to perform recall repairs and service campaigns issued by the OEM or NHTSA (National Highway Traffic Safety Administration). True = authorized, False = not authorized.']
  renewal_date date [note: 'Date when the franchise agreement was last renewed or is scheduled for renewal review. Used for tracking renewal cycles.']
  renewal_term_months varchar [note: 'Duration in months for each renewal period of the franchise agreement. Typical values are 12, 24, 36, or 60 months.']
  signed_date date [note: 'Date when the franchise agreement was formally signed by both the dealer and OEM authorized representatives, making it legally binding.']
  termination_date date [note: 'Actual date when the franchise agreement was terminated, if applicable. Populated only for agreements that ended before their scheduled expiration.']
  termination_reason varchar [note: 'Detailed explanation of why the franchise agreement was terminated early, including performance issues, dealer request, market consolidation, or regulatory compliance.']
  territory_description varchar [note: 'Textual description of the geographic territory assigned to the dealer under this franchise agreement, including cities, counties, postal codes, or radius from dealer location.']
  territory_radius_km decimal(10,2) [note: 'Radius in kilometers from the dealer\'s primary location defining the franchise territory boundary, if territory is defined by radius rather than geographic boundaries.']
  training_certification_required_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether dealer staff must complete OEM-mandated training and certification programs as a condition of the franchise agreement. True = required, False = optional.']
  warranty_administration_authorized_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the dealer is authorized to process and submit warranty claims on behalf of customers under OEM warranty programs. True = authorized, False = not authorized.']

  Note: 'Formal franchise contract between the OEM and an independent or OEM-owned dealer. Tracks agreement effective dates, expiration, renewal terms, franchise tier, authorized vehicle lines (nameplates), territory rights, performance obligations, and agreement status. Supports both new franchise grants and renewals.'
}

Table dealer.dealer_territory {
  dealer_territory_id varchar [pk, note: 'Unique identifier for the dealer territory assignment. Primary key.']
  franchise_agreement_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the franchise agreement that governs this territory assignment. Links territory rights to contractual terms.']
  jurisdiction_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to compliance.jurisdiction. Business justification: Territory planning aligns with the legal jurisdiction for emissions and safety regulations; linking enables jurisdiction‑specific reporting.']
  manager_employee_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to workforce.employee. Business justification: Territory manager assignment needed for territory performance reporting and incentive eligibility.']
  primary_dealer_dealership_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the dealership that owns or is assigned this territory.']
  allocation_quota_percentage decimal(5,2) [note: 'Percentage of regional or national vehicle allocation assigned to this territory. Sum of all territory percentages within a region should equal 100.']
  approval_date date [note: 'Date when the territory assignment or modification was formally approved by OEM (Original Equipment Manufacturer) management.']
  approved_by varchar [note: 'Name or identifier of the OEM (Original Equipment Manufacturer) executive or manager who approved this territory assignment or modification.']
  city_list varchar [note: 'Comma-separated list of cities or municipalities included in the territory coverage area.']
  competitive_intensity_rating varchar [note: 'Assessment of competitive pressure within the territory based on number of competing brands, dealer density, and market saturation.']
  country_code varchar [note: 'Three-letter ISO country code for the territory location (e.g., USA, CAN, MEX).']
  county_region varchar [note: 'County, district, or regional subdivision name within the state/province that defines part of the territory boundary.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when this territory assignment record was first created in the system. Audit trail for data lineage.']
  dms_integration_status varchar [note: 'Status of territory data synchronization with the dealer\'s DMS (Dealer Management System), specifically CDK Global DMS. Indicates whether territory boundaries are reflected in dealer systems.']
  dms_last_sync_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp of the last successful synchronization of territory data with the dealer\'s DMS (Dealer Management System). Used to monitor data freshness and integration health.']
  effective_end_date date [note: 'Date when the territory assignment expires or is terminated. Null indicates an open-ended assignment.']
  effective_start_date date [note: 'Date when the territory assignment becomes active and the dealer assumes responsibility for the defined area.']
  geographic_boundary_description varchar [note: 'Textual description of territory boundaries using landmarks, highways, or natural features (e.g., \'North of I-40, East of Highway 101\').']
  home_delivery_coverage_flag boolean [note: 'Whether home delivery is available in this territory.']
  household_count_estimate varchar [note: 'Estimated number of households within the territory. Used for market penetration analysis and vehicle allocation planning.']
  incentive_program_eligibility_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether dealers in this territory are eligible for special OEM (Original Equipment Manufacturer) incentive programs or bonuses. True = eligible; False = not eligible.']
  last_modified_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when this territory assignment record was last updated. Tracks the most recent change to any field in the record.']
  last_review_date date [note: 'Date when the territory assignment was last reviewed or audited by OEM (Original Equipment Manufacturer) management. Used to track compliance with periodic review requirements.']
  manager_email varchar [note: 'Email address of the OEM (Original Equipment Manufacturer) territory manager. Used for dealer communications and escalations.']
  manager_name varchar [note: 'Name of the OEM (Original Equipment Manufacturer) regional or territory manager responsible for overseeing this territory and dealer relationship.']
  manager_phone varchar [note: 'Contact phone number for the OEM (Original Equipment Manufacturer) territory manager.']
  market_segment_classification varchar [note: 'Classification of the territory market type based on population density and urbanization level. Influences vehicle mix allocation and marketing strategies.']
  modification_reason varchar [note: 'Business justification for the most recent change to the territory assignment (e.g., market expansion, dealer consolidation, performance adjustment).']
  next_review_date date [note: 'Scheduled date for the next territory assignment review. Ensures regular evaluation of territory boundaries and dealer performance.']
  overlap_allowed_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether this territory can overlap with other dealer territories. True allows shared coverage; False enforces exclusive boundaries.']
  overlap_rule_description varchar [note: 'Business rules governing how overlapping territories are managed, including priority rules, customer assignment logic, and conflict resolution procedures.']
  performance_benchmark_group varchar [note: 'Peer group or cohort used for dealer performance benchmarking. Territories with similar characteristics are grouped for fair comparison.']
  population_estimate varchar [note: 'Estimated total population within the territory boundaries. Used for market sizing and dealer performance benchmarking.']
  postal_code_list varchar [note: 'Comma-separated or range-based list of postal/zip codes included in the territory (e.g., \'90001-90099,91000\'). Used for precise geographic allocation.']
