Supports multi-entity consolidation and intercompany eliminations.'
}

Table finance.fiscal_period {
  fiscal_period_id varchar [pk, note: 'System-generated unique identifier for the fiscal period record.']
  accrual_cutoff_date date [note: 'Date after which accruals are no longer allowed for this period.']
  company_code varchar [note: 'Organizational code of the legal entity to which the period applies.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Date‑time when the fiscal period record was initially created in the system.']
  fiscal_period_description varchar [note: 'Optional free‑text notes describing special characteristics of the period.']
  fiscal_period_status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle status of the period used for posting: open, closed, or locked.']
  fiscal_year varchar [note: 'Four‑digit calendar year to which the period belongs, e.g., 2024.']
  fiscal_year_variant varchar [note: 'Identifier for the fiscal year variant configuration (e.g., 12‑month, 4‑quarter, 13‑period).']
  is_current_period boolean [note: 'True if this period is the active period for ongoing postings.']
  is_interim boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the period is an interim reporting period (true) or a full fiscal period (false).']
  lock_date date [note: 'Date on which the period was locked for posting; null if not locked.']
  period_end_date date [note: 'Last calendar date of the fiscal period.']
  period_name varchar [note: 'Human‑readable label for the period, e.g., "January", "Q1", "Special Adjustment".']
  period_number varchar [note: 'Sequential number of the period within the fiscal year (1‑12 for monthly, 1‑4 for quarterly).']
  period_start_date date [note: 'First calendar date of the fiscal period.']
  period_type varchar [note: 'Classification of the period: regular reporting, adjustment, or special period.']
  posting_deadline_date date [note: 'Final date by which all transactions must be posted to this period.']
  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Date‑time of the most recent modification to the fiscal period record.']

  Note: 'Fiscal period and fiscal year (FY) calendar reference master defining the financial reporting periods used across the enterprise. Captures fiscal year, period number, period name, start date, end date, period status (open, closed, locked), period type (regular, special/adjustment), and company code applicability. Governs FY close processes, period-end accruals, and IFRS/GAAP reporting windows. Aligned with SAP FI fiscal year variant configuration.'
}

Table finance.journal_entry {
  journal_entry_id varchar [pk, note: 'Unique identifier for the journal entry record.']
  company_code_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to finance.company_code. Business justification: Replace string company_code with FK to company_code for proper relational integrity.']
  cost_center_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to finance.cost_center. Business justification: Reference cost_center master instead of free‑text code.']
  fiscal_period_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to finance.fiscal_period. Business justification: Link journal entry to fiscal period master for consistent period handling.']
  journal_employee_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the user or system that performed the posting.']
  journal_posting_user_employee_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the user or system that performed the posting.']
  party_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the business partner (vendor, customer, or other) associated with the entry.']
  profit_center_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to finance.profit_center. Business justification: Reference profit_center master for reporting consistency.']
  amount decimal(15,2) [note: 'Total amount of the journal entry in the document currency.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the journal entry record was created in the data lake.']
  currency_code varchar [note: 'Three‑letter ISO 4217 currency code of the amounts.']
  debit_credit_indicator varchar [note: 'Indicates whether the line is a debit or credit.']
  document_date date [note: 'Date recorded on the accounting document (may differ from posting date).']
  document_language varchar [note: 'Language key of the document (e.g., EN, DE).']
  document_number varchar [note: 'External document number assigned by SAP FI for the journal entry.']
  document_type varchar [note: 'Type of accounting document (e.g., SA – General Ledger, KR – Vendor Invoice, AB – Customer Invoice).']
  exchange_rate decimal(12,6) [note: 'Exchange rate used to convert foreign currency to local currency.']
  exchange_rate_type varchar [note: 'Type of exchange rate (e.g., M – average, G – spot).']
  intercompany_indicator boolean [note: 'True if the entry is part of an intercompany transaction.']
  is_adjustment boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the entry is an adjusting entry (e.g., accrual).']
  is_consolidated boolean [note: 'True if the entry is part of a consolidated financial statement.']
  is_manual_entry boolean [note: 'True if the entry was entered manually rather than by automated process.']
  is_test_entry boolean [note: 'True if the entry is a test or simulation record.']
  journal_entry_status varchar [note: 'Current processing status of the journal entry.']
  ledger_group varchar [note: 'Ledger group indicating IFRS or local GAAP ledger.']
  line_item_count varchar [note: 'Number of line items associated with this journal entry.']
  plant varchar [note: 'Plant code where the transaction originated.']
  posting_category varchar [note: 'High‑level category of the posting (e.g., GL, AP, AR).']
  posting_key varchar [note: 'SAP posting key defining the transaction type (e.g., 40 for debit).']
  posting_period varchar [note: 'Posting period identifier (e.g., 202401).']
  posting_reference varchar [note: 'External reference identifier (e.g., external system ID).']
  posting_text varchar [note: 'User‑defined text describing the posting.']
  posting_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Date and time when the entry was posted to the ledger.']
  posting_user_role varchar [note: 'Role of the user who posted the entry (e.g., accountant, system).']
  reference_document_number varchar [note: 'Reference number linking to related documents (e.g., invoice).']
  reversal_document_number varchar [note: 'Document number of the original entry being reversed.']
  reversal_indicator boolean [note: 'Flag indicating if the entry is a reversal of a previous entry.']
  segment varchar [note: 'Segment identifier for internal reporting (e.g., automotive, powertrain).']
  source_module varchar [note: 'Specific module within the source system (e.g., FI‑GL).']
  tax_amount decimal(15,2) [note: 'Tax amount calculated for the entry.']
  tax_code varchar [note: 'Tax code applied to the entry for tax determination.']
  tax_jurisdiction varchar [note: 'Tax jurisdiction code applicable to the entry.']
  transaction_code varchar [note: 'Code representing the business transaction (e.g., AP, AR).']
  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp of the most recent update to the journal entry record.']

  Note: 'General ledger journal entry header record capturing all financial postings in the SAP FI ledger. Represents the primary transactional record for every accounting document including goods issue postings, vendor invoice postings, customer payments, accruals, depreciation runs, intercompany settlements, and manual adjustments. Captures document type, posting date, fiscal year/period, company code, reference document, posting user, reversal indicator, and ledger group (IFRS vs local GAAP). SSOT for all GL postings.'
}

Table finance.journal_entry_line {
  journal_entry_line_id varchar [pk, note: 'System-generated unique identifier for the journal entry line record.']
  cost_center_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to finance.cost_center. Business justification: Link line to cost_center master for cost allocation.']
  gl_account_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to finance.gl_account. Business justification: Replace string GL account code with FK to gl_account master.']
  journal_entry_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the parent journal entry (header) to which this line belongs.']
  profit_center_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to finance.profit_center. Business justification: Link line to profit_center master for profitability reporting.']
  wbs_element_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to finance.wbs_element. Business justification: Reference WBS element master for project cost tracking.']
  account_type varchar [note: 'Classification of the GL account (e.g., balance sheet, profit & loss).']
  amount_cc decimal(15,2) [note: 'Monetary amount posted on the line in the company code (local) currency.']
  amount_tc decimal(15,2) [note: 'Monetary amount posted on the line in the transaction currency.']
  assignment varchar [note: 'User‑defined assignment field for additional categorisation (e.g., cost object).']
  business_area varchar [note: 'Business area classification for reporting.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the journal entry line record was created in the system.']
  currency_cc varchar [note: 'Three‑letter ISO 4217 code of the company code (local) currency.']
  currency_tc varchar [note: 'Three‑letter ISO 4217 code of the transaction currency.']
  debit_credit_indicator varchar [note: 'Flag indicating whether the line is a debit (D) or credit (C).']
  document_date date [note: 'Date printed on the accounting document.']
  exchange_rate decimal(12,6) [note: 'Rate used to convert amount_tc to amount_cc.']
  exchange_rate_type varchar [note: 'Identifier of the exchange rate type (e.g., M for market, A for average).']
  fiscal_period varchar [note: 'Fiscal period (month or period code) of the posting.']
  fiscal_year varchar [note: 'Fiscal year of the posting (e.g., 2024).']
  line_sequence varchar [note: 'Sequential number of the line within the journal entry, used for ordering.']
  line_text varchar [note: 'Free‑form description of the line item.']
  plant varchar [note: 'Manufacturing plant or location code associated with the posting.']
  posting_date date [note: 'Date on which the line is posted to the ledger.']
  posting_key varchar [note: 'SAP posting key that determines the type of posting (e.g., debit/credit).']
  quantity decimal(12,3) [note: 'Quantity associated with the line (e.g., number of units, hours).']
  reference_document_item varchar [note: 'Item number of the referenced external document.']
  reference_document_number varchar [note: 'External document number referenced by this line (e.g., invoice).']
  reversal_indicator boolean [note: 'True if this line reverses a previous posting.']
  segment varchar [note: 'Segment code for profitability analysis.']
  tax_code varchar [note: 'Tax code used for tax calculation on the line.']
  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp of the most recent update to the journal entry line record.']

  Note: 'Individual line item within a GL journal entry, representing a single debit or credit posting to a GL account. Captures GL account, debit/credit indicator, posting amount in transaction currency and company code currency, cost center, profit center, WBS element, plant, tax code, assignment field, and line item text. Supports detailed cost allocation, profitability analysis, and SOX audit trail requirements. Aligned with SAP FI line item table (BSEG).'
}

Table finance.ap_invoice {
  ap_invoice_id varchar [pk, note: 'System-generated unique identifier for the AP invoice record.']
  trade_compliance_record_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to compliance.trade_compliance_record. Business justification: AP invoices for imported parts must reference the trade compliance record to ensure customs duties and export‑control compliance.']
  vendor_id varchar [note: 'Unique identifier of the supplier that issued the invoice.']
  cost_center_code varchar [note: 'Cost center associated with the invoice for internal accounting.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the invoice record was created in the system.']
  currency_code varchar [note: 'Three-letter ISO currency code of the invoice amount.']
  discount_amount decimal(15,2) [note: 'Early payment or contractual discount applied to the invoice.']
  due_date date [note: 'Date by which payment must be made according to payment terms.']
  exchange_rate decimal(12,6) [note: 'Rate used to convert invoice currency to the reporting currency.']
  fiscal_year varchar [note: 'Fiscal year to which the invoice belongs.']
  goods_receipt_number varchar [note: 'Reference to the goods receipt that triggered the invoice.']
  gross_amount decimal(15,2) [note: 'Total invoice amount before taxes and discounts.']
  invoice_date date [note: 'Date the supplier issued the invoice.']
  invoice_number varchar [note: 'Vendor-assigned invoice number used for reference and matching.']
  invoice_status varchar [note: 'Current processing status of the invoice.']
  is_credit_memo boolean [note: 'True if the record represents a credit memo rather than a standard invoice.']
  material_group varchar [note: 'Group classification of materials purchased.']
  net_amount decimal(15,2) [note: 'Invoice amount after tax and discounts.']
  notes varchar [note: 'Free-text notes entered on the invoice for additional context.']
  payment_block_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether payment of the invoice is blocked (true) or allowed (false).']
  payment_date date [note: 'Date the invoice was paid.']
  payment_method varchar [note: 'Method used for payment (e.g., ACH, Wire, Check).']
  payment_reference varchar [note: 'Reference number of the payment transaction.']
  payment_terms varchar [note: 'Standard payment terms code governing the invoice.']
  plant_code varchar [note: 'Manufacturing plant code related to the invoice.']
  posting_date date [note: 'Date the invoice was posted to the general ledger.']
  ppap_status varchar [note: 'Status of the Production Part Approval Process for the supplier.']
  purchase_order_number varchar [note: 'Reference to the purchase order associated with the invoice.']
  reporting_currency_code varchar [note: 'Currency code used for financial reporting of the invoice.']
  tax_amount decimal(15,2) [note: 'Total tax amount included in the invoice.']
  tax_code varchar [note: 'Tax code used for tax calculation on the invoice.']
  three_way_match_flag boolean [note: 'True when purchase order, goods receipt, and invoice are matched.']
  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp of the last update to the invoice record.']
  warranty_reserve_amount decimal(15,2) [note: 'Amount reserved for warranty liability related to the invoice.']

  Note: 'Accounts Payable (AP) vendor invoice record capturing supplier invoices received for direct materials (production parts, CKD/SKD kits), indirect materials (MRO, tooling), and services. Aligned with SAP FI-AP (Accounts Payable) module. Captures vendor ID, invoice date, posting date, payment terms, gross amount, tax amount, net amount, currency, payment block status, three-way match status (PO/GR/IR), due date, and payment method. Supports PPAP-related supplier payment tracking and cash flow management.'
}

Table finance.ap_payment {
  ap_payment_id varchar [pk, note: 'Unique identifier for the payment transaction.']
  payment_run_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the batch run that processed this payment.']
  payment_settlement_id varchar [note: 'Identifier linking to settlement batch.']
  vendor_id varchar [note: 'Unique identifier of the supplier/vendor receiving the payment.']
  amount_gross decimal(18,2) [note: 'Total payment amount before taxes and discounts.']
  amount_net decimal(18,2) [note: 'Final amount after tax and discount.']
  bank_account_number varchar [note: 'Bank account number used for the payment (PCI-sensitive).']
  clearance_date date [note: 'Date when the payment cleared the bank.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the payment record was created in the system.']
  currency_code varchar [note: 'Three-letter ISO currency code of the payment.']
  discount_amount decimal(18,2) [note: 'Discount applied to the payment.']
  early_payment_discount_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates if an early payment discount was applied.']
  exchange_rate decimal(12,6) [note: 'Exchange rate applied if payment currency differs from functional currency.']
  house_bank_code varchar [note: 'Code of the house bank handling the payment.']
  is_automated boolean [note: 'Flag indicating if the payment was processed automatically.']
  payment_channel varchar [note: 'Channel through which the payment was initiated.']
  payment_comments varchar [note: 'Additional comments or notes regarding the payment.']
  payment_cost_center varchar [note: 'Cost center associated with the payment.']
  payment_date date [note: 'Calendar date of the payment (date part).']
  payment_description varchar [note: 'Free-text description or memo for the payment.']
  payment_document_number varchar [note: 'Document number assigned to the payment in the ERP system.']
  payment_due_date date [note: 'Original due date of the invoice(s) being paid.']
  payment_error_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates if the payment encountered an error.']
  payment_exchange_rate_date date [note: 'Date on which the exchange rate was determined.']
  payment_fiscal_period varchar [note: 'Fiscal period (month/quarter) of the payment.']
  payment_fiscal_year varchar [note: 'Fiscal year of the payment.']
  payment_gl_account varchar [note: 'General Ledger account code charged for the payment.']
  payment_method varchar [note: 'Method used to make the payment (e.g., ACH, wire, check, EFT).']
  payment_original_amount decimal(18,2) [note: 'Payment amount in original invoice currency.']
  payment_original_currency varchar [note: 'Currency of the original invoice amount.']
  payment_priority varchar [note: 'Priority level assigned to the payment.']
  payment_reference varchar [note: 'External reference number provided by the vendor or bank.']
  payment_settlement_date date [note: 'Date of the settlement batch.']
  payment_status varchar [note: 'Current processing status of the payment.']
  payment_tax_code varchar [note: 'Tax code applied to the payment.']
  payment_terms varchar [note: 'Contractual payment terms (e.g., Net30).']
  payment_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Exact date and time when the payment was executed.']
  payment_type varchar [note: 'Indicates if the payment is outbound (to vendor) or inbound (refund).']
  payment_vat_amount decimal(18,2) [note: 'Value-added tax amount included in the payment.']
  tax_amount decimal(18,2) [note: 'Tax component of the payment.']
  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp of the most recent update to the payment record.']

  Note: 'Accounts Payable payment transaction record capturing outgoing payments made to suppliers and vendors. Captures payment run ID, payment date, vendor ID, bank account, payment method (ACH, wire, check), payment amount, currency, cleared invoice references, payment document number, house bank, and payment status. Supports supplier payment performance tracking, cash management, and working capital optimization aligned with JIT/JIS supply chain payment terms.'
}

  due_date date [note: 'Payment due date']
  fiscal_period varchar [note: 'Fiscal period of posting']
  fiscal_year varchar [note: 'Fiscal year of posting']
  gross_amount decimal(18,2) [note: 'Total gross invoice amount']
  intercompany_flag boolean [note: 'Whether invoice is intercompany']
  invoice_category varchar [note: 'Category of invoice']
  invoice_date date [note: 'Date invoice was issued']
  invoice_number varchar [note: 'Unique invoice number']
  invoice_type varchar [note: 'Type of AR invoice']

  sales_order_number varchar [note: 'Related sales order']
  sales_org_code varchar [note: 'Sales organization code']
  tax_amount decimal(18,2) [note: 'Tax amount on invoice']
  tax_code varchar [note: 'Tax code applied']
  tax_rate decimal(5,2) [note: 'Applicable tax rate']
  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Last update timestamp']
  warranty_reserve_amount decimal(18,2) [note: 'Warranty reserve allocation']
  warranty_reserve_flag boolean [note: 'Whether warranty reserve applies']

  Note: 'Accounts receivable invoice issued to customers for vehicle sales, parts, and services'
}

  gross_amount decimal(18,2) [note: 'Gross payment amount']

  remittance_reference varchar [note: 'Remittance advice reference']
  tax_amount decimal(18,2) [note: 'Tax amount']

  Note: 'Accounts receivable payment received from customers'
}

  supporting_document_url varchar [note: 'Document URL']
  tax_implication varchar [note: 'Tax implications']

  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Last update']
  wbs_element varchar [note: 'WBS element code']

  Note: 'Capital expenditure request for plant equipment, tooling, and facility investments'
}

Table finance.manufacturing_cost {
  manufacturing_cost_id varchar [pk, note: 'Primary key']
  cost_center_id varchar [note: 'Cost center FK']
  plant_id varchar [note: 'Plant FK']
  production_order_id varchar [note: 'Production order FK']
  actual_energy_cost decimal(18,2) [note: 'Actual energy cost']
  actual_fixed_overhead_cost decimal(18,2) [note: 'Actual fixed overhead']
  actual_labor_cost decimal(18,2) [note: 'Actual labor cost']
  actual_material_cost decimal(18,2) [note: 'Actual material cost']
  actual_scrap_cost decimal(18,2) [note: 'Actual scrap cost']
  actual_tooling_amortization_cost decimal(18,2) [note: 'Actual tooling amortization']
  actual_variable_overhead_cost decimal(18,2) [note: 'Actual variable overhead']
  cost_calculation_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Calculation timestamp']
  cost_record_number varchar [note: 'Record number']
  cost_variance_amount decimal(18,2) [note: 'Variance amount']
  cost_variance_percent decimal(5,2) [note: 'Variance percent']
  costing_date date [note: 'Costing date']
  costing_version varchar [note: 'Costing version']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Creation timestamp']
  currency_code varchar [note: 'Currency']
  is_variance_exceed_threshold boolean [note: 'Variance threshold flag']
  manufacturing_cost_status varchar [note: 'Status']
  standard_energy_cost decimal(18,2) [note: 'Standard energy cost']
  standard_fixed_overhead_cost decimal(18,2) [note: 'Standard fixed overhead']

  vin_registry_id varchar [note: 'Vin Registry Id']
  actual_manufacturing_cost decimal(18,2) [note: 'Actual Manufacturing Cost']
  cost_center_code varchar [note: 'Cost Center Code']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Created Timestamp']
  currency_code varchar [note: 'Currency Code']
  ebitda_contribution decimal(18,2) [note: 'Ebitda Contribution']
  emission_rating varchar [note: 'Emission Rating']
  fi_revenue_amount decimal(18,2) [note: 'Finance & Insurance revenue amount attributed to this vehicle sale.']
  fiscal_period varchar [note: 'Fiscal Period']
  fiscal_year varchar [note: 'Fiscal Year']
  fuel_type varchar [note: 'Fuel Type']
  gross_margin decimal(18,2) [note: 'Gross Margin']
  gross_revenue_msrp decimal(18,2) [note: 'Gross Revenue Msrp']
  incentive_amount decimal(18,2) [note: 'Incentive Amount']
  is_eligible_for_subsidy boolean [note: 'Is Eligible For Subsidy']
  market_region varchar [note: 'Market Region']
  model_year varchar [note: 'Model Year']
  net_contribution_margin decimal(18,2) [note: 'Net Contribution Margin']
  net_revenue decimal(18,2) [note: 'Net Revenue']
  plant_code varchar [note: 'Plant Code']
  profit_center_code varchar [note: 'Profit Center Code']
  sales_channel varchar [note: 'Sales Channel']
  selling_distribution_cost decimal(18,2) [note: 'Selling Distribution Cost']
  standard_manufacturing_cost decimal(18,2) [note: 'Standard Manufacturing Cost']
  subsidy_amount decimal(18,2) [note: 'Subsidy Amount']
  tax_amount decimal(18,2) [note: 'Tax Amount']
  transaction_date date [note: 'Transaction Date']
  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Updated Timestamp']
  vehicle_category varchar [note: 'Vehicle Category']
  vehicle_height_mm varchar [note: 'Vehicle Height Mm']
  vehicle_length_mm varchar [note: 'Vehicle Length Mm']
  vehicle_line varchar [note: 'Vehicle Line']
  vehicle_profitability_status varchar [note: 'Vehicle Profitability Status']
  vehicle_weight_kg decimal(10,2) [note: 'Vehicle Weight Kg']
  vehicle_width_mm varchar [note: 'Vehicle Width Mm']
  warranty_miles varchar [note: 'Warranty Miles']
  warranty_reserve_charge decimal(18,2) [note: 'Warranty Reserve Charge']
  warranty_years varchar [note: 'Warranty Years']

  Note: 'Vehicle-level profitability record capturing the contribution margin and net profitability for each vehicle unit sold, by VIN, vehicle line, plant, market region, and sales channel. Captures gross revenue (MSRP), net revenue (after dealer incentives and discounts), standard manufacturing cost, actual manufacturing cost, gross margin, selling and distribution cost, warranty reserve charge, and net contribution margin. Supports EBITDA reporting by vehicle line/plant/region and management accounting for product portfolio decisions.'
}

}

  expiry_date date [note: 'Expiry Date']
  score decimal(5,2) [note: 'Score']
  training_status varchar [note: 'Training Status']
  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Updated Timestamp']

  Note: 'Transactional record of employee training completions and enrollments, capturing course name, course type (IATF competency, safety certification, EV/ADAS technical, leadership, compliance), delivery method (classroom, e-learning, OJT), completion date, pass/fail status, score, certification expiry date, and training provider. Critical for IATF 16949 competency compliance and OSHA safety certification tracking.'
}

Covers ICE, HEV, PHEV, and EV powertrain types. Links to the specific engine family and vehicle model year program. SUPERSEDED: Use vehicle.vehicle_emissions_certification as the single source of truth.'
}

}

Table compliance.test_event {
  test_event_id varchar [pk, note: 'Test Event Id']
  model_id varchar [note: 'Model Id']
  test_facility_id varchar [note: 'Test Facility Id']

  test_status varchar [note: 'Test Status']
  test_type varchar [note: 'Test Type']
  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Updated Timestamp']

  Note: 'Transactional record capturing each physical compliance test event conducted for regulatory certification purposes. Captures test date, test facility, test type, vehicle configuration tested, test result (pass/fail/conditional), measured values, and the certifying laboratory. Links to the homologation record or emissions certification being pursued.'
}

Table compliance.compliance_test_result {
  compliance_test_result_id varchar [pk, note: 'Compliance Test Result Id']
  test_event_id varchar [note: 'Test Event Id']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Created Timestamp']
  data_governance_ref varchar [note: 'Reference to data governance catalog entry for lineage tracking']
  esg_test_category varchar [note: 'ESG category of the compliance test']
  field_service_info varchar [note: 'Generic field service info placeholder']
  limit_value decimal(18,2) [note: 'Limit Value']
  measured_value decimal(18,2) [note: 'Measured Value']
  parameter_name varchar [note: 'Parameter Name']
  pass_fail_flag boolean [note: 'Pass Fail Flag']
  test_condition varchar [note: 'Test Condition']
  unit_of_measure varchar [note: 'Unit Of Measure']
  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Updated Timestamp']

  Note: 'Detailed test result record for each measured parameter within a compliance test event. Captures parameter name (CO2 g/km, NOx mg/km, crash deformation zone, noise dB), measured value, regulatory limit, pass/fail status, test phase (cold start, hot start, WLTP low/medium/high/extra-high), and measurement uncertainty. Enables granular traceability of test outcomes against specific regulatory thresholds for each parameter tested. SUPERSEDED: Use engineering.engineering_test_result as the single source of truth.'
}

Captures regulation name, issuing body (NHTSA, EPA, CARB, UNECE, IATF, ISO), regulation code (e.g., FMVSS 208, ECE R94, Euro 6d), effective date, applicability scope (market, vehicle category, powertrain type), compliance deadline, and current status (active, superseded, proposed). Serves as the regulatory obligation register.'
}

Table compliance.obligation {
  obligation_id varchar [pk, note: 'Obligation Id']
  regulatory_requirement_id varchar [note: 'Regulatory Requirement Id']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Created Timestamp']
  data_governance_ref varchar [note: 'Reference to data governance catalog entry for lineage tracking']
  due_date date [note: 'Due Date']
  esg_obligation_type varchar [note: 'Type of ESG obligation (carbon reporting, water disclosure, social audit)']
  field_service_info varchar [note: 'Generic field service info placeholder']
  obligation_description varchar [note: 'Description']
  obligation_status varchar [note: 'Obligation Status']
  obligation_type varchar [note: 'Obligation Type']
  responsible_party varchar [note: 'Responsible Party']
  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Updated Timestamp']

  Note: 'Operational record linking a specific vehicle program or model year to its applicable regulatory requirements by jurisdiction. Captures the obligation status (pending, in-progress, certified, waived, non-compliant), target certification date, responsible engineering team, and associated homologation record or emissions certification.
